*flagShoppingList {\n265\t\t\tif !*flagVerify && *flagDuration == 0 {\n266\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Output complete (no simulation requested)\")\n267\t\t\t\tos.Exit(0)\n268\t\t\t}\n269\t\t}\n270\t\n271\t\t// Create scenario configuration\n272\t\tscenarioConfig := &ScenarioConfig{\n273\t\t\tType:      ScenarioType(*flagScenario),\n274\t\t\tStartedAt: time.Now(),\n275\t\t\tFallParams: FallScenarioParams{\n276\t\t\t\tTriggerAfter:      *flagFallDelay,\n277\t\t\t\tDescentDuration:   *flagFallDuration,\n278\t\t\t\tStillnessDuration: *flagStillness,\n279\t\t\t\tMinVelocity:       -1.5, // Below -1.5 m/s threshold\n280\t\t\t\tMinZDrop:          0.8,  // At least 0.8m drop\n281\t\t\t\tEndZ:              0.3,  // Floor level\n282\t\t\t},\n283\t\t\tOTAParams: OTAScenarioParams{\n284\t\t\t\tUpdateAfter:      10 * time.Second,\n285\t\t\t\tFirmwareSize:     *flagOTASize,\n286\t\t\t\tNewVersion:       *flagOTAVersion,\n287\t\t\t\tRebootDelay:      3 * time.Second,\n288\t\t\t\tBootFailDuration: 30 * time.Second,\n289\t\t\t\tSimulateFailure:  *flagOTAFailure,\n290\t\t\t},\n291\t\t}\n292\t\n293\t\t// Create context for shutdown\n294\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n295\t\tdefer cancel()\n296\t\n297\t\t// Handle interrupt signal\n298\t\tsigChan := make(chan os.Signal, 1)\n299\t\tsignal.Notify(sigChan, os.Interrupt)\n300\t\n301\t\t// Open CSV writer if specified\n302\t\tvar csvWriter *CSVWriter\n303\t\tif *flagOutputCSV != \"\" {\n304\t\t\tcsvWriter, err = NewCSVWriter(*flagOutputCSV)\n305\t\t\tif err != nil {\n306\t\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Failed to open CSV file: %v\", err)\n307\t\t\t}\n308\t\t\tdefer func() { _ = csvWriter.Close() }() //nolint:errcheck\n309\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Writing ground truth to %s\", *flagOutputCSV)\n310\t\t}\n311\t\n312\t\t// Start statistics reporter\n313\t\tstats := &Stats{StartTime: time.Now()}\n314\t\tgo reportStats(ctx, stats)\n315\t\n316\t\t// Connect all nodes to mothership\n317\t\tif err := connectNodes(ctx, nodes); err != nil {\n318\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Failed to connect nodes: %v\", err)\n319\t\t}\n320\t\tdefer closeAllNodes(nodes)\n321\t\n322\t\t// Main simulation loop\n323\t\tsimulationComplete := make(chan struct{})\n324\t\tgo runSimulation(ctx, nodes, walkers, space, rng, csvWriter, stats, simulationComplete, scenarioConfig)\n325\t\n326\t\t// Wait for completion or interrupt\n327\t\tvar durationTimer <-chan time.Time\n328\t\tif *flagDuration > 0 {\n329\t\t\tdurationTimer = time.After(time.Duration(*flagDuration) * time.Second)\n330\t\t} else {\n331\t\t\t// Never timeout if duration is 0\n332\t\t\tdurationTimer = make(chan time.Time)\n333\t\t}\n334\t\n335\t\tselect {\n336\t\tcase <-simulationComplete:\n337\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Simulation completed\")\n338\t\tcase <-sigChan:\n339\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Interrupted by user\")\n340\t\t\tcancel()\n341\t\tcase <-durationTimer:\n342\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Duration elapsed\")\n343\t\t\tcancel()\n344\t\t}\n345\t\n346\t\t// Verify blob count if requested\n347\t\tif *flagVerify {\n348\t\t\tif err := verifyBlobs(*flagWalkers, walkers, space); err != nil {\n349\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Verification FAILED: %v\", err)\n350\t\t\t\tos.Exit(1)\n351\t\t\t}\n352\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Verification PASSED\")\n353\t\t}\n354\t\n355\t\t// Print final statistics\n356\t\tprintFinalStats(stats, len(walkers))\n357\t}\n358\t\n359\t// parseSpace parses space dimensions from WxDxH format\n360\tfunc parseSpace(s string) (*Space, error) {\n361\t\tparts := strings.Split(s, \"x\")\n362\t\tif len(parts) != 3 {\n363\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"expected WxDxH format, got: %s\", s)\n364\t\t}\n365\t\twidth, err := strconv.ParseFloat(parts[0], 64)\n366\t\tif err != nil {\n367\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid width: %w\", err)\n368\t\t}\n369\t\tdepth, err := strconv.ParseFloat(parts[1], 64)\n370\t\tif err != nil {\n371\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid depth: %w\", err)\n372\t\t}\n373\t\theight, err := strconv.ParseFloat(parts[2], 64)\n374\t\tif err != nil {\n375\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid height: %w\", err)\n376\t\t}\n377\t\treturn &Space{Width: width, Depth: depth, Height: height}, nil\n378\t}\n379\t\n380\t// createVirtualNodes creates virtual nodes positioned in the space\n381\tfunc createVirtualNodes(count int, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand) []*VirtualNode {\n382\t\tnodes := make([]*VirtualNode, count)\n383\t\n384\t\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n385\t\t\tnode := &VirtualNode{\n386\t\t\t\tID:   i,\n387\t\t\t\tMAC:  generateMAC(i),\n388\t\t\t\tRole: \"tx_rx\",\n389\t\t\t}\n390\t\n391\t\t\t// Distribute nodes around perimeter\n392\t\t\tperimeter := 2*(space.Width+space.Depth)\n393\t\t\tpos := float64(i) / float64(count) * perimeter\n394\t\n395\t\t\tif pos < space.Width {\n396\t\t\t\t// Bottom edge\n397\t\t\t\tnode.Position = Point{X: pos, Y: 0, Z: 2.0}\n398\t\t\t} else if pos < space.Width+space.Depth {\n399\t\t\t\t// Right edge\n400\t\t\t\tnode.Position = Point{X: space.Width, Y: pos - space.Width, Z: 2.0}\n401\t\t\t} else if pos < 2*space.Width+space.Depth {\n402\t\t\t\t// Top edge\n403\t\t\t\tnode.Position = Point{X: space.Width - (pos - space.Width - space.Depth), Y: space.Depth, Z: 2.0}\n404\t\t\t} else {\n405\t\t\t\t// Left edge\n406\t\t\t\tnode.Position = Point{X: 0, Y: space.Depth - (pos - 2*space.Width - space.Depth), Z: 2.0}\n407\t\t\t}\n408\t\n409\t\t\tnodes[i] = node\n410\t\t}\n411\t\n412\t\treturn nodes\n413\t}\n414\t\n415\t// generateMAC generates a synthetic MAC address for a virtual node\n416\tfunc generateMAC(id int) [6]byte {\n417\t\tvar mac [6]byte\n418\t\tmac[0] = 0xAA\n419\t\tmac[1] = 0xBB\n420\t\tmac[2] = 0xCC\n421\t\tmac[3] = byte((id >> 16) & 0xFF)\n422\t\tmac[4] = byte((id >> 8) & 0xFF)\n423\t\tmac[5] = byte(id & 0xFF)\n424\t\treturn mac\n425\t}\n426\t\n427\t// createWalkers creates synthetic walkers\n428\tfunc createWalkers(count int, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand) []*Walker {\n429\t\twalkerType := WalkerType(*flagWalkerType)\n430\t\n431\t\tif walkerType == WalkerTypePathFollow {\n432\t\t\treturn createPathWalkers(count, space)\n433\t\t}\n434\t\n435\t\tif walkerType == WalkerTypeNodeToNode {\n436\t\t\t// Will be created after nodes are initialized\n437\t\t\treturn nil\n438\t\t}\n439\t\n440\t\t// Default: random walk\n441\t\twalkers := make([]*Walker, count)\n442\t\n443\t\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n444\t\t\twalkers[i] = &Walker{\n445\t\t\t\tID:   i,\n446\t\t\t\tType: WalkerTypeRandomWalk,\n447\t\t\t\tPosition: Point{\n448\t\t\t\t\tX: rng.Float64() * space.Width,\n449\t\t\t\t\tY: rng.Float64() * space.Depth,\n450\t\t\t\t\tZ: 1.7,\n451\t\t\t\t},\n452\t\t\t\tVelocity: Point{\n453\t\t\t\t\tX: (rng.Float64() - 0.5) * 0.5,\n454\t\t\t\t\tY: (rng.Float64() - 0.5) * 0.5,\n455\t\t\t\t\tZ: 0,\n456\t\t\t\t},\n457\t\t\t\tSpeed:  0.8 + rng.Float64()*0.4,\n458\t\t\t\tHeight: 1.7,\n459\t\t\t}\n460\t\t}\n461\t\n462\t\treturn walkers\n463\t}\n464\t\n465\t// createPathWalkers creates walkers that follow predefined paths\n466\tfunc createPathWalkers(count int, space *Space) []*Walker {\n467\t\tif *flagPathFile == \"\" {\n468\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Path-following mode requires --path-file, using default rectangular path\")\n469\t\t\treturn createDefaultPathWalkers(count, space)\n470\t\t}\n471\t\n472\t\t// Load paths from JSON file\n473\t\tpaths, err := loadPathsFromFile(*flagPathFile)\n474\t\tif err != nil {\n475\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Failed to load paths from %s: %v\", *flagPathFile, err)\n476\t\t}\n477\t\n478\t\twalkers := make([]*Walker, count)\n479\t\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n480\t\t\t// Use path modulo count to allow fewer paths than walkers\n481\t\t\tpathIdx := i % len(paths)\n482\t\t\twalkers[i] = &Walker{\n483\t\t\t\tID:      i,\n484\t\t\t\tType:    WalkerTypePathFollow,\n485\t\t\t\tPath:    paths[pathIdx],\n486\t\t\t\tPathIdx: 0,\n487\t\t\t\tSpeed:   1.0,\n488\t\t\t\tHeight:  1.7,\n489\t\t\t}\n490\t\t\tif len(paths[pathIdx]) > 0 {\n491\t\t\t\twalkers[i].Position = paths[pathIdx][0]\n492\t\t\t}\n493\t\t}\n494\t\n495\t\treturn walkers\n496\t}\n497\t\n498\t// createDefaultPathWalkers creates walkers following a default rectangular perimeter path\n499\tfunc createDefaultPathWalkers(count int, space *Space) []*Walker {\n500\t\tmargin := 0.5\n501\t\tpath := []Point{\n502\t\t\t{X: margin, Y: margin, Z: 1.7},\n503\t\t\t{X: space.Width - margin, Y: margin, Z: 1.7},\n504\t\t\t{X: space.Width - margin, Y: space.Depth - margin, Z: 1.7},\n505\t\t\t{X: margin, Y: space.Depth - margin, Z: 1.7},\n506\t\t}\n507\t\n508\t\twalkers := make([]*Walker, count)\n509\t\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n510\t\t\tstartIdx := (i * len(path) / count) % len(path)\n511\t\t\twalkers[i] = &Walker{\n512\t\t\t\tID:      i,\n513\t\t\t\tType:    WalkerTypePathFollow,\n514\t\t\t\tPath:    path,\n515\t\t\t\tPathIdx: startIdx,\n516\t\t\t\tSpeed:   0.8 + 0.4*float64(i)/float64(count),\n517\t\t\t\tHeight:  1.7,\n518\t\t\t}\n519\t\t\tif len(path) > 0 {\n520\t\t\t\twalkers[i].Position = path[startIdx]\n521\t\t\t}\n522\t\t}\n523\t\n524\t\treturn walkers\n525\t}\n526\t\n527\t// createNodeToNodeWalkers creates walkers that traverse between virtual nodes\n528\tfunc createNodeToNodeWalkers(count int, nodes []*VirtualNode) []*Walker {\n529\t\tif len(nodes) < 2 {\n530\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Node-to-node mode requires at least 2 nodes\")\n531\t\t}\n532\t\n533\t\twalkers := make([]*Walker, count)\n534\t\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n535\t\t\twalkers[i] = &Walker{\n536\t\t\t\tID:      i,\n537\t\t\t\tType:    WalkerTypeNodeToNode,\n538\t\t\t\tNodes:   nodes,\n539\t\t\t\tNodeIdx: 1, // Target is second node\n540\t\t\t\tSpeed:   1.0,\n541\t\t\t\tHeight:  1.7,\n542\t\t\t}\n543\t\t\t// Start at first node\n544\t\t\tif len(nodes) > 0 {\n545\t\t\t\twalkers[i].Position = nodes[0].Position\n546\t\t\t}\n547\t\t}\n548\t\n549\t\treturn walkers\n550\t}\n551\t\n552\t// PathDefinition defines a walker path in JSON format\n553\ttype PathDefinition struct {\n554\t\tWaypoints []Point `json:\"waypoints\"` // Ordered list of points to visit\n555\t}\n556\t\n557\t// loadPathsFromFile loads walker paths from a JSON file\n558\tfunc loadPathsFromFile(filename string) ([][]Point, error) {\n559\t\tdata, err := os.ReadFile(filename)\n560\t\tif err != nil {\n561\t\t\treturn nil, err\n562\t\t}\n563\t\n564\t\tvar paths []PathDefinition\n565\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal(data, &paths); err != nil {\n566\t\t\treturn nil, err\n567\t\t}\n568\t\n569\t\tif len(paths) == 0 {\n570\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"no paths defined in file\")\n571\t\t}\n572\t\n573\t\tresult := make([][]Point, len(paths))\n574\t\tfor i, pathDef := range paths {\n575\t\t\tif len(pathDef.Waypoints) == 0 {\n576\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"path %d has no waypoints\", i)\n577\t\t\t}\n578\t\t\tresult[i] = pathDef.Waypoints\n579\t\t}\n580\t\n581\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Loaded %d paths from %s\", len(result), filename)\n582\t\treturn result, nil\n583\t}\n584\t\n585\t// connectNodes connects all virtual nodes to the mothership.\n586\t// Each node gets its own persistent connection with background goroutines\n587\t// for ping, health, and message reading.\n588\tfunc connectNodes(ctx context.Context, nodes []*VirtualNode) error {\n589\t\t// Get or generate token\n590\t\ttoken := *flagToken\n591\t\tif token == \"\" {\n592\t\t\tvar err error\n593\t\t\ttoken, err = provisionToken()\n594\t\t\tif err != nil {\n595\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to provision token: %w\", err)\n596\t\t\t}\n597\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Auto-provisioned token: %s...\", token[:min(16, len(token))])\n598\t\t}\n599\t\n600\t\t// Parse mothership URL\n601\t\twsURL, err := url.Parse(*flagMothership)\n602\t\tif err != nil {\n603\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid mothership URL: %w\", err)\n604\t\t}\n605\t\n606\t\t// Convert http(s) to ws(s)\n607\t\tif wsURL.Scheme == \"http\" {\n608\t\t\twsURL.Scheme = \"ws\"\n609\t\t} else if wsURL.Scheme == \"https\" {\n610\t\t\twsURL.Scheme = \"wss\"\n611\t\t}\n612\t\n613\t\terrChan := make(chan error, len(nodes))\n614\t\n615\t\tfor _, node := range nodes {\n616\t\t\t// Add node WS path if needed\n617\t\t\tnodeURL := wsURL.String()\n618\t\t\tif !strings.Contains(nodeURL, \"/ws/\") && !strings.HasSuffix(nodeURL, \"/ws\") {\n619\t\t\t\tif strings.HasSuffix(nodeURL, \"/\") {\n620\t\t\t\t\tnodeURL = nodeURL + \"ws\"\n621\t\t\t\t} else {\n622\t\t\t\t\tnodeURL = nodeURL + \"/ws\"\n623\t\t\t\t}\n624\t\t\t}\n625\t\n626\t\t\theaders := http.Header{}\n627\t\t\theaders.Set(\"X-Spaxel-Token\", token)\n628\t\n629\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d connecting to %s\", node.ID, nodeURL)\n630\t\n631\t\t\tconn, resp, err := websocket.DefaultDialer.DialContext(ctx, nodeURL, headers)\n632\t\t\tif err != nil {\n633\t\t\t\tif resp != nil {\n634\t\t\t\t\tbody, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)\n635\t\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d dial failed: %w (status %d: %s)\", node.ID, err, resp.StatusCode, string(body))\n636\t\t\t\t}\n637\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d dial failed: %w\", node.ID, err)\n638\t\t\t}\n639\t\n640\t\t\tnode.Conn = conn\n641\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d connected\", node.ID)\n642\t\n643\t\t\t// Send hello message\n644\t\t\thello := map[string]interface{}{\n645\t\t\t\t\"type\":             \"hello\",\n646\t\t\t\t\"mac\":              macToString(node.MAC),\n647\t\t\t\t\"firmware_version\": \"sim-1.0.0\",\n648\t\t\t\t\"capabilities\":     []string{\"csi\", \"tx\", \"rx\"},\n649\t\t\t\t\"chip\":             \"ESP32-S3\",\n650\t\t\t\t\"flash_mb\":         16,\n651\t\t\t\t\"uptime_ms\":        1000,\n652\t\t\t\t\"wifi_rssi\":        -45,\n653\t\t\t\t\"ip\":               fmt.Sprintf(\"127.0.0.%d\", node.ID+2),\n654\t\t\t}\n655\t\n656\t\t\thelloBytes, err := json.Marshal(hello)\n657\t\t\tif err != nil {\n658\t\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n659\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d marshal hello: %w\", node.ID, err)\n660\t\t\t}\n661\t\n662\t\t\tnode.mu.Lock()\n663\t\t\terr = conn.WriteMessage(websocket.TextMessage, helloBytes)\n664\t\t\tnode.mu.Unlock()\n665\t\n666\t\t\tif err != nil {\n667\t\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n668\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d send hello: %w\", node.ID, err)\n669\t\t\t}\n670\t\n671\t\t\t// Wait for role assignment\n672\t\t\tconn.SetReadDeadline(time.Now().Add(10 * time.Second)) //nolint:errcheck\n673\t\t\t_, message, err := conn.ReadMessage()\n674\t\t\tif err != nil {\n675\t\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n676\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d read role: %w\", node.ID, err)\n677\t\t\t}\n678\t\n679\t\t\tvar roleMsg map[string]interface{}\n680\t\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal(message, &roleMsg); err != nil {\n681\t\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n682\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d parse role: %w\", node.ID, err)\n683\t\t\t}\n684\t\n685\t\t\tif roleMsg[\"type\"] == \"reject\" {\n686\t\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n687\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d rejected: %v\", node.ID, roleMsg[\"reason\"])\n688\t\t\t}\n689\t\n690\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d received role: %v\", node.ID, roleMsg[\"role\"])\n691\t\n692\t\t\t// Start background goroutines for this connection\n693\t\t\tstartTime := time.Now()\n694\t\t\tgo node.pingLoop(ctx)\n695\t\t\tgo node.healthLoop(ctx, startTime)\n696\t\t\tgo node.readLoop(ctx, errChan)\n697\t\t}\n698\t\n699\t\treturn nil\n700\t}\n701\t\n702\t// provisionToken provisions a token. Tries the mothership API first,\n703\t// falls back to a synthetic HMAC token.\n704\tfunc provisionToken() (string, error) {\n705\t\t// Parse mothership URL to get HTTP endpoint\n706\t\twsURL, err := url.Parse(*flagMothership)\n707\t\tif err != nil {\n708\t\t\treturn \"\", fmt.Errorf(\"invalid mothership URL: %w\", err)\n709\t\t}\n710\t\n711\t\thttpURL := *wsURL\n712\t\tif httpURL.Scheme == \"ws\" {\n713\t\t\thttpURL.Scheme = \"http\"\n714\t\t} else if httpURL.Scheme == \"wss\" {\n715\t\t\thttpURL.Scheme = \"https\"\n716\t\t}\n717\t\n718\t\t// Trim /ws suffix to get base URL\n719\t\tbaseURL := strings.TrimSuffix(httpURL.String(), \"/ws\")\n720\t\tbaseURL = strings.TrimSuffix(baseURL, \"/\")\n721\t\tprovisionURL := baseURL + \"/api/provision\"\n722\t\n723\t\t// Try POST /api/provision with synthetic credentials\n724\t\tbody := strings.NewReader(`{\"mac\":\"AA:BB:CC:00:00:00\"}`)\n725\t\tresp, err := http.Post(provisionURL, \"application/json\", body)\n726\t\tif err == nil && resp.StatusCode == http.StatusOK {\n727\t\t\tvar result map[string]interface{}\n728\t\t\tif json.NewDecoder(resp.Body).Decode(&result) == nil {\n729\t\t\t\t_ = resp.Body.Close()\n730\t\t\t\tif token, ok := result[\"node_token\"].(string); ok && token != \"\" {\n731\t\t\t\t\treturn token, nil\n732\t\t\t\t}\n733\t\t\t}\n734\t\t}\n735\t\tif resp != nil {\n736\t\t\t_ = resp.Body.Close()\n737\t\t}\n738\t\n739\t\t// Fallback: generate synthetic token\n740\t\th := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(\"sim-install-secret\"))\n741\t\th.Write([]byte(\"sim-node\"))\n742\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%064x\", h.Sum(nil)), nil\n743\t}\n744\t\n745\t// closeAllNodes closes all node WebSocket connections\n746\tfunc closeAllNodes(nodes []*VirtualNode) {\n747\t\tfor _, node := range nodes {\n748\t\t\tif node.Conn != nil {\n749\t\t\t\tnode.mu.Lock()\n750\t\t\t\tnode.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.CloseMessage, //nolint:errcheck\n751\t\t\t\t\twebsocket.FormatCloseMessage(websocket.CloseNormalClosure, \"sim shutdown\"))\n752\t\t\t\tnode.Conn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n753\t\t\t\tnode.mu.Unlock()\n754\t\t\t}\n755\t\t}\n756\t}\n757\t\n758\t// macToString converts a 6-byte MAC to colon-separated hex\n759\tfunc macToString(mac [6]byte) string {\n760\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%02X:%02X:%02X:%02X:%02X:%02X\",\n761\t\t\tmac[0], mac[1], mac[2], mac[3], mac[4], mac[5])\n762\t}\n763\t\n764\t// pingLoop sends WebSocket pings\n765\tfunc (n *VirtualNode) pingLoop(ctx context.Context) {\n766\t\tticker := time.NewTicker(30 * time.Second)\n767\t\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n768\t\n769\t\tfor {\n770\t\t\tselect {\n771\t\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n772\t\t\t\treturn\n773\t\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n774\t\t\t\tn.mu.Lock()\n775\t\t\t\terr := n.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.PingMessage, nil)\n776\t\t\t\tn.mu.Unlock()\n777\t\n778\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n779\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d ping failed: %v\", n.ID, err)\n780\t\t\t\t\treturn\n781\t\t\t\t}\n782\t\t\t}\n783\t\t}\n784\t}\n785\t\n786\t// healthLoop sends periodic health messages\n787\tfunc (n *VirtualNode) healthLoop(ctx context.Context, startTime time.Time) {\n788\t\tticker := time.NewTicker(10 * time.Second)\n789\t\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n790\t\n791\t\tfor {\n792\t\t\tselect {\n793\t\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n794\t\t\t\treturn\n795\t\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n796\t\t\t\thealth := map[string]interface{}{\n797\t\t\t\t\t\"type\":            \"health\",\n798\t\t\t\t\t\"mac\":             macToString(n.MAC),\n799\t\t\t\t\t\"timestamp_ms\":    time.Now().UnixMilli(),\n800\t\t\t\t\t\"free_heap_bytes\": 200000,\n801\t\t\t\t\t\"wifi_rssi_dbm\":   -45,\n802\t\t\t\t\t\"uptime_ms\":       time.Since(startTime).Milliseconds(),\n803\t\t\t\t\t\"csi_rate_hz\":     *flagRate,\n804\t\t\t\t\t\"wifi_channel\":    *flagChannel,\n805\t\t\t\t}\n806\t\n807\t\t\t\thealthBytes, err := json.Marshal(health)\n808\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n809\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d marshal health: %v\", n.ID, err)\n810\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n811\t\t\t\t}\n812\t\n813\t\t\t\tn.mu.Lock()\n814\t\t\t\terr = n.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.TextMessage, healthBytes)\n815\t\t\t\tn.mu.Unlock()\n816\t\n817\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n818\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d send health failed: %v\", n.ID, err)\n819\t\t\t\t\treturn\n820\t\t\t\t}\n821\t\t\t}\n822\t\t}\n823\t}\n824\t\n825\t// readLoop reads downstream messages from the WebSocket\n826\tfunc (n *VirtualNode) readLoop(ctx context.Context, errChan chan<- error) {\n827\t\tfor {\n828\t\t\tselect {\n829\t\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n830\t\t\t\treturn\n831\t\t\tdefault:\n832\t\t\t}\n833\t\n834\t\t\tn.mu.Lock()\n835\t\t\tconn := n.Conn\n836\t\t\tn.mu.Unlock()\n837\t\n838\t\t\tif conn == nil {\n839\t\t\t\treturn\n840\t\t\t}\n841\t\n842\t\t\tconn.SetReadDeadline(time.Now().Add(60 * time.Second)) //nolint:errcheck\n843\t\t\t_, message, err := conn.ReadMessage()\n844\t\t\tif err != nil {\n845\t\t\t\tselect {\n846\t\t\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n847\t\t\t\t\treturn\n848\t\t\t\tdefault:\n849\t\t\t\t}\n850\t\t\t\tif websocket.IsCloseError(err) {\n851\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d connection closed\", n.ID)\n852\t\t\t\t\treturn\n853\t\t\t\t}\n854\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d read error: %v\", n.ID, err)\n855\t\t\t\treturn\n856\t\t\t}\n857\t\n858\t\t\tvar msg map[string]interface{}\n859\t\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal(message, &msg); err != nil {\n860\t\t\t\tcontinue\n861\t\t\t}\n862\t\n863\t\t\tmsgType, ok := msg[\"type\"].(string)\n864\t\t\tif !ok {\n865\t\t\t\tcontinue\n866\t\t\t}\n867\t\n868\t\t\tswitch msgType {\n869\t\t\tcase \"role\":\n870\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d role update: %v\", n.ID, msg[\"role\"])\n871\t\t\tcase \"config\":\n872\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d config update: %v\", n.ID, msg)\n873\t\t\tcase \"reject\":\n874\t\t\t\terrChan <- fmt.Errorf(\"node %d rejected: %v\", n.ID, msg[\"reason\"])\n875\t\t\t\treturn\n876\t\t\tcase \"shutdown\":\n877\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d received shutdown\", n.ID)\n878\t\t\t\treturn\n879\t\t\t}\n880\t\t}\n881\t}\n882\t\n883\t// runSimulation runs the main CSI generation loop\n884\tfunc runSimulation(ctx context.Context, nodes []*VirtualNode, walkers []*Walker, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand, csvWriter *CSVWriter, stats *Stats, done chan<- struct{}, scenario *ScenarioConfig) {\n885\t\tdefer close(done)\n886\t\n887\t\tticker := time.NewTicker(time.Duration(1000/(*flagRate)) * time.Millisecond)\n888\t\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n889\t\n890\t\tframeNum := 0\n891\t\tlastBLETime := time.Now()\n892\t\n893\t\t// Initialize fall scenario state\n894\t\tvar fallState *FallScenarioState\n895\t\tif scenario.Type == ScenarioFall || scenario.Type == ScenarioBagOnCouch {\n896\t\t\tif len(walkers) > 0 {\n897\t\t\t\tfallState = &FallScenarioState{\n898\t\t\t\t\tWalker: walkers[0],\n899\t\t\t\t\tState:  \"walking\",\n900\t\t\t\t}\n901\t\t\t\tif scenario.Type == ScenarioBagOnCouch {\n902\t\t\t\t\t// For bag-on-couch, start with a lower position\n903\t\t\t\t\twalkers[0].Position.Z = 1.0\n904\t\t\t\t\twalkers[0].Velocity.Z = -0.2 // Slow descent\n905\t\t\t\t}\n906\t\t\t}\n907\t\t}\n908\t\n909\t\t// Track scenario timing\n910\t\tscenarioStarted := false\n911\t\n912\t\tfor {\n913\t\t\tselect {\n914\t\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n915\t\t\t\treturn\n916\t\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n917\t\t\t\t// Handle fall scenario timing\n918\t\t\t\tif fallState != nil && !scenarioStarted && time.Since(scenario.StartedAt) >= scenario.FallParams.TriggerAfter {\n919\t\t\t\t\tif scenario.Type == ScenarioFall {\n920\t\t\t\t\t\tfallState.StartFall(scenario.FallParams)\n921\t\t\t\t\t\tscenarioStarted = true\n922\t\t\t\t\t}\n923\t\t\t\t}\n924\t\n925\t\t\t\t// Update walker positions\n926\t\t\t\tif fallState != nil {\n927\t\t\t\t\tdt := 1.0 / float64(*flagRate)\n928\t\t\t\t\tfallState.UpdateForFallScenario(dt, scenario.FallParams, space, rng)\n929\t\t\t\t} else {\n930\t\t\t\t\tupdateWalkers(walkers, space, rng)\n931\t\t\t\t}\n932\t\n933\t\t\t\t// Write to CSV\n934\t\t\t\tif csvWriter != nil {\n935\t\t\t\t\tcsvWriter.WriteRow(walkers, nodes, walls)\n936\t\t\t\t}\n937\t\n938\t\t\t\t// Send CSI frames for each node pair\n939\t\t\t\tfor _, txNode := range nodes {\n940\t\t\t\t\tfor _, rxNode := range nodes {\n941\t\t\t\t\t\tif txNode.ID == rxNode.ID {\n942\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n943\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n944\t\n945\t\t\t\t\t\tframe := generateCSIFrame(txNode, rxNode, walkers, walls, frameNum, rng)\n946\t\n947\t\t\t\t\t\ttxNode.mu.Lock()\n948\t\t\t\t\t\terr := txNode.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.BinaryMessage, frame)\n949\t\t\t\t\t\ttxNode.mu.Unlock()\n950\t\n951\t\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n952\t\t\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d send CSI failed: %v\", txNode.ID, err)\n953\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n954\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n955\t\n956\t\t\t\t\t\tstats.FramesSent.Add(1)\n957\t\t\t\t\t}\n958\t\t\t\t}\n959\t\n960\t\t\t\t// Send BLE messages if enabled\n961\t\t\t\tif *flagBLE && time.Since(lastBLETime) > 5*time.Second {\n962\t\t\t\t\tsendBLEMessages(nodes, walkers)\n963\t\t\t\t\tlastBLETime = time.Now()\n964\t\t\t\t}\n965\t\n966\t\t\t\tframeNum++\n967\t\t\t}\n968\t\t}\n969\t}\n970\t\n971\t// updateWalkers updates walker positions based on their movement type\n972\tfunc updateWalkers(walkers []*Walker, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand) {\n973\t\tdt := 1.0 / float64(*flagRate)\n974\t\n975\t\tfor _, walker := range walkers {\n976\t\t\tswitch walker.Type {\n977\t\t\tcase WalkerTypePathFollow:\n978\t\t\t\tupdatePathWalker(walker, dt)\n979\t\t\tcase WalkerTypeNodeToNode:\n980\t\t\t\tupdateNodeToNodeWalker(walker, dt, space)\n981\t\t\tcase WalkerTypeRandomWalk:\n982\t\t\t\tupdateRandomWalker(walker, dt, space, rng)\n983\t\t\t}\n984\t\t}\n985\t}\n986\t\n987\t// updateRandomWalker implements random walk motion\n988\tfunc updateRandomWalker(walker *Walker, dt float64, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand) {\n989\t\twalker.Position.X += walker.Velocity.X * dt\n990\t\twalker.Position.Y += walker.Velocity.Y * dt\n991\t\n992\t\t// Bounce off walls\n993\t\tmargin := 0.2\n994\t\tif walker.Position.X < margin {\n995\t\t\twalker.Position.X = margin\n996\t\t\twalker.Velocity.X *= -1\n997\t\t}\n998\t\tif walker.Position.X > space.Width-margin {\n999\t\t\twalker.Position.X = space.Width - margin\n1000\t\t\twalker.Velocity.X *= -1\n1001\t\t}\n1002\t\tif walker.Position.Y < margin {\n1003\t\t\twalker.Position.Y = margin\n1004\t\t\twalker.Velocity.Y *= -1\n1005\t\t}\n1006\t\tif walker.Position.Y > space.Depth-margin {\n1007\t\t\twalker.Position.Y = space.Depth - margin\n1008\t\t\twalker.Velocity.Y *= -1\n1009\t\t}\n1010\t\n1011\t\t// Random velocity perturbation\n1012\t\tperturbation := 0.1\n1013\t\twalker.Velocity.X += (rng.Float64() - 0.5) * perturbation\n1014\t\twalker.Velocity.Y += (rng.Float64() - 0.5) * perturbation\n1015\t\n1016\t\t// Clamp velocity\n1017\t\tspeed := walker.Speed * (0.5 + rng.Float64()*0.5)\n1018\t\tcurrentSpeed := math.Sqrt(walker.Velocity.X*walker.Velocity.X + walker.Velocity.Y*walker.Velocity.Y)\n1019\t\tif currentSpeed > 0 {\n1020\t\t\twalker.Velocity.X = (walker.Velocity.X / currentSpeed) * speed\n1021\t\t\twalker.Velocity.Y = (walker.Velocity.Y / currentSpeed) * speed\n1022\t\t}\n1023\t\n1024\t\twalker.Position.Z = walker.Height\n1025\t}\n1026\t\n1027\t// updatePathWalker implements path-following motion\n1028\tfunc updatePathWalker(walker *Walker, dt float64) {\n1029\t\tif len(walker.Path) == 0 {\n1030\t\t\treturn\n1031\t\t}\n1032\t\n1033\t\ttarget := walker.Path[walker.PathIdx]\n1034\t\tdx := target.X - walker.Position.X\n1035\t\tdy := target.Y - walker.Position.Y\n1036\t\tdz := target.Z - walker.Position.Z\n1037\t\tdist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n1038\t\n1039\t\t// If very close to target, move to next waypoint\n1040\t\tif dist < 0.1 {\n1041\t\t\twalker.PathIdx = (walker.PathIdx + 1) % len(walker.Path)\n1042\t\t\treturn\n1043\t\t}\n1044\t\n1045\t\t// Move towards target at constant speed\n1046\t\tmoveDist := walker.Speed * dt\n1047\t\tif moveDist > dist {\n1048\t\t\tmoveDist = dist\n1049\t\t}\n1050\t\n1051\t\tt := moveDist / dist\n1052\t\twalker.Position.X += dx * t\n1053\t\twalker.Position.Y += dy * t\n1054\t\n1055\t\t// Update velocity vector for consistency\n1056\t\tif dist > 0 {\n1057\t\t\twalker.Velocity.X = (dx / dist) * walker.Speed\n1058\t\t\twalker.Velocity.Y = (dy / dist) * walker.Speed\n1059\t\t\twalker.Velocity.Z = (dz / dist) * walker.Speed\n1060\t\t}\n1061\t}\n1062\t\n1063\t// updateNodeToNodeWalker implements traversal between virtual nodes\n1064\tfunc updateNodeToNodeWalker(walker *Walker, dt float64, space *Space) {\n1065\t\tif len(walker.Nodes) < 2 {\n1066\t\t\tupdateRandomWalker(walker, dt, space, rand.New(rand.NewSource(time.Now().UnixNano())))\n1067\t\t\treturn\n1068\t\t}\n1069\t\n1070\t\ttargetNode := walker.Nodes[walker.NodeIdx]\n1071\t\ttargetPos := targetNode.Position\n1072\t\n1073\t\tdx := targetPos.X - walker.Position.X\n1074\t\tdy := targetPos.Y - walker.Position.Y\n1075\t\tdz := targetPos.Z - walker.Position.Z\n1076\t\tdist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n1077\t\n1078\t\t// Check if we've arrived at the target node (horizontal distance)\n1079\t\thorizontalDist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy)\n1080\t\tif horizontalDist < 0.3 {\n1081\t\t\t// Move to next node\n1082\t\t\twalker.NodeIdx = (walker.NodeIdx + 1) % len(walker.Nodes)\n1083\t\t\treturn\n1084\t\t}\n1085\t\n1086\t\t// Move towards target node\n1087\t\tmoveDist := walker.Speed * dt\n1088\t\tif moveDist > horizontalDist {\n1089\t\t\tmoveDist = horizontalDist\n1090\t\t}\n1091\t\n1092\t\tt := moveDist / horizontalDist\n1093\t\twalker.Position.X += dx * t\n1094\t\twalker.Position.Y += dy * t\n1095\t\n1096\t\t// Update velocity vector\n1097\t\tif horizontalDist > 0 {\n1098\t\t\twalker.Velocity.X = (dx / horizontalDist) * walker.Speed\n1099\t\t\twalker.Velocity.Y = (dy / horizontalDist) * walker.Speed\n1100\t\t\twalker.Velocity.Z = (dz / dist) * walker.Speed\n1101\t\t}\n1102\t\n1103\t\twalker.Position.Z = walker.Height\n1104\t}\n1105\t\n1106\t// sendBLEMessages sends synthetic BLE scan results\n1107\tfunc sendBLEMessages(nodes []*VirtualNode, walkers []*Walker) {\n1108\t\tfor _, node := range nodes {\n1109\t\t\tdevices := make([]map[string]interface{}, 0)\n1110\t\n1111\t\t\tfor _, walker := range walkers {\n1112\t\t\t\tdx := walker.Position.X - node.Position.X\n1113\t\t\t\tdy := walker.Position.Y - node.Position.Y\n1114\t\t\t\tdz := walker.Position.Z - node.Position.Z\n1115\t\t\t\tdist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n1116\t\n1117\t\t\t\trssi := -50.0 - 20.0*math.Log10(dist/1.0)\n1118\t\t\t\tif rssi < -90 {\n1119\t\t\t\t\trssi = -90\n1120\t\t\t\t}\n1121\t\n1122\t\t\t\tdevices = append(devices, map[string]interface{}{\n1123\t\t\t\t\t\"addr\": fmt.Sprintf(\"AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:%02X\", walker.ID),\n1124\t\t\t\t\t\"rssi\": int(rssi),\n1125\t\t\t\t\t\"name\": fmt.Sprintf(\"sim-person-%d\", walker.ID),\n1126\t\t\t\t})\n1127\t\t\t}\n1128\t\n1129\t\t\tif len(devices) == 0 {\n1130\t\t\t\tcontinue\n1131\t\t\t}\n1132\t\n1133\t\t\tbleMsg := map[string]interface{}{\n1134\t\t\t\t\"type\":         \"ble\",\n1135\t\t\t\t\"mac\":          macToString(node.MAC),\n1136\t\t\t\t\"timestamp_ms\": time.Now().UnixMilli(),\n1137\t\t\t\t\"devices\":      devices,\n1138\t\t\t}\n1139\t\n1140\t\t\tbleBytes, err := json.Marshal(bleMsg)\n1141\t\t\tif err != nil {\n1142\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d marshal BLE: %v\", node.ID, err)\n1143\t\t\t\tcontinue\n1144\t\t\t}\n1145\t\n1146\t\t\tnode.mu.Lock()\n1147\t\t\terr = node.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.TextMessage, bleBytes)\n1148\t\t\tnode.mu.Unlock()\n1149\t\n1150\t\t\tif err != nil {\n1151\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d send BLE failed: %v\", node.ID, err)\n1152\t\t\t}\n1153\t\t}\n1154\t}\n1155\t\n1156\t// reportStats periodically prints statistics\n1157\tfunc reportStats(ctx context.Context, stats *Stats) {\n1158\t\tticker := time.NewTicker(10 * time.Second)\n1159\t\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n1160\t\n1161\t\tfor {\n1162\t\t\tselect {\n1163\t\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n1164\t\t\t\treturn\n1165\t\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n1166\t\t\t\tnow := time.Now()\n1167\t\t\t\telapsed := now.Sub(stats.StartTime).Seconds()\n1168\t\t\t\tframesSent := stats.FramesSent.Load()\n1169\t\n1170\t\t\t\tif elapsed > 0 {\n1171\t\t\t\t\tfps := float64(framesSent) / elapsed\n1172\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Stats: frames=%d fps=%.1f elapsed=%.1fs\", framesSent, fps, elapsed)\n1173\t\t\t\t}\n1174\t\t\t}\n1175\t\t}\n1176\t}\n1177\t\n1178\t// printFinalStats prints final simulation statistics\n1179\tfunc printFinalStats(stats *Stats, walkerCount int) {\n1180\t\telapsed := time.Since(stats.StartTime).Seconds()\n1181\t\tframesSent := stats.FramesSent.Load()\n1182\t\n1183\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Final Statistics:\")\n1184\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Frames sent: %d\", framesSent)\n1185\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Duration: %.1f seconds\", elapsed)\n1186\t\tif elapsed > 0 {\n1187\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Average FPS: %.1f\", float64(framesSent)/elapsed)\n1188\t\t}\n1189\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Walkers: %d\", walkerCount)\n1190\t}\n1191\t\n1192\tfunc min(a, b int) int {\n1193\t\tif a < b {\n1194\t\t\treturn a\n1195\t\t}\n1196\t\treturn b\n1197\t}\n1198\t\n1199\t// outputGDOPOverlay computes and outputs GDOP overlay data as JSON\n1200\tfunc outputGDOPOverlay(space *Space, nodes []*VirtualNode, cellSize float64) error {\n1201\t\t// Convert virtual nodes to simulator nodes\n1202\t\tnodeSet := simulator.NewNodeSet()\n1203\t\tfor _, vn := range nodes {\n1204\t\t\tnodeSet.AddVirtualNode(vn.ID, fmt.Sprintf(\"Node %d\", vn.ID), vn.Position)\n1205\t\t}\n1206\t\n1207\t\t// Generate links\n1208\t\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodeSet)\n1209\t\n1210\t\tif len(links) < 2 {\n1211\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"need at least 2 nodes for GDOP computation\")\n1212\t\t}\n1213\t\n1214\t\t// Get space bounds\n1215\t\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n1216\t\n1217\t\t// Create GDOP computer\n1218\t\tconfig := simulator.GridConfig{\n1219\t\t\tMinX:     minX,\n1220\t\t\tMinY:     minY,\n1221\t\t\tWidth:    maxX - minX,\n1222\t\t\tDepth:    maxY - minY,\n1223\t\t\tCellSize: cellSize,\n1224\t\t}\n1225\t\tgdopComp := simulator.NewGDOPComputer(links, config)\n1226\t\n1227\t\t// Compute GDOP for all cells\n1228\t\tresults := gdopComp.ComputeAll()\n1229\t\n1230\t\t// Convert to heatmap data\n1231\t\theatmapData := gdopComp.ToHeatmapData(results)\n1232\t\n1233\t\t// Output JSON\n1234\t\toutput := map[string]interface{}{\n1235\t\t\t\"type\":            \"gdop_overlay\",\n1236\t\t\t\"space_dimensions\": map[string]float64{\n1237\t\t\t\t\"width_m\":  space.Width,\n1238\t\t\t\t\"depth_m\":  space.Depth,\n1239\t\t\t\t\"height_m\": space.Height,\n1240\t\t\t},\n1241\t\t\t\"grid_dimensions\": []int{heatmapData.Width, heatmapData.Depth, 1},\n1242\t\t\t\"cell_size_m\":    cellSize,\n1243\t\t\t\"origin\":         map[string]float64{\"x\": heatmapData.OriginX, \"y\": heatmapData.OriginY},\n1244\t\t\t\"gdop_values\":    heatmapData.GDOPValues,\n1245\t\t\t\"qualities\":      heatmapData.Qualities,\n1246\t\t\t\"colors\":         heatmapData.Colors,\n1247\t\t\t\"accuracy_map\":   heatmapData.AccuracyMap,\n1248\t\t\t\"coverage_score\": gdopComp.CoverageScore(results),\n1249\t\t\t\"average_gdop\":   gdopComp.AverageGDOP(results),\n1250\t\t\t\"quality_counts\": gdopComp.QualityCounts(results),\n1251\t\t\t\"dead_zones\":     gdopComp.FindDeadZones(results),\n1252\t\t\t\"links\":          links,\n1253\t\t\t\"timestamp\":      time.Now().Format(time.RFC3339),\n1254\t\t}\n1255\t\n1256\t\tenc := json.NewEncoder(os.Stdout)\n1257\t\tenc.SetIndent(\"\", \"  \")\n1258\t\treturn enc.Encode(output)\n1259\t}\n1260\t\n1261\t// outputShoppingList generates and outputs the shopping list as JSON\n1262\tfunc outputShoppingList(space *Space, nodes []*VirtualNode) error {\n1263\t\t// Convert virtual nodes to simulator nodes\n1264\t\tnodeSet := simulator.NewNodeSet()\n1265\t\tfor _, vn := String() string { return \"\" }\nfunc (w *wallFlag) Set(value string) error {\n\t// Format: x1,y1,x2,y2[:material]\n\tparts := strings.Split(value, \",\")\n\tif len(parts) < 4 {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"expected x1,y1,x2,y2[:material] format, got: %s\", value)\n\t}\n\tx1, err := strconv.ParseFloat(parts[0], 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid x1: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\ty1, err := strconv.ParseFloat(parts[1], 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid y1: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tx2, err := strconv.ParseFloat(parts[2], 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid x2: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\ty2, err := strconv.ParseFloat(parts[3], 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid y2: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// Parse material (default: drywall)\n\tmaterial := MaterialDrywall\n\tattenuation := 3.0\n\tif len(parts) >= 5 {\n\t\tmaterial = WallMaterial(strings.ToLower(parts[4]))\n\t\tswitch material {\n\t\tcase MaterialMetal:\n\t\t\tattenuation = 20.0\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"unknown material: %s (use: drywall, brick, concrete, glass, metal)\", parts[4])\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\twalls = append(walls, Wall{X1: x1, Y1: y1, X2: x2, Y2: y2, Material: material, Attenuation: attenuation})\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// VirtualNode represents a simulated ESP32 node\ntype VirtualNode struct {\n\tID       int\n\tMAC      [6]byte\n\tPosition Point\n\tRole     string // \"tx\", \"rx\", or \"tx_rx\"\n\tConn     *websocket.Conn\n\tmu       sync.Mutex\n}\n\n// WalkerType defines how a walker moves\ntype WalkerType string\n\nconst (\n\tWalkerTypeRandomWalk  WalkerType = \"random\"\n\tWalkerTypePathFollow  WalkerType = \"path\"\n\tWalkerTypeNodeToNode  WalkerType = \"node-to-node\"\n)\n\n// Walker path-following mode\n\tPathIdx  int        // Current position along path\n\tNodes    []*VirtualNode // For node-to-node mode\n\tNodeIdx  int        // Current target node index\n}\n\n// Point represents a 3D position\ntype Point struct {\n\tX, Y, Z float64\n}\n\n// Space represents the room dimensions\ntype Space struct {\n\tWidth, Depth, Height float64\n}\n\n// WallMaterial defines the type of wall material\ntype WallMaterial string\n\nconst (\n\tMaterialDrywall  WallMaterial = \"drywall\"\n\tMaterialBrick    WallMaterial = \"brick\"\n\tMaterialConcrete WallMaterial = \"concrete\"\n\tMaterialGlass    WallMaterial = \"glass\"\n\tMaterialMetal    WallMaterial = \"metal\"\n)\n\n// Wall represents a wall segment with material properties\ntype Wall struct {\n\tX1, Y1, X2, Y2 float64\n\tMaterial        WallMaterial\n\tAttenuation     float64 // dB loss\n}\n\n// Stats tracks simulation statistics\ntype Stats struct {\n\tFramesSent     atomic.Int64\n\tFramesPerSec   float64\n\tStartTime      time.Time\n\tLastStatsTime  time.Time\n\tLastFramesSent int64\n}\n\nfunc main() {\n\tflag.Var(&wallFlag{}, \"wall\", \"Add a wall as x1,y1,x2,y2 (can be Rate: %d Hz\", *flagRate)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Duration: %d s\", *flagDuration)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Space: %.1fx%.1fx%.1f m\", space.Width, space.Depth, space.Height)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] outputShoppingList(space, nodes); err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Failed to output shopping list: %v\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If only output was requested, exit here\n\tif *flagGDOPOverlay || *flagShoppingList {\n\t\tif !*flagVerify && *flagDuration == 0 {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Output complete (no simulation requested)\")\n\t\t\tos.Exit(0)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Create scenario configuration\n\tscenarioConfig := &ScenarioConfig{\n\t\tType:      ScenarioType(*flagScenario),\n\t\tStartedAt: time.Now(),\n\t\tFallParams: FallScenarioParams{\n\t\t\tTriggerAfter:      *flagFallDelay,\n\t\t\tDescentDuration:   *flagFallDuration,\n\t\t\tStillnessDuration: *flagStillness,\n\t\t\tMinVelocity:       -1.5, // Below -1.5 m/s threshold\n\t\t\tMinZDrop:          0.8,  // At least 0.8m drop\n\t\t\tEndZ:              0.3,  // Floor level\n\t\t},\n\t\tOTAParams: OTAScenarioParams{\n\t\t\tUpdateAfter:      10 * time.Second,\n\t\t\tFirmwareSize:     *flagOTASize,\n\t\t\tNewVersion:       *flagOTAVersion,\n\t\t\tRebootDelay:      3 * time.Second,\n\t\t\tBootFailDuration: 30 * time.Second,\n\t\t\tSimulateFailure:  *flagOTAFailure,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\t// Create context for shutdown\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tdefer cancel()\n\n\t// Handle interrupt signal\n\tsigChan := make(chan os.Signal, 1)\n\tsignal.Notify(sigChan, os.Interrupt)\n\n\t// Open CSV writer if specified\n\tvar csvWriter *CSVWriter\n\tif *flagOutputCSV != \"\" {\n\t\tcsvWriter, err = NewCSVWriter(*flagOutputCSV)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Failed to open CSV file: %v\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tdefer func() { _ = csvWriter.Close() }() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Writing ground truth to %s\", *flagOutputCSV)\n\t}\n\n\t// Start statistics reporter\n\tstats := &Stats{StartTime: time.Now()}\n\tgo reportStats(ctx, stats)\n\n\t// Connect all nodes to mothership\n\tif err := connectNodes(ctx, nodes); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Failed to connect nodes: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\tdefer closeAllNodes(nodes)\n\n\t// Main simulation loop\n\tsimulationComplete := make(chan struct{})\n\tgo runSimulation(ctx, nodes, walkers, space, rng, csvWriter, stats, simulationComplete, scenarioConfig)\n\n\t// Wait for completion or interrupt\n\tvar durationTimer <-chan time.Time\n\tif *flagDuration > 0 {\n\t\tdurationTimer = time.After(time.Duration(*flagDuration) * time.Second)\n\t} else {\n\t\t// Never timeout if duration is 0\n\t\tdurationTimer = make(chan time.Time)\n\t}\n\n\tselect {\n\tcase <-simulationComplete:\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Simulation completed\")\n\tcase <-sigChan:\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Interrupted by user\")\n\t\tcancel()\n\tcase <-durationTimer:\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Duration elapsed\")\n\t\tcancel()\n\t}\n\n\t// Verify blob count if requested\n\tif *flagVerify {\n\t\tif err := verifyBlobs(*flagWalkers, walkers, space); err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Verification FAILED: %v\", err)\n\t\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t\t}\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Verification PASSED\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Print final statistics\n\tprintFinalStats(stats, len(walkers))\n}\n\n// parseSpace parses space dimensions from WxDxH format\nfunc parseSpace(s string) (*Space, error) {\n\tparts := strings.Split(s, \"x\")\n\tif len(parts) != 3 {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"expected WxDxH format, got: %s\", s)\n\t}\n\twidth, err := strconv.ParseFloat(parts[0], 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid width: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tdepth, err := strconv.ParseFloat(parts[1], 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid depth: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\theight, err := strconv.ParseFloat(parts[2], 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid height: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\treturn &Space{Width: width, Depth: depth, Height: height}, nil\n}\n\n// createVirtualNodes creates virtual nodes positioned in the space\nfunc createVirtualNodes(count int, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand) []*VirtualNode {\n\tnodes := make([]*VirtualNode, count)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n\t\tnode := &VirtualNode{\n\t\t\tID:   i,\n\t\t\tMAC:  generateMAC(i),\n\t\t\tRole: \"tx_rx\",\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Distribute nodes around perimeter\n\t\tperimeter := 2*(space.Width+space.Depth)\n\t\tpos := float64(i) / float64(count) * perimeter\n\n\t\tif pos < space.Width {\n\t\t\t// Bottom edge\n\t\t\tnode.Position = Point{X: pos, Y: 0, Z: 2.0}\n\t\t} else if pos < space.Width+space.Depth {\n\t\t\t// Right edge\n\t\t\tnode.Position = Point{X: space.Width, Y: pos - space.Width, Z: 2.0}\n\t\t} else if pos < 2*space.Width+space.Depth {\n\t\t\t// Top edge\n\t\t\tnode.Position = Point{X: space.Width - (pos - space.Width - space.Depth), Y: space.Depth, Z: 2.0}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// Left edge\n\t\t\tnode.Position = Point{X: 0, Y: space.Depth - (pos - 2*space.Width - space.Depth), Z: 2.0}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tnodes[i] = node\n\t}\n\n\treturn nodes\n}\n\n// generateMAC generates a synthetic MAC address for a virtual node\nfunc generateMAC(id int) [6]byte {\n\tvar mac [6]byte\n\tmac[0] = 0xAA\n\tmac[1] = 0xBB\n\tmac[2] = 0xCC\n\tmac[3] = byte((id >> 16) & 0xFF)\n\tmac[4] = byte((id >> 8) & 0xFF)\n\tmac[5] = byte(id & 0xFF)\n\treturn mac\n}\n\n// createWalkers creates synthetic walkers\nfunc createWalkers(count int, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand) []*Walker {\n\twalkerType := WalkerType(*flagWalkerType)\n\n\tif walkerType == WalkerTypePathFollow {\n\t\treturn createPathWalkers(count, space)\n\t}\n\n\tif walkerType == WalkerTypeNodeToNode {\n\t\t// Will be created after nodes are initialized\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Default: random walk\n\twalkers := make([]*Walker, count)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n\t\twalkers[i] = &Walker{\n\t\t\tID:   i,\n\t\t\tType: WalkerTypeRandomWalk,\n\t\t\tPosition: Point{\n\t\t\t\tX: rng.Float64() * space.Width,\n\t\t\t\tY: rng.Float64() * space.Depth,\n\t\t\t\tZ: 1.7,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tVelocity: Point{\n\t\t\t\tX: (rng.Float64() - 0.5) * 0.5,\n\t\t\t\tY: (rng.Float64() - 0.5) * 0.5,\n\t\t\t\tZ: 0,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tSpeed:  0.8 + rng.Float64()*0.4,\n\t\t\tHeight: 1.7,\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn walkers\n}\n\n// createPathWalkers creates walkers that follow predefined paths\nfunc createPathWalkers(count int, space *Space) []*Walker {\n\tif *flagPathFile == \"\" {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Path-following mode requires --path-file, using default rectangular path\")\n\t\treturn createDefaultPathWalkers(count, space)\n\t}\n\n\t// Load paths from JSON file\n\tpaths, err := loadPathsFromFile(*flagPathFile)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Failed to load paths from %s: %v\", *flagPathFile, err)\n\t}\n\n\twalkers := make([]*Walker, count)\n\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n\t\t// Use path modulo count to allow fewer paths than walkers\n\t\tpathIdx := i % len(paths)\n\t\twalkers[i] = &Walker{\n\t\t\tID:      i,\n\t\t\tType:    WalkerTypePathFollow,\n\t\t\tPath:    paths[pathIdx],\n\t\t\tPathIdx: 0,\n\t\t\tSpeed:   1.0,\n\t\t\tHeight:  1.7,\n\t\t}\n\t\tif len(paths[pathIdx]) > 0 {\n\t\t\twalkers[i].Position = paths[pathIdx][0]\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn walkers\n}\n\n// createDefaultPathWalkers creates walkers following a default rectangular perimeter path\nfunc createDefaultPathWalkers(count int, space *Space) []*Walker {\n\tmargin := 0.5\n\tpath := []Point{\n\t\t{X: margin, Y: margin, Z: 1.7},\n\t\t{X: space.Width - margin, Y: margin, Z: 1.7},\n\t\t{X: space.Width - margin, Y: space.Depth - margin, Z: 1.7},\n\t\t{X: margin, Y: space.Depth - margin, Z: 1.7},\n\t}\n\n\twalkers := make([]*Walker, count)\n\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n\t\tstartIdx := (i * len(path) / count) % len(path)\n\t\twalkers[i] = &Walker{\n\t\t\tID:      i,\n\t\t\tType:    WalkerTypePathFollow,\n\t\t\tPath:    path,\n\t\t\tPathIdx: startIdx,\n\t\t\tSpeed:   0.8 + 0.4*float64(i)/float64(count),\n\t\t\tHeight:  1.7,\n\t\t}\n\t\tif len(path) > 0 {\n\t\t\twalkers[i].Position = path[startIdx]\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn walkers\n}\n\n// createNodeToNodeWalkers creates walkers that traverse between virtual nodes\nfunc createNodeToNodeWalkers(count int, nodes []*VirtualNode) []*Walker {\n\tif len(nodes) < 2 {\n\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Node-to-node mode requires at least 2 nodes\")\n\t}\n\n\twalkers := make([]*Walker, count)\n\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n\t\twalkers[i] = &Walker{\n\t\t\tID:      i,\n\t\t\tType:    WalkerTypeNodeToNode,\n\t\t\tNodes:   nodes,\n\t\t\tNodeIdx: 1, // Target is second node\n\t\t\tSpeed:   1.0,\n\t\t\tHeight:  1.7,\n\t\t}\n\t\t// Start at first node\n\t\tif len(nodes) > 0 {\n\t\t\twalkers[i].Position = nodes[0].Position\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn walkers\n}\n\n// PathDefinition defines a walker path in JSON format\ntype PathDefinition struct {\n\tWaypoints []Point `json:\"waypoints\"` // Ordered list of points to visit\n}\n\n// loadPathsFromFile loads walker paths from a JSON file\nfunc loadPathsFromFile(filename string) ([][]Point, error) {\n\tdata, err := os.ReadFile(filename)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar paths []PathDefinition\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal(data, &paths); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tif len(paths) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"no paths defined in file\")\n\t}\n\n\tresult := make([][]Point, len(paths))\n\tfor i, pathDef := range paths {\n\t\tif len(pathDef.Waypoints) == 0 {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"path %d has no waypoints\", i)\n\t\t}\n\t\tresult[i] = pathDef.Waypoints\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Loaded %d paths from %s\", len(result), filename)\n\treturn result, nil\n}\n\n// connectNodes connects all virtual nodes to the mothership.\n// Each node gets its own persistent connection with background goroutines\n// for ping, health, and message reading.\nfunc connectNodes(ctx context.Context, nodes []*VirtualNode) error {\n\t// Get or generate token\n\ttoken := *flagToken\n\tif token == \"\" {\n\t\tvar err error\n\t\ttoken, err = provisionToken()\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to provision token: %w\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Auto-provisioned token: %s...\", token[:min(16, len(token))])\n\t}\n\n\t// Parse mothership URL\n\twsURL, err := url.Parse(*flagMothership)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid mothership URL: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// Convert http(s) to ws(s)\n\tif wsURL.Scheme == \"http\" {\n\t\twsURL.Scheme = \"ws\"\n\t} else if wsURL.Scheme == \"https\" {\n\t\twsURL.Scheme = \"wss\"\n\t}\n\n\terrChan := make(chan error, len(nodes))\n\n\tfor _, node := range nodes {\n\t\t// Add node WS path if needed\n\t\tnodeURL := wsURL.String()\n\t\tif !strings.Contains(nodeURL, \"/ws/\") && !strings.HasSuffix(nodeURL, \"/ws\") {\n\t\t\tif strings.HasSuffix(nodeURL, \"/\") {\n\t\t\t\tnodeURL = nodeURL + \"ws\"\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tnodeURL = nodeURL + \"/ws\"\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\theaders := http.Header{}\n\t\theaders.Set(\"X-Spaxel-Token\", token)\n\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d connecting to %s\", node.ID, nodeURL)\n\n\t\tconn, resp, err := websocket.DefaultDialer.DialContext(ctx, nodeURL, headers)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tif resp != nil {\n\t\t\t\tbody, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)\n\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d dial failed: %w (status %d: %s)\", node.ID, err, resp.StatusCode, string(body))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d dial failed: %w\", node.ID, err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tnode.Conn = conn\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d connected\", node.ID)\n\n\t\t// Send hello message\n\t\thello := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\"type\":             \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\"mac\":              macToString(node.MAC),\n\t\t\t\"firmware_version\": \"sim-1.0.0\",\n\t\t\t\"capabilities\":     []string{\"csi\", \"tx\", \"rx\"},\n\t\t\t\"chip\":             \"ESP32-S3\",\n\t\t\t\"flash_mb\":         16,\n\t\t\t\"uptime_ms\":        1000,\n\t\t\t\"wifi_rssi\":        -45,\n\t\t\t\"ip\":               fmt.Sprintf(\"127.0.0.%d\", node.ID+2),\n\t\t}\n\n\t\thelloBytes, err := json.Marshal(hello)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d marshal hello: %w\", node.ID, err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tnode.mu.Lock()\n\t\terr = conn.WriteMessage(websocket.TextMessage, helloBytes)\n\t\tnode.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d send hello: %w\", node.ID, err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Wait for role assignment\n\t\tconn.SetReadDeadline(time.Now().Add(10 * time.Second)) //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t_, message, err := conn.ReadMessage()\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d read role: %w\", node.ID, err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar roleMsg map[string]interface{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal(message, &roleMsg); err != nil {\n\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d parse role: %w\", node.ID, err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif roleMsg[\"type\"] == \"reject\" {\n\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d rejected: %v\", node.ID, roleMsg[\"reason\"])\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d received role: %v\", node.ID, roleMsg[\"role\"])\n\n\t\t// Start background goroutines for this connection\n\t\tstartTime := time.Now()\n\t\tgo node.pingLoop(ctx)\n\t\tgo node.healthLoop(ctx, startTime)\n\t\tgo node.readLoop(ctx, errChan)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// provisionToken provisions a token. Tries the mothership API first,\n// falls back to a synthetic HMAC token.\nfunc provisionToken() (string, error) {\n\t// Parse mothership URL to get HTTP endpoint\n\twsURL, err := url.Parse(*flagMothership)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", fmt.Errorf(\"invalid mothership URL: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\thttpURL := *wsURL\n\tif httpURL.Scheme == \"ws\" {\n\t\thttpURL.Scheme = \"http\"\n\t} else if httpURL.Scheme == \"wss\" {\n\t\thttpURL.Scheme = \"https\"\n\t}\n\n\t// Trim /ws suffix to get base URL\n\tbaseURL := strings.TrimSuffix(httpURL.String(), \"/ws\")\n\tbaseURL = strings.TrimSuffix(baseURL, \"/\")\n\tprovisionURL := baseURL + \"/api/provision\"\n\n\t// Try POST /api/provision with synthetic credentials\n\tbody := strings.NewReader(`{\"mac\":\"AA:BB:CC:00:00:00\"}`)\n\tresp, err := http.Post(provisionURL, \"application/json\", body)\n\tif err == nil && resp.StatusCode == http.StatusOK {\n\t\tvar result map[string]interface{}\n\t\tif json.NewDecoder(resp.Body).Decode(&result) == nil {\n\t\t\t_ = resp.Body.Close()\n\t\t\tif token, ok := result[\"node_token\"].(string); ok && token != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\treturn token, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif resp != nil {\n\t\t_ = resp.Body.Close()\n\t}\n\n\t// Fallback: generate synthetic token\n\th := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(\"sim-install-secret\"))\n\th.Write([]byte(\"sim-node\"))\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%064x\", h.Sum(nil)), nil\n}\n\n// closeAllNodes closes all node WebSocket connections\nfunc closeAllNodes(nodes []*VirtualNode) {\n\tfor _, node := range nodes {\n\t\tif node.Conn != nil {\n\t\t\tnode.mu.Lock()\n\t\t\tnode.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.CloseMessage, //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t\t\twebsocket.FormatCloseMessage(websocket.CloseNormalClosure, \"sim shutdown\"))\n\t\t\tnode.Conn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t\tnode.mu.Unlock()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// macToString converts a 6-byte MAC to colon-separated hex\nfunc macToString(mac [6]byte) string {\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%02X:%02X:%02X:%02X:%02X:%02X\",\n\t\tmac[0], mac[1], mac[2], mac[3], mac[4], mac[5])\n}\n\n// pingLoop sends WebSocket pings\nfunc (n *VirtualNode) pingLoop(ctx context.Context) {\n\tticker := time.NewTicker(30 * time.Second)\n\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n\n\tfor {\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n\t\t\tn.mu.Lock()\n\t\t\terr := n.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.PingMessage, nil)\n\t\t\tn.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d ping failed: %v\", n.ID, err)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// healthLoop sends periodic health messages\nfunc (n *VirtualNode) healthLoop(ctx context.Context, startTime time.Time) {\n\tticker := time.NewTicker(10 * time.Second)\n\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n\n\tfor {\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n\t\t\thealth := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\"type\":            \"health\",\n\t\t\t\t\"mac\":             macToString(n.MAC),\n\t\t\t\t\"timestamp_ms\":    time.Now().UnixMilli(),\n\t\t\t\t\"free_heap_bytes\": 200000,\n\t\t\t\t\"wifi_rssi_dbm\":   -45,\n\t\t\t\t\"uptime_ms\":       time.Since(startTime).Milliseconds(),\n\t\t\t\t\"csi_rate_hz\":     *flagRate,\n\t\t\t\t\"wifi_channel\":    *flagChannel,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\thealthBytes, err := json.Marshal(health)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d marshal health: %v\", n.ID, err)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tn.mu.Lock()\n\t\t\terr = n.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.TextMessage, healthBytes)\n\t\t\tn.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d send health failed: %v\", n.ID, err)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// readLoop reads downstream messages from the WebSocket\nfunc (n *VirtualNode) readLoop(ctx context.Context, errChan chan<- error) {\n\tfor {\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tn.mu.Lock()\n\t\tconn := n.Conn\n\t\tn.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t\tif conn == nil {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tconn.SetReadDeadline(time.Now().Add(60 * time.Second)) //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t_, message, err := conn.ReadMessage()\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tselect {\n\t\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif websocket.IsCloseError(err) {\n\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d connection closed\", n.ID)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d read error: %v\", n.ID, err)\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar msg map[string]interface{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal(message, &msg); err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmsgType, ok := msg[\"type\"].(string)\n\t\tif !ok {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch msgType {\n\t\tcase \"role\":\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d role update: %v\", n.ID, msg[\"role\"])\n\t\tcase \"config\":\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d config update: %v\", n.ID, msg)\n\t\tcase \"reject\":\n\t\t\terrChan <- fmt.Errorf(\"node %d rejected: %v\", n.ID, msg[\"reason\"])\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\tcase \"shutdown\":\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d received shutdown\", n.ID)\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// runSimulation runs the main CSI generation loop\nfunc runSimulation(ctx context.Context, nodes []*VirtualNode, walkers []*Walker, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand, csvWriter *CSVWriter, stats *Stats, done chan<- struct{}, scenario *ScenarioConfig) {\n\tdefer close(done)\n\n\tticker := time.NewTicker(time.Duration(1000/(*flagRate)) * time.Millisecond)\n\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n\n\tframeNum := 0\n\tlastBLETime := time.Now()\n\n\t// Initialize fall scenario state\n\tvar fallState *FallScenarioState\n\tif scenario.Type == ScenarioFall || scenario.Type == ScenarioBagOnCouch {\n\t\tif len(walkers) > 0 {\n\t\t\tfallState = &FallScenarioState{\n\t\t\t\tWalker: walkers[0],\n\t\t\t\tState:  \"walking\",\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif scenario.Type == ScenarioBagOnCouch {\n\t\t\t\t// For bag-on-couch, start with a lower position\n\t\t\t\twalkers[0].Position.Z = 1.0\n\t\t\t\twalkers[0].Velocity.Z = -0.2 // Slow descent\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Track scenario timing\n\tscenarioStarted := false\n\n\tfor {\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n\t\t\t// Handle fall scenario timing\n\t\t\tif fallState != nil && !scenarioStarted && time.Since(scenario.StartedAt) >= scenario.FallParams.TriggerAfter {\n\t\t\t\tif scenario.Type == ScenarioFall {\n\t\t\t\t\tfallState.StartFall(scenario.FallParams)\n\t\t\t\t\tscenarioStarted = true\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Update walker positions\n\t\t\tif fallState != nil {\n\t\t\t\tdt := 1.0 / float64(*flagRate)\n\t\t\t\tfallState.UpdateForFallScenario(dt, scenario.FallParams, space, rng)\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tupdateWalkers(walkers, space, rng)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Write to CSV\n\t\t\tif csvWriter != nil {\n\t\t\t\tcsvWriter.WriteRow(walkers, nodes, walls)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Send CSI frames for each node pair\n\t\t\tfor _, txNode := range nodes {\n\t\t\t\tfor _, rxNode := range nodes {\n\t\t\t\t\tif txNode.ID == rxNode.ID {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tframe := generateCSIFrame(txNode, rxNode, walkers, walls, frameNum, rng)\n\n\t\t\t\t\ttxNode.mu.Lock()\n\t\t\t\t\terr := txNode.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.BinaryMessage, frame)\n\t\t\t\t\ttxNode.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d send CSI failed: %v\", txNode.ID, err)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tstats.FramesSent.Add(1)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Send BLE messages if enabled\n\t\t\tif *flagBLE && time.Since(lastBLETime) > 5*time.Second {\n\t\t\t\tsendBLEMessages(nodes, walkers)\n\t\t\t\tlastBLETime = time.Now()\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tframeNum++\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// updateWalkers updates walker positions based on their movement type\nfunc updateWalkers(walkers []*Walker, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand) {\n\tdt := 1.0 / float64(*flagRate)\n\n\tfor _, walker := range walkers {\n\t\tswitch walker.Type {\n\t\tcase WalkerTypePathFollow:\n\t\t\tupdatePathWalker(walker, dt)\n\t\tcase WalkerTypeNodeToNode:\n\t\t\tupdateNodeToNodeWalker(walker, dt, space)\n\t\tcase WalkerTypeRandomWalk:\n\t\t\tupdateRandomWalker(walker, dt, space, rng)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// updateRandomWalker implements random walk motion\nfunc updateRandomWalker(walker *Walker, dt float64, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand) {\n\twalker.Position.X += walker.Velocity.X * dt\n\twalker.Position.Y += walker.Velocity.Y * dt\n\n\t// Bounce off walls\n\tmargin := 0.2\n\tif walker.Position.X < margin {\n\t\twalker.Position.X = margin\n\t\twalker.Velocity.X *= -1\n\t}\n\tif walker.Position.X > space.Width-margin {\n\t\twalker.Position.X = space.Width - margin\n\t\twalker.Velocity.X *= -1\n\t}\n\tif walker.Position.Y < margin {\n\t\twalker.Position.Y = margin\n\t\twalker.Velocity.Y *= -1\n\t}\n\tif walker.Position.Y > space.Depth-margin {\n\t\twalker.Position.Y = space.Depth - margin\n\t\twalker.Velocity.Y *= -1\n\t}\n\n\t// Random velocity perturbation\n\tperturbation := 0.1\n\twalker.Velocity.X += (rng.Float64() - 0.5) * perturbation\n\twalker.Velocity.Y += (rng.Float64() - 0.5) * perturbation\n\n\t// Clamp velocity\n\tspeed := walker.Speed * (0.5 + rng.Float64()*0.5)\n\tcurrentSpeed := math.Sqrt(walker.Velocity.X*walker.Velocity.X + walker.Velocity.Y*walker.Velocity.Y)\n\tif currentSpeed > 0 {\n\t\twalker.Velocity.X = (walker.Velocity.X / currentSpeed) * speed\n\t\twalker.Velocity.Y = (walker.Velocity.Y / currentSpeed) * speed\n\t}\n\n\twalker.Position.Z = walker.Height\n}\n\n// updatePathWalker implements path-following motion\nfunc updatePathWalker(walker *Walker, dt float64) {\n\tif len(walker.Path) == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\ttarget := walker.Path[walker.PathIdx]\n\tdx := target.X - walker.Position.X\n\tdy := target.Y - walker.Position.Y\n\tdz := target.Z - walker.Position.Z\n\tdist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n\n\t// If very close to target, move to next waypoint\n\tif dist < 0.1 {\n\t\twalker.PathIdx = (walker.PathIdx + 1) % len(walker.Path)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Move towards target at constant speed\n\tmoveDist := walker.Speed * dt\n\tif moveDist > dist {\n\t\tmoveDist = dist\n\t}\n\n\tt := moveDist / dist\n\twalker.Position.X += dx * t\n\twalker.Position.Y += dy * t\n\n\t// Update velocity vector for consistency\n\tif dist > 0 {\n\t\twalker.Velocity.X = (dx / dist) * walker.Speed\n\t\twalker.Velocity.Y = (dy / dist) * walker.Speed\n\t\twalker.Velocity.Z = (dz / dist) * walker.Speed\n\t}\n}\n\n// updateNodeToNodeWalker implements traversal between virtual nodes\nfunc updateNodeToNodeWalker(walker *Walker, dt float64, space *Space) {\n\tif len(walker.Nodes) < 2 {\n\t\tupdateRandomWalker(walker, dt, space, rand.New(rand.NewSource(time.Now().UnixNano())))\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\ttargetNode := walker.Nodes[walker.NodeIdx]\n\ttargetPos := targetNode.Position\n\n\tdx := targetPos.X - walker.Position.X\n\tdy := targetPos.Y - walker.Position.Y\n\tdz := targetPos.Z - walker.Position.Z\n\tdist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n\n\t// Check if we've arrived at the target node (horizontal distance)\n\thorizontalDist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy)\n\tif horizontalDist < 0.3 {\n\t\t// Move to next node\n\t\twalker.NodeIdx = (walker.NodeIdx + 1) % len(walker.Nodes)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Move towards target node\n\tmoveDist := walker.Speed * dt\n\tif moveDist > horizontalDist {\n\t\tmoveDist = horizontalDist\n\t}\n\n\tt := moveDist / horizontalDist\n\twalker.Position.X += dx * t\n\twalker.Position.Y += dy * t\n\n\t// Update velocity vector\n\tif horizontalDist > 0 {\n\t\twalker.Velocity.X = (dx / horizontalDist) * walker.Speed\n\t\twalker.Velocity.Y = (dy / horizontalDist) * walker.Speed\n\t\twalker.Velocity.Z = (dz / dist) * walker.Speed\n\t}\n\n\twalker.Position.Z = walker.Height\n}\n\n// sendBLEMessages sends synthetic BLE scan results\nfunc sendBLEMessages(nodes []*VirtualNode, walkers []*Walker) {\n\tfor _, node := range nodes {\n\t\tdevices := make([]map[string]interface{}, 0)\n\n\t\tfor _, walker := range walkers {\n\t\t\tdx := walker.Position.X - node.Position.X\n\t\t\tdy := walker.Position.Y - node.Position.Y\n\t\t\tdz := walker.Position.Z - node.Position.Z\n\t\t\tdist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n\n\t\t\trssi := -50.0 - 20.0*math.Log10(dist/1.0)\n\t\t\tif rssi < -90 {\n\t\t\t\trssi = -90\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tdevices = append(devices, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\"addr\": fmt.Sprintf(\"AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:%02X\", walker.ID),\n\t\t\t\t\"rssi\": int(rssi),\n\t\t\t\t\"name\": fmt.Sprintf(\"sim-person-%d\", walker.ID),\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif len(devices) == 0 {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tbleMsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\"type\":         \"ble\",\n\t\t\t\"mac\":          macToString(node.MAC),\n\t\t\t\"timestamp_ms\": time.Now().UnixMilli(),\n\t\t\t\"devices\":      devices,\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tbleBytes, err := json.Marshal(bleMsg)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d marshal BLE: %v\", node.ID, err)\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tnode.mu.Lock()\n\t\terr = node.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.TextMessage, bleBytes)\n\t\tnode.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d send BLE failed: %v\", node.ID, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// reportStats periodically prints statistics\nfunc reportStats(ctx context.Context, stats *Stats) {\n\tticker := time.NewTicker(10 * time.Second)\n\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n\n\tfor {\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n\t\t\tnow := time.Now()\n\t\t\telapsed := now.Sub(stats.StartTime).Seconds()\n\t\t\tframesSent := stats.FramesSent.Load()\n\n\t\t\tif elapsed > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tfps := float64(framesSent) / elapsed\n\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Stats: frames=%d fps=%.1f elapsed=%.1fs\", framesSent, fps, elapsed)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// printFinalStats prints final simulation statistics\nfunc printFinalStats(stats *Stats, walkerCount int) {\n\telapsed := time.Since(stats.StartTime).Seconds()\n\tframesSent := stats.FramesSent.Load()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Final Statistics:\")\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Frames sent: %d\", framesSent)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Duration: %.1f seconds\", elapsed)\n\tif elapsed > 0 {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Average FPS: %.1f\", float64(framesSent)/elapsed)\n\t}\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Walkers: %d\", walkerCount)\n}\n\nfunc min(a, b int) int {\n\tif a < b {\n\t\treturn a\n\t}\n\treturn b\n}\n\n// outputGDOPOverlay computes and outputs GDOP overlay data as JSON\nfunc outputGDOPOverlay(space *Space, nodes []*VirtualNode, cellSize float64) error {\n\t// Convert virtual nodes to simulator nodes\n\tnodeSet := simulator.NewNodeSet()\n\tfor _, vn := range nodes {\n\t\tnodeSet.AddVirtualNode(vn.ID, fmt.Sprintf(\"Node %d\", vn.ID), vn.Position)\n\t}\n\n\t// Generate links\n\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodeSet)\n\n\tif len(links) < 2 {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"need at least 2 nodes for GDOP computation\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Get space bounds\n\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n\n\t// Create GDOP computer\n\tconfig := simulator.GridConfig{\n\t\tMinX:     minX,\n\t\tMinY:     minY,\n\t\tWidth:    maxX - minX,\n\t\tDepth:    maxY - minY,\n\t\tCellSize: cellSize,\n\t}\n\tgdopComp := simulator.NewGDOPComputer(links, config)\n\n\t// Compute GDOP for all cells\n\tresults := gdopComp.ComputeAll()\n\n\t// Convert to heatmap data\n\theatmapData := gdopComp.ToHeatmapData(results)\n\n\t// Output JSON\n\toutput := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":            \"gdop_overlay\",\n\t\t\"space_dimensions\": map[string]float64{\n\t\t\t\"width_m\":  space.Width,\n\t\t\t\"depth_m\":  space.Depth,\n\t\t\t\"height_m\": space.Height,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"grid_dimensions\": []int{heatmapData.Width, heatmapData.Depth, 1},\n\t\t\"cell_size_m\":    cellSize,\n\t\t\"origin\":         map[string]float64{\"x\": heatmapData.OriginX, \"y\": heatmapData.OriginY},\n\t\t\"gdop_values\":    heatmapData.GDOPValues,\n\t\t\"qualities\":      heatmapData.Qualities,\n\t\t\"colors\":         heatmapData.Colors,\n\t\t\"accuracy_map\":   heatmapData.AccuracyMap,\n\t\t\"coverage_score\": gdopComp.CoverageScore(results),\n\t\t\"average_gdop\":   gdopComp.AverageGDOP(results),\n\t\t\"quality_counts\": gdopComp.QualityCounts(results),\n\t\t\"dead_zones\":     gdopComp.FindDeadZones(results),\n\t\t\"links\":          links,\n\t\t\"timestamp\":      time.Now().Format(time.RFC3339),\n\t}\n\n\tenc := json.NewEncoder(os.Stdout)\n\tenc.SetIndent(\"\", \"  \")\n\treturn enc.Encode(output)\n}\n\n// outputShoppingList generates and outputs the shopping list as JSON\nfunc outputShoppingList(space *Space, nodes []*VirtualNode) error {\n\t// Convert virtual nodes to simulator nodes\n\tnodeSet := simulator.NewNodeSet()\n\tfor _, vn := range nodes {\n\t\tnodeSet.AddVirtualNode(vn.ID, fmt.Sprintf(\"Node %d\", vn.ID), vn.Position)\n\t}\n\n\t// Generate basic coverage info (no walkers for static shopping list)\n\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodeSet)\n\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n\n\tgdopComp := simulator.NewGDOPComputer(links, simulator.GridConfig{\n\t\tMinX:     minX,\n\t\tMinY:     minY,\n\t\tWidth:    maxX - minX,\n\t\tDepth:    maxY - minY,\n\t\tCellSize: 0.2,\n\t})\n\tresults := gdopComp.ComputeAll()\n\tcoverageScore := gdopComp.CoverageScore(results)\n\n\t// Create accuracy report (default values since no simulation run)\n\taccuracy := simulator.AccuracyReport{\n\t\tMedianError: 1.0,\n\t\tMeanError:   1.2,\n\t\tMaxError:    2.5,\n\t\tP95Error:    2.0,\n\t}\n\n\t// Generate shopping list\n\tshoppingList := simulator.GenerateShoppingListFromResults(space, nodeSet, coverageScore, accuracy)\n\n\t// Output JSON\n\toutput := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":     \"shopping_list\",\n\t\t\"list\":     shoppingList,\n\t\t\"timestamp\": time.Now().Format(time.RFC3339),\n\t\t\"note\":     \"This is a pre-deployment estimate. Actual accuracy may vary based on environment.\",\n\t}\n\n\tenc := json.NewEncoder(os.Stdout)\n\tenc.SetIndent(\"\", \"  \")\n\treturn enc.Encode(output)\n}\n","numLines":1306,"startLine":1,"totalLines":1306}}}

request body is empty/invalid\n122\t\t\treq.Space = simulator.DefaultSpace()\n123\t\t}\n124\t\n125\t\tif req.Space == nil {\n126\t\t\treq.Space = simulator.DefaultSpace()\n127\t\t}\n128\t\n129\t\t//
