Package simulator provides shared physics functions for CSI simulation.\n// This package is used by both the pre-deployment simulator and the CSI CLI simulator.\npackage simulator\n\nimport (\n\t\"math\"\n\t\"math/rand\"\n)\n\n// PhysicsModel provides physics calculations for CSI simulation\ntype PhysicsModel struct {\n\tspace        *Space\n\tnoiseSigma   float64 // Gaussian noise standard deviation for I/Q\n\twalls        []WallDefinition\n}\n\n// WallDefinition defines a wall segment for attenuation calculations\ntype WallDefinition struct {\n\tX1, Y1, X2, Y2 float64 // Wall endpoints (floor coordinates)\n\tAttenuation     float64 // dB attenuation\n}\n\n// NewPhysicsModel creates a new physics model for the given space\nfunc NewPhysicsModel(space *Space) *PhysicsModel {\n\treturn &PhysicsModel{\n\t\tspace:      space,\n\t\tnoiseSigma: 0.005, // Default noise level\n\t\twalls:      make([]WallDefinition, 0),\n\t}\n}\n\n// SetNoiseSigma sets the Gaussian noise standard deviation\nfunc (pm *PhysicsModel) SetNoiseSigma(sigma float64) {\n\tpm.noiseSigma = sigma\n}\n\n// AddWall adds a wall definition to the physics model\nfunc (pm *PhysicsModel) AddWall(x1, y1, x2, y2, attenuation float64) {\n\tpm.walls = append(pm.walls, WallDefinition{\n\t\tX1:          x1,\n\t\tY1:          y1,\n\t\tX2:          x2,\n\t\tY2:          y2,\n\t\tAttenuation: attenuation,\n\t})\n}\n\n// PathLossdB computes path loss in dB using log-distance model\n// PL(d) = PL_0 + 10*n*log10(d/d_0)\n// where PL_0 = 40 dB at d_0 = 1m, n = 2.0 (free space)\nfunc (pm *PhysicsModel) PathLossdB(distance float64) float64 {\n\tconst PL0 = 40.0 // dB at 1m reference\n\tconst d0 = 1.0   // reference distance in meters\n\tconst n = 2.0    // path loss exponent (free space)\n\n\tif distance < 0.01 {\n\t\tdistance = 0.01 // Avoid log(0)\n\t}\n\n\treturn PL0 + 10*n*math.Log10(distance/d0)\n}\n\n// WallAttenuation computes total wall attenuation for a path\nfunc (pm *PhysicsModel) WallAttenuation(from, to Point) float64 {\n\ttotalLoss := 0.0\n\n\tfor _, wall := range pm.walls {\n\t\tif pm.pathIntersectsWall(from.X, from.Y, to.X, to.Y,\n\t\t\twall.X1, wall.Y1, wall.X2, wall.Y2) {\n\t\t\ttotalLoss += wall.Attenuation\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn totalLoss\n}\n\n// pathIntersectsWall checks if a path intersects a wall segment (2D)\nfunc (pm *PhysicsModel) pathIntersectsWall(x1, y1, x2, y2, wx1, wy1, wx2, wy2 float64) bool {\n\t// Compute orientations\n\tccw := func(ax, ay, bx, by, cx, cy float64) float64 {\n\t\treturn (bx-ax)*(cy-ay) - (by-ay)*(cx-ax)\n\t}\n\n\to1 := ccw(x1, y1, x2, y2, wx1, wy1)\n\to2 := ccw(x1, y1, x2, y2, wx2, wy2)\n\to3 := ccw(wx1, wy1, wx2, wy2, x1, y1)\n\to4 := ccw(wx1, wy1, wx2, wy2, x2, y2)\n\n\t// Check for intersection\n\treturn o1*o2 < 0 && o3*o4 < 0\n}\n\n// ComputeRSSI computes the RSSI in dBm for a given distance\n// Returns RSSI in range [-90, -30] dBm\nfunc (pm *PhysicsModel) ComputeRSSI(distance float64) int8 {\n\tpathLoss := pm.PathLossdB(distance)\n\ttxPower := -30.0 // Reference transmit power in dBm\n\n\trssi := txPower - pathLoss\n\n\t// Clamp to realistic range\n\tif rssi < -90 {\n\t\trssi = -90\n\t}\n\tif rssi > -30 {\n\t\trssi = -30\n\t}\n\n\treturn int8(rssi)\n}\n\n// DeltaRMS computes the expected deltaRMS motion score\n// when a walker is at the given position (vs empty room)\nfunc (pm *PhysicsModel) DeltaRMS(tx, rx, walker Point) float64 {\n\t// Calculate Fresnel zone number\n\tzone := FresnelZoneNumber(tx, rx, walker)\n\n\t// DeltaRMS is highest in zone 1, decreases with zone number\n\t// Zone 1: 0.15, Zone 2: 0.08, Zone 3: 0.04, Zone 4: 0.02, Zone 5+: 0.01\n\tswitch zone {\n\tcase 1:\n\t\treturn 0.15\n\tcase 2:\n\t\treturn 0.08\n\tcase 3:\n\t\treturn 0.04\n\tcase 4:\n\t\treturn 0.02\n\tdefault:\n\t\treturn 0.01\n\t}\n}\n\n// GenerateIQPair generates a synthetic I/Q pair for a subcarrier\n// with amplitude and phase, plus Gaussian noise\nfunc (pm *PhysicsModel) GenerateIQPair(amplitude, phase float64) (int8, int8) {\n\t// Generate Gaussian noise using Box-Muller transform\n\tu1 := rand.Float64()\n\tu2 := rand.Float64()\n\tz0 := math.Sqrt(-2.0*math.Log(u1)) * math.Cos(2.0*math.Pi*u2)\n\tz1 := math.Sqrt(-2.0*math.Log(u1)) * math.Sin(2.0*math.Pi*u2)\n\n\tnoiseI := z0 * pm.noiseSigma\n\tnoiseQ := z1 * pm.noiseSigma\n\n\t// Convert to I/Q\n\ti := amplitude*math.Cos(phase) + noiseI\n\tq := amplitude*math.Sin(phase) + noiseQ\n\n\t// Clamp to int8 range [-127, 127]\n\t// Note: We avoid -128 to prevent overflow issues\n\tif i > 127 {\n\t\ti = 127\n\t}\n\tif i < -127 {\n\t\ti = -127\n\t}\n\tif q > 127 {\n\t\tq = 127\n\t}\n\tif q < -127 {\n\t\tq = -127\n\t}\n\n\treturn int8(i), int8(q)\n}\n\n// GenerateSubcarrierCSI generates CSI data for all subcarriers\nfunc (pm *PhysicsModel) GenerateSubcarrierCSI(tx, rx, walker Point, nSub int, frameNum int) []struct{ I, Q int8 } {\n\tresult := make([]struct{ I, Q int8 }, nSub)\n\n\t// Base amplitude from deltaRMS\n\tdeltaRMS := pm.DeltaRMS(tx, rx, walker)\n\tamplitude := deltaRMS * 500.0 // Scale to reasonable I/Q range\n\n\tfor k := 0; k < nSub; k++ {\n\t\t// Compute phase at this subcarrier\n\t\tphase := pm.PhaseAtSubcarrier(tx, rx, walker, k, frameNum)\n\n\t\t// Add subcarrier-dependent amplitude variation\n\t\t// Simulates frequency-selective fading\n\t\tfreqFading := 0.8 + 0.4*math.Sin(2*math.Pi*float64(k)/16.0)\n\t\tsubAmplitude := amplitude * freqFading\n\n\t\tresult[k].I, result[k].Q = pm.GenerateIQPair(subAmplitude, phase)\n\t}\n\n\treturn result\n}\n\n// PhaseAtSubcarrier computes phase for a given subcarrier index\nfunc (pm *PhysicsModel) PhaseAtSubcarrier(tx, rx, walker Point, subcarrierIndex, frameNum int) float64 {\n\t// Total path length (TX -> walker -> RX)\n\td1 := tx.Distance(walker)\n\td2 := walker.Distance(rx)\n\ttotalDist := d1 + d2\n\n\t// Phase = 2π × k × Δf × (d / c) + temporal_variation\n\tphase := 2*math.Pi*float64(subcarrierIndex)*SubcarrierSpacing*(totalDist/C)\n\n\t// Add small temporal variation for realism\n\ttemporalPhase := 0.1 * math.Sin(2*math.Pi*float64(frameNum)/100.0)\n\tphase += temporalPhase\n\n\t// Normalize to [-π, π]\n\tfor phase > math.Pi {\n\t\tphase -= 2 * math.Pi\n\t}\n\tfor phase < -math.Pi {\n\t\tphase += 2 * math.Pi\n\t}\n\n\treturn phase\n}\n\n// ValidateRSSI validates that RSSI is within expected range for distance\nfunc ValidateRSSI(rssi int8, distance float64) bool {\n\t// Expected RSSI range for given distance\n\texpectedPathLoss := 40.0 + 20.0*math.Log10(distance/1.0)\n\texpectedRSSI := -30.0 - expectedPathLoss\n\n\t// Allow ±20 dB tolerance\n\tminRSSI := expectedRSSI - 20.0\n\tmaxRSSI := expectedRSSI + 20.0\n\n\t// Clamp to realistic bounds\n\tif minRSSI < -90 {\n\t\tminRSSI = -90\n\t}\n\tif maxRSSI > -30 {\n\t\tmaxRSSI = -30\n\t}\n\n\treturn float64(rssi) >= minRSSI && float64(rssi) <= maxRSSI\n}\n\n// ValidateIQValues checks that I/Q values are in valid int8 range\n// Note: int8 values are always in range, but we check for sensible CSI values\nfunc ValidateIQValues(i, q int8) bool {\n\treturn i >= -127 && q >= -127 // Upper bound implicit in int8 type\n}\n\n// IsInFresnelZones checks if a point is within the first N Fresnel zones\nfunc IsInFresnelZones(tx, rx, point Point, maxZone int) bool {\n\tzone := FresnelZoneNumber(tx, rx, point)\n\treturn zone <= maxZone && zone > 0\n}\n\n// ComputeFresnelModulation computes the Fresnel zone modulation factor\n// Returns a value between 0 and 1, where 1 is maximum modulation (zone 1)\nfunc ComputeFresnelModulation(tx, rx, point Point) float64 {\n\tzone := FresnelZoneNumber(tx, rx, point)\n\n\t// Zone 1: maximum modulation, Zone 5+: minimum\n\tif zone <= 1 {\n\t\treturn 1.0\n\t}\n\tif zone >= 5 {\n\t\treturn 0.0\n\t}\n\n\treturn 1.0 / math.Pow(float64(zone), 2.0)\n}\n\n// ComputeLinkQuality estimates link quality (0-1) based on geometry\n// Higher quality when links have good angular diversity\nfunc ComputeLinkQuality(nodes []Point) float64 {\n\tif len(nodes) < 2 {\n\t\treturn 0.0\n\t}\n\n\t// Simple metric: spread of node positions\n\t// Compute centroid\n\tvar cx, cy, cz float64\n\tfor _, n := range nodes {\n\t\tcx += n.X\n\t\tcy += n.Y\n\t\tcz += n.Z\n\t}\n\tcx /= float64(len(nodes))\n\tcy /= float64(len(nodes))\n\tcz /= float64(len(nodes))\n\n\t// Compute average distance from centroid\n\tavgDist := 0.0\n\tfor _, n := range nodes {\n\t\tdx := n.X - cx\n\t\tdy := n.Y - cy\n\t\tdz := n.Z - cz\n\t\tavgDist += math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n\t}\n\tavgDist /= float64(len(nodes))\n\n\t// Normalize: 5m spread = excellent quality (1.0)\n\tquality := avgDist / 5.0\n\tif quality > 1.0 {\n\t\tquality = 1.0\n\t}\n\n\treturn quality\n}\n","numLines":302,"startLine":1,"totalLines":302}}}

&AccuracyEstimator{}\n16\t}\n17\t\n18\t// AccuracyReport contains accuracy metrics from a simulation run.\n19\ttype AccuracyReport struct {\n20\t\tMedianError          float64 `json:\"median_error_m\"`          // Median position error in meters\n21\t\tMeanError            float64 `json:\"mean_error_m\"`            // Mean position error in meters\n22\t\tMaxError             float64 `json:\"max_error_m\"`             // Maximum position error in meters\n23\t\tP95Error             float64 `json:\"p95_error_m\"`             // 95th percentile error\n24\t\tDetectionRate        float64 `json:\"detection_rate\"`           // Fraction of walkers detected\n25\t\tFalsePositiveRate    float64 `json:\"false_positive_rate\"`     // False positives per second\n26\t\tRecallAt1m          float64 `json:\"recall_at_1m\"`            // Fraction within 1m of true position\n27\t\tRecallAt2m          float64 `json:\"recall_at_2m\"`            // Fraction within 2m of true position\n28\t\tSampleCount          int     `json:\"sample_count\"`            // Number of walker positions evaluated\n29\t}\n30\t\n31\t// Recommendation is a deployment recommendation.\n32\ttype Recommendation struct {\n33\t\tPriority   string  `json:\"priority\"`   // \"high\", \"medium\", \"low\"\n34\t\tMessage    string  `json:\"message\"`    // Human-readable recommendation\n35\t\tImpact     float64 `json:\"impact\"`     // Estimated improvement (0-1)\n36\t\tPosition   *Point  `json:\"position,omitempty\"` // Suggested position (if applicable)\n37\t}\n38\t\n39\t// RecommendationEngine generates deployment recommendations.\n40\ttype RecommendationEngine struct{}\n41\t\n42\t// NewRecommendationEngine creates a new recommendation engine.\n43\tfunc NewRecommendationEngine() *RecommendationEngine {\n44\t\treturn &RecommendationEngine{}\n45\t}\n46\t\n47\t// Compute evaluates accuracy metrics from walker positions and blob detections.\n48\tfunc (ae *AccuracyEstimator) Compute(walkers []*SimWalker, blobs []BlobResult) AccuracyReport {\n49\t\tif len(walkers) == 0 {\n50\t\t\treturn AccuracyReport{}\n51\t\t}\n52\t\n53\t\t// Collect all true positions and matched blob positions\n54\t\ttruePositions := make([]Point, 0)\n55\t\tdetectedPositions := make([]Point, 0)\n56\t\terrors := make([]float64, 0)\n57\t\n58\t\tfor _, walker := range walkers {\n59\t\t\tfor _, truePos := range walker.TrueHistory {\n60\t\t\t\ttruePositions = append(truePositions, truePos)\n61\t\n62\t\t\t\t// Find nearest blob\n63\t\t\t\tnearestDist := math.Inf(1)\n64\t\t\t\tfor _, blob := range blobs {\n65\t\t\t\t\tif blob.WalkerID == walker.ID {\n66\t\t\t\t\t\tdist := blob.Position.Distance(truePos)\n67\t\t\t\t\t\tif dist < nearestDist {\n68\t\t\t\t\t\t\tnearestDist = dist\n69\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n70\t\t\t\t\t}\n71\t\t\t\t}\n72\t\n73\t\t\t\tif !math.IsInf(nearestDist, 1) {\n74\t\t\t\t\tdetectedPositions = append(detectedPositions, truePos)\n75\t\t\t\t\terrors = append(errors, nearestDist)\n76\t\t\t\t}\n77\t\t\t}\n78\t\t}\n79\t\n80\t\tif len(errors) == 0 {\n81\t\t\treturn AccuracyReport{\n82\t\t\t\tMedianError:    math.Inf(1),\n83\t\t\t\tMeanError:      math.Inf(1),\n84\t\t\t\tMaxError:       math.Inf(1),\n85\t\t\t\tDetectionRate:  0,\n86\t\t\t\tSampleCount:    len(truePositions),\n87\t\t\t}\n88\t\t}\n89\t\n90\t\t// Compute statistics\n91\t\tmeanError := 0.0\n92\t\tfor _, e := range errors {\n93\t\t\tmeanError += e\n94\t\t}\n95\t\tmeanError /= float64(len(errors))\n96\t\n97\t\t// Median error\n98\t\tsortedErrors := make([]float64, len(errors))\n99\t\tcopy(sortedErrors, errors)\n100\t\tfor i := 0; i < len(sortedErrors); i++ {\n101\t\t\tfor j := i + 1; j < len(sortedErrors); j++ {\n102\t\t\t\tif sortedErrors[i] > sortedErrors[j] {\n103\t\t\t\t\tsortedErrors[i], sortedErrors[j] = sortedErrors[j], sortedErrors[i]\n104\t\t\t\t}\n105\t\t\t}\n106\t\t}\n107\t\tmedianError := sortedErrors[len(sortedErrors)/2]\n108\t\n109\t\t// Max error\n110\t\tmaxError := sortedErrors[len(sortedErrors)-1]\n111\t\n112\t\t// 95th percentile\n113\t\tp95Index := int(float64(len(sortedErrors)) * 0.95)\n114\t\tif p95Index >= len(sortedErrors) {\n115\t\t\tp95Index = len(sortedErrors) - 1\n116\t\t}\n117\t\tp95Error := sortedErrors[p95Index]\n118\t\n119\t\t// Detection rate\n120\t\tdetectionRate := float64(len(detectedPositions)) / float64(len(truePositions))\n121\t\n122\t\t// Recall at 1m and 2m\n123\t\trecall1m := 0.0\n124\t\trecall2m := 0.0\n125\t\tfor _, e := range errors {\n126\t\t\tif e <= 1.0 {\n127\t\t\t\trecall1m++\n128\t\t\t}\n129\t\t\tif e <= 2.0 {\n130\t\t\t\trecall2m++\n131\t\t\t}\n132\t\t}\n133\t\trecall1m /= float64(len(errors))\n134\t\trecall2m /= float64(len(errors))\n135\t\n136\t\t// False positive rate (blobs without matching walker)\n137\t\tfalsePositives := 0\n138\t\tfor _, blob := range blobs {\n139\t\t\thasMatch := false\n140\t\t\tfor _, walker := range walkers {\n141\t\t\t\tif blob.WalkerID == walker.ID {\n142\t\t\t\t\thasMatch = true\n143\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n144\t\t\t\t}\n145\t\t\t}\n146\t\t\tif !hasMatch {\n147\t\t\t\tfalsePositives++\n148\t\t\t}\n149\t\t}\n150\t\tfalsePositiveRate := float64(falsePositives) / float64(len(errors))\n151\t\n152\t\treturn AccuracyReport{\n153\t\t\tMedianError:       medianError,\n154\t\t\tMeanError:         meanError,\n155\t\t\tMaxError:          maxError,\n156\t\t\tP95Error:          p95Error,\n157\t\t\tDetectionRate:     detectionRate,\n158\t\t\tFalsePositiveRate: falsePositiveRate,\n159\t\t\tRecallAt1m:        recall1m,\n160\t\t\tRecallAt2m:        recall2m,\n161\t\t\tSampleCount:       len(errors),\n162\t\t}\n163\t}\n164\t\n165\t// Generate generates recommendations based on space, nodes, GDOP, and coverage.\n166\tfunc (re *RecommendationEngine) Generate(space *Space, nodes *NodeSet, gdopMap []float64, coverageScore float64) []Recommendation {\n167\t\trecs := make([]Recommendation, 0)\n168\t\n169\t\t// Check coverage score\n170\t\tif coverageScore < 50 {\n171\t\t\trecs = append(recs, Recommendation{\n172\t\t\t\tPriority: \"high\",\n173\t\t\t\tMessage:  fmt.Sprintf(\"Coverage is below 50%% (%.0f%%). Consider adding more nodes.\", coverageScore),\n174\t\t\t\tImpact:   0.3,\n175\t\t\t})\n176\t\t}\n177\t\n178\t\t// Check node count\n179\t\tnodeCount := nodes.Count()\n180\t\tif nodeCount < 4 {\n181\t\t\trecs = append(recs, Recommendation{\n182\t\t\t\tPriority: \"medium\",\n183\t\t\t\tMessage:  fmt.Sprintf(\"Only %d nodes. For best accuracy, use at least 4 nodes.\", nodeCount),\n184\t\t\t\tImpact:   0.2,\n185\t\t\t})\n186\t\t}\n187\t\n188\t\t// Check height diversity\n189\t\thasLow, hasHigh := false, false\n190\t\tfor _, node := range nodes.All() {\n191\t\t\tif node.Position.Z < 1.0 {\n192\t\t\t\thasLow = true\n193\t\t\t}\n194\t\t\tif node.Position.Z > 2.0 {\n195\t\t\t\thasHigh = true\n196\t\t\t}\n197\t\t}\n198\t\n199\t\tif !hasLow || !hasHigh {\n200\t\t\trecs = append(recs, Recommendation{\n201\t\t\t\tPriority: \"medium\",\n202\t\t\t\tMessage:  \"For better Z-axis accuracy, place nodes at mixed heights (some low, some high).\",\n203\t\t\t\tImpact:   0.15,\n204\t\t\t})\n205\t\t}\n206\t\n207\t\t// Find worst coverage areas\n208\t\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n209\t\tif len(gdopMap) > 0 {\n210\t\t\t// Find cells with worst GDOP (highest values, excluding infinity)\n211\t\t\tmaxGDOP := 0.0\n212\t\t\tworstIdx := -1\n213\t\n214\t\t\tfor i, gdop := range gdopMap {\n215\t\t\t\tif !math.IsInf(gdop, 0) && gdop > maxGDOP {\n216\t\t\t\t\tmaxGDOP = gdop\n217\t\t\t\t\tworstIdx = i\n218\t\t\t\t}\n219\t\t\t}\n220\t\n221\t\t\tif maxGDOP > 8.0 && worstIdx >= 0 {\n222\t\t\t\t// Compute position from index\n223\t\t\t\twidthCells := int(math.Ceil((maxX - minX) / 0.2))\n224\t\t\t\tdepthCells := int(math.Ceil((maxY - minY) / 0.2))\n225\t\n226\t\t\t\t_ = worstIdx / (widthCells * depthCells) // z-layer index, not used in 2D recommendation\n227\t\t\t\tremainder := worstIdx % (widthCells * depthCells)\n228\t\t\t\tx := remainder / depthCells\n229\t\t\t\ty := remainder % depthCells\n230\t\n231\t\t\t\tposX := minX + float64(x)*0.2 + 0.1\n232\t\t\t\tposY := minY + float64(y)*0.2 + 0.1\n233\t\n234\t\t\t\trecs = append(recs, Recommendation{\n235\t\t\t\t\tPriority: \"high\",\n236\t\t\t\t\tMessage:  fmt.Sprintf(\"Poor coverage detected near (%.1f, %.1f). Consider adding a node nearby.\", posX, posY),\n237\t\t\t\t\tImpact:   0.25,\n238\t\t\t\t\tPosition: &Point{X: posX, Y: posY, Z: 2.0},\n239\t\t\t\t})\n240\t\t\t}\n241\t\t}\n242\t\n243\t\t// Check for collinear nodes\n244\t\tif nodeCount >= 3 {\n245\t\t\tangles := make([]float64, 0, nodeCount)\n246\t\t\tfor _, node := range nodes.All() {\n247\t\t\t\t// Compute angle from center\n248\t\t\t\tcenterX := (minX + maxX) / 2\n249\t\t\t\tcenterY := (minY + maxY) / 2\n250\t\t\t\tangle := math.Atan2(node.Position.Y-centerY, node.Position.X-centerX)\n251\t\t\t\tangles = append(angles, angle)\n252\t\t\t}\n253\t\n254\t\t\t// Check if all angles are similar (collinear)\n255\t\t\tangleSpread := 0.0\n256\t\t\tfor i := 1; i < len(angles); i++ {\n257\t\t\t\tdiff := math.Abs(angles[i] - angles[0])\n258\t\t\t\tfor diff > math.Pi {\n259\t\t\t\t\tdiff -= 2 * math.Pi\n260\t\t\t\t}\n261\t\t\t\tfor diff < -math.Pi {\n262\t\t\t\t\tdiff += 2 * math.Pi\n263\t\t\t\t}\n264\t\t\t\tangleSpread += diff\n265\t\t\t}\n266\t\t\tangleSpread /= float64(len(angles) - 1)\n267\t\n268\t\t\tif angleSpread < 0.3 { // Less than ~17 degrees spread\n269\t\t\t\trecs = append(recs, Recommendation{\n270\t\t\t\t\tPriority: \"medium\",\n271\t\t\t\t\tMessage:  \"Nodes appear to be nearly collinear. Spread them out for better coverage.\",\n272\t\t\t\t\tImpact:   0.2,\n273\t\t\t\t})\n274\t\t\t}\n275\t\t}\n276\t\n277\t\t// Estimate improvement with additional nodes\n278\t\tif nodeCount >= 2 && nodeCount < 8 {\n279\t\t\t// Estimate improvement from adding one node\n280\t\t\testimatedImprovement := 0.1 * float64(8-nodeCount) / 6.0\n281\t\t\trecs = append(recs, Recommendation{\n282\t\t\t\tPriority: \"low\",\n283\t\t\t\tMessage:  fmt.Sprintf(\"Adding a node could improve accuracy by ~%.0f%%.\", estimatedImprovement*100),\n284\t\t\t\tImpact:   estimatedImprovement,\n285\t\t\t})\n286\t\t}\n287\t\n288\t\t// If no issues found\n289\t\tif len(recs) == 0 {\n290\t\t\trecs = append(recs, Recommendation{\n291\t\t\t\tPriority: \"low\",\n292\t\t\t\tMessage:  \"Coverage looks good! No specific recommendations.\",\n293\t\t\t\tImpact:   0,\n294\t\t\t})\n295\t\t}\n296\t\n297\t\treturn recs\n298\t}\n299\t\n300\t// ShoppingList contains hardware recommendations.\n301\ttype ShoppingList struct {\n302\t\tMinimumNodes      int       `json:\"minimum_nodes\"`\n303\t\tRecommendedNodes  int       `json:\"recommended_nodes\"`\n304\t\tExpectedAccuracy   float64   `json:\"expected_accuracy_m\"`\n305\t\tCoveragePercent   float64   `json:\"coverage_percent\"`\n306\t\tHardwareList      []string  `json:\"hardware_list\"`\n307\t\tAmazonSearchURL   string    `json:\"amazon_search_url\"`\n308\t\tOptimalPositions  []Point   `json:\"optimal_positions,omitempty\"`\n309\t\tCoverageGaps     []Point   `json:\"coverage_gaps,omitempty\"`      // Positions with poor coverage\n310\t\tRecommendedAdditions []NodeAddition `json:\"recommended_additions,omitempty\"` // Specific nodes to add\n311\t\tEstimatedCost     float64   `json:\"estimated_cost_usd,omitempty\"` // Estimated hardware cost in USD\n312\t\tSpaceDimensions   SpaceDimensions `json:\"space_dimensions\"` // Space dimensions for reference\n313\t}\n314\t\n315\t// SpaceDimensions describes the space dimensions\n316\ttype SpaceDimensions struct {\n317\t\tWidth  float64 `json:\"width_m\"`\n318\t\tDepth  float64 `json:\"depth_m\"`\n319\t\tHeight float64 `json:\"height_m\"`\n320\t\tArea   float64 `json:\"area_m2\"`\n321\t\tVolume float64 `json:\"volume_m3\"`\n322\t}\n323\t\n324\t// NodeAddition represents a `json:\"position\"`\n329\t\tRole        string  `json:\"role\"`\n330\t\tHeight      string  `json:\"height_description\"` // e.g., \"ceiling\", \"wall\", \"desk\"\n331\t\tImprovement float64 `json:\"estimated_improvement\"` // 0-1, estimated coverage improvement\n332\t}\n333\t\n334\t// GenerateShoppingListFromResults creates a shopping list from simulation results.\n335\tfunc GenerateShoppingListFromResults(space *Space, nodes *NodeSet, coverageScore float64, accuracy AccuracyReport) ShoppingList {\n336\t\tnodeCount := nodes.Count()\n337\t\n338\t\t// Space dimensions\n339\t\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, maxZ := space.Bounds()\n340\t\twidth := maxX - minX\n341\t\tdepth := maxY - minY\n342\t\theight := maxZ - minY\n343\t\tarea := width * depth\n344\t\tvolume := width * depth * height\n345\t\n346\t\t// Minimum nodes based on space dimensions\n347\t\tminNodes := int(math.Ceil(area / 30.0)) // ~30 m² per node for fair coverage\n348\t\n349\t\t// Recommended nodes based on desired accuracy\n350\t\trecNodes := minNodes\n351\t\tif accuracy.MedianError > 1.0 && minNodes < 6 {\n352\t\t\trecNodes = minNodes + 1\n353\t\t}\n354\t\tif accuracy.MedianError > 0.8 && minNodes < 8 {\n355\t\t\trecNodes = minNodes + 2\n356\t\t}\n357\t\n358\t\t// Expected accuracy\n359\t\texpectedAccuracy := accuracy.MedianError\n360\t\tif math.IsInf(expectedAccuracy, 0) {\n361\t\t\t// Estimate from node count\n362\t\t\tif nodeCount >= 6 {\n363\t\t\t\texpectedAccuracy = 0.5\n364\t\t\t} else if nodeCount >= 4 {\n365\t\t\t\texpectedAccuracy = 1.0\n366\t\t\t} else {\n367\t\t\t\texpectedAccuracy = 1.5\n368\t\t\t}\n369\t\t}\n370\t\n371\t\t// Generate optimal positions (corner + mixed heights)\n372\t\toptimalPositions := generateOptimalPositions(space, recNodes)\n373\t\n374\t\t// Find coverage gaps using GDOP analysis\n375\t\tcoverageGaps := findCoverageGaps(space, nodes)\n376\t\n377\t\t// Generate recommended additions\n378\t\trecommendedAdditions := generateNodeAdditions(space, nodes, coverageGaps)\n379\t\n380\t\t// Hardware list with quantities\n381\t\thardware := make([]string, 0)\n382\t\thardware = append(hardware, fmt.Sprintf(\"%d × ESP32-S3 Development Board (with PSRAM 8MB)\", recNodes))\n383\t\thardware = append(hardware, fmt.Sprintf(\"%d × USB-C Power Supply (5V 2A)\", recNodes))\n384\t\thardware = append(hardware, fmt.Sprintf(\"%d × USB-C Cable (1-2m)\", recNodes))\n385\t\thardware = append(hardware, fmt.Sprintf(\"%d × Adhesive Cable Clips (for mounting)\", recNodes*4))\n386\t\thardware = append(hardware, fmt.Sprintf(\"%d × 3D Printed Case (optional)\", recNodes))\n387\t\n388\t\t// Estimated cost (as of 2025)\n389\t\testimatedCost := float64(recNodes)*15.0 + // ESP32-S3 dev board\n390\t\t\tfloat64(recNodes)*8.0 +              // Power supply\n391\t\t\tfloat64(recNodes)*3.0 +              // USB cable\n392\t\t\tfloat64(recNodes)*2.0               // Cable clips\n393\t\n394\t\t// Amazon search URL (non-affiliate)\n395\t\tsearchURL := fmt.Sprintf(\"https://www.amazon.com/s?k=esp32-s3+devkit+usb-c+psram\")\n396\t\n397\t\treturn ShoppingList{\n398\t\t\tMinimumNodes:       minNodes,\n399\t\t\tRecommendedNodes:   recNodes,\n400\t\t\tExpectedAccuracy:   expectedAccuracy,\n401\t\t\tCoveragePercent:    coverageScore,\n402\t\t\tHardwareList:       hardware,\n403\t\t\tAmazonSearchURL:    searchURL,\n404\t\t\tOptimalPositions:   optimalPositions,\n405\t\t\tCoverageGaps:       coverageGaps,\n406\t\t\tRecommendedAdditions: recommendedAdditions,\n407\t\t\tEstimatedCost: volume,\n414\t\t\t},\n415\t\t}\n416\t}\n417\t\n418\t// generateOptimalPositions generates optimal node positions for a given count\n419\tfunc generateOptimalPositions(space *Space, count int) []Point {\n420\t\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n421\t\tpositions := make([]Point, 0, count)\n422\t\n423\t\t// Strategy: place nodes at corners and mid-points, with mixed heights\n424\t\tcorners := []Point{\n425\t\t\t{X: minX + 0.5, Y: minY + 0.5, Z: 2.2},  // Low corner, high\n426\t\t\t{X: maxX - 0.5, Y: minY + 0.5, Z: 2.2},  // Low corner, high\n427\t\t\t{X: minX + 0.5, Y: maxY - 0.5, Z: 2.2},  // Low corner, high\n428\t\t\t{X: maxX - 0.5, Y: maxY - 0.5, Z: 2.2},  // Low corner, high\n429\t\t\t{X: (minX + maxX) / 2, Y: minY + 0.5, Z: 2.5}, // Mid wall, high\n430\t\t\t{X: (minX + maxX) / 2, Y: maxY - 0.5, Z: 2.5}, // Mid wall, high\n431\t\t\t{X: minX + 0.5, Y: (minY + maxY) / 2, Z: 0.3},  // Mid wall, low\n432\t\t\t{X: maxX - 0.5, Y: (minY + maxY) / 2, Z: 0.3},  // Mid wall, low\n433\t\t}\n434\t\n435\t\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n436\t\t\tif i < len(corners) {\n437\t\t\t\tpositions = append(positions, corners[i])\n438\t\t\t} else {\n439\t\t\t\t// Add random position for extra nodes\n440\t\t\t\tpositions = append(positions, Point{\n441\t\t\t\t\tX: minX + mrand.Float64()*(maxX-minX),\n442\t\t\t\t\tY: minY + mrand.Float64()*(maxY-minY),\n443\t\t\t\t\tZ: 0.3 + mrand.Float64()*2.0, // Mixed height\n444\t\t\t\t})\n445\t\t\t}\n446\t\t}\n447\t\n448\t\treturn positions\n449\t}\n450\t\n451\t// findCoverageGaps finds positions with poor GDOP (coverage gaps)\n452\tfunc findCoverageGaps(space *Space, nodes *NodeSet) []Point {\n453\t\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n454\t\tlinks := GenerateAllLinks(nodes)\n455\t\n456\t\tif len(links) < 2 {\n457\t\t\t// No links means no coverage - return center of space as gap\n458\t\t\treturn []Point{{X: (minX + maxX) / 2, Y: (minY + maxY) / 2, Z: 1.0}}\n459\t\t}\n460\t\n461\t\tgdopComp := NewGDOPComputer(links, GridConfig{\n462\t\t\tMinX:     minX,\n463\t\t\tMinY:     minY,\n464\t\t\tWidth:    maxX - minX,\n465\t\t\tDepth:    maxY - minY,\n466\t\t\tCellSize: 0.2,\n467\t\t})\n468\t\n469\t\tresults := gdopComp.ComputeAll()\n470\t\tgaps := make([]Point, 0)\n471\t\n472\t\t// Find cells with poor or no coverage\n473\t\tfor _, row := range results {\n474\t\t\tfor _, cell := range row {\n475\t\t\t\tif cell.Quality == \"poor\" || cell.Quality == \"none\" {\n476\t\t\t\t\tgaps = append(gaps, Point{X: cell.X, Y: cell.Y, Z: cell.Z})\n477\t\t\t\t}\n478\t\t\t}\n479\t\t}\n480\t\n481\t\t// Limit to top 10 worst coverage gaps\n482\t\tif len(gaps) > 10 {\n483\t\t\tgaps = gaps[:10]\n484\t\t}\n485\t\n486\t\treturn gaps\n487\t}\n488\t\n489\t// generateNodeAdditions creates specific node addition recommendations\n490\tfunc generateNodeAdditions(space *Space, nodes *NodeSet, gaps []Point) []NodeAddition {\n491\t\tadditions := make([]NodeAddition, 0)\n492\t\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n493\t\n494\t\t// If we have coverage gaps, suggest adding nodes there\n495\t\tfor i, gap := range gaps {\n496\t\t\tif i >= 3 {\n497\t\t\t\tbreak // Limit to 3 gap-based additions\n498\t\t\t}\n499\t\n500\t\t\theightDesc := \"ceiling\"\n501\t\t\tif gap.Z < 1.0 {\n502\t\t\t\theightDesc = \"wall mount\"\n503\t\t\t} else if gap.Z > 2.0 {\n504\t\t\t\theightDesc = \"ceiling\"\n505\t\t\t} else {\n506\t\t\t\theightDesc = \"high wall\"\n507\t\t\t}\n508\t\n509\t\t\tadditions = append(additions, NodeAddition{\n510\t\t\t\tID:          fmt.Sprintf(\"node-gap-%d\", i+1),\n511\t\t\t\tName:        fmt.Sprintf(\"Gap Coverage Node %d\", i+1),\n512\t\t\t\tPosition:    gap,\n513\t\t\t\tRole:        \"tx_rx\",\n514\t\t\t\tHeight:      heightDesc,\n515\t\t\t\tImprovement: 0.2 + float64(3-i)*0.05, // Later gaps have lower priority\n516\t\t\t})\n517\t\t}\n518\t\n519\t\t// Suggest corner nodes if we have few nodes\n520\t\tif nodes.Count() < 4 {\n521\t\t\tcorners := CornerPositions(space)\n522\t\t\tfor i := nodes.Count(); i < 4 && i < len(corners); i++ {\n523\t\t\t\theightDesc := \"ceiling\"\n524\t\t\t\tif corners[i].Z < 1.0 {\n525\t\t\t\t\theightDesc = \"low\"\n526\t\t\t\t}\n527\t\n528\t\t\t\tadditions = append(additions, NodeAddition{\n529\t\t\t\t\tID:          fmt.Sprintf(\"node-corner-%d\", i+1),\n530\t\t\t\t\tName:        fmt.Sprintf(\"Corner Node %d\", i+1),\n531\t\t\t\t\tPosition:    corners[i],\n532\t\t\t\t\tRole:        \"tx_rx\",\n533\t\t\t\t\tHeight:      heightDesc,\n534\t\t\t\t\tImprovement: 0.15,\n535\t\t\t\t})\n536\t\t\t}\n537\t\t}\n538\t\n539\t\t// If no specific additions, suggest a center node\n540\t\tif len(additions) == 0 {\n541\t\t\tadditions = append(additions, NodeAddition{\n542\t\t\t\tID:          \"node-center-1\",\n543\t\t\t\tName:        \"Center Node\",\n544\t\t\t\tPosition:    Point{X: (minX + maxX) / 2, Y: (minY + maxY) / 2, Z: 2.0},\n545\t\t\t\tRole:        \"tx_rx\",\n546\t\t\t\tHeight:      \"ceiling\",\n547\t\t\t\tImprovement: 0.1,\n548\t\t\t})\n549\t\t}\n550\t\n551\t\treturn additions\n552\t}\n553\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"eecb8034-1f22-4ebd-a931-2e1a46645cf1","uuid":"216c7af0-182a-40ba-aead-39032142c706","timestamp":"2026-05-06T03:00:08.375Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/spaxel/mothership/internal/simulator/accuracy.go","content":"// Package simulator provides accuracy estimation for the pre-deployment simulator.\npackage simulator\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"math\"\n\tmrand \"math/rand\"\n)\n\n// AccuracyEstimator computes accuracy metrics from simulation results.\ntype AccuracyEstimator struct{}\n\n// NewAccuracyEstimator creates a new accuracy estimator.\nfunc NewAccuracyEstimator() *AccuracyEstimator {\n\treturn &AccuracyEstimator{}\n}\n\n// AccuracyReport contains accuracy metrics from a simulation run.\ntype AccuracyReport struct {\n\tMedianError          float64 `json:\"median_error_m\"`          // Median position error in meters\n\tMeanError            float64 `json:\"mean_error_m\"`            // Mean position error in meters\n\tMaxError             float64 `json:\"max_error_m\"`             // Maximum position error in meters\n\tP95Error             float64 `json:\"p95_error_m\"`             // 95th percentile error\n\tDetectionRate        float64 `json:\"detection_rate\"`           // Fraction of walkers detected\n\tFalsePositiveRate    float64 `json:\"false_positive_rate\"`     // False positives per second\n\tRecallAt1m          float64 `json:\"recall_at_1m\"`            // Fraction within 1m of true position\n\tRecallAt2m          float64 `json:\"recall_at_2m\"`            // Fraction within 2m of true position\n\tSampleCount          int     `json:\"sample_count\"`            // Number of walker positions evaluated\n}\n\n// Recommendation is a deployment recommendation.\ntype Recommendation struct {\n\tPriority   string  `json:\"priority\"`   // \"high\", \"medium\", \"low\"\n\tMessage    string  `json:\"message\"`    // Human-readable recommendation\n\tImpact     float64 `json:\"impact\"`     // Estimated improvement (0-1)\n\tPosition   *Point  `json:\"position,omitempty\"` // Suggested position (if applicable)\n}\n\n// RecommendationEngine generates deployment recommendations.\ntype RecommendationEngine struct{}\n\n// NewRecommendationEngine creates a new recommendation engine.\nfunc NewRecommendationEngine() *RecommendationEngine {\n\treturn &RecommendationEngine{}\n}\n\n// Compute evaluates accuracy metrics from walker positions and blob detections.\nfunc (ae *AccuracyEstimator) Compute(walkers []*SimWalker, blobs []BlobResult) AccuracyReport {\n\tif len(walkers) == 0 {\n\t\treturn AccuracyReport{}\n\t}\n\n\t// Collect all true positions and matched blob positions\n\ttruePositions := make([]Point, 0)\n\tdetectedPositions := make([]Point, 0)\n\terrors := make([]float64, 0)\n\n\tfor _, walker := range walkers {\n\t\tfor _, truePos := range walker.TrueHistory {\n\t\t\ttruePositions = append(truePositions, truePos)\n\n\t\t\t// Find nearest blob\n\t\t\tnearestDist := math.Inf(1)\n\t\t\tfor _, blob := range blobs {\n\t\t\t\tif blob.WalkerID == walker.ID {\n\t\t\t\t\tdist := blob.Position.Distance(truePos)\n\t\t\t\t\tif dist < nearestDist {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnearestDist = dist\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif !math.IsInf(nearestDist, 1) {\n\t\t\t\tdetectedPositions = append(detectedPositions, truePos)\n\t\t\t\terrors = append(errors, nearestDist)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif len(errors) == 0 {\n\t\treturn AccuracyReport{\n\t\t\tMedianError:    math.Inf(1),\n\t\t\tMeanError:      math.Inf(1),\n\t\t\tMaxError:       math.Inf(1),\n\t\t\tDetectionRate:  0,\n\t\t\tSampleCount:    len(truePositions),\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Compute statistics\n\tmeanError := 0.0\n\tfor _, e := range errors {\n\t\tmeanError += e\n\t}\n\tmeanError /= float64(len(errors))\n\n\t// Median error\n\tsortedErrors := make([]float64, len(errors))\n\tcopy(sortedErrors, errors)\n\tfor i := 0; i < len(sortedErrors); i++ {\n\t\tfor j := i + 1; j < len(sortedErrors); j++ {\n\t\t\tif sortedErrors[i] > sortedErrors[j] {\n\t\t\t\tsortedErrors[i], sortedErrors[j] = sortedErrors[j], sortedErrors[i]\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tmedianError := sortedErrors[len(sortedErrors)/2]\n\n\t// Max error\n\tmaxError := sortedErrors[len(sortedErrors)-1]\n\n\t// 95th percentile\n\tp95Index := int(float64(len(sortedErrors)) * 0.95)\n\tif p95Index >= len(sortedErrors) {\n\t\tp95Index = len(sortedErrors) - 1\n\t}\n\tp95Error := sortedErrors[p95Index]\n\n\t// Detection rate\n\tdetectionRate := float64(len(detectedPositions)) / float64(len(truePositions))\n\n\t// Recall at 1m and 2m\n\trecall1m := 0.0\n\trecall2m := 0.0\n\tfor _, e := range errors {\n\t\tif e <= 1.0 {\n\t\t\trecall1m++\n\t\t}\n\t\tif e <= 2.0 {\n\t\t\trecall2m++\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\trecall1m /= float64(len(errors))\n\trecall2m /= float64(len(errors))\n\n\t// False positive rate (blobs without matching walker)\n\tfalsePositives := 0\n\tfor _, blob := range blobs {\n\t\thasMatch := false\n\t\tfor _, walker := range walkers {\n\t\t\tif blob.WalkerID == walker.ID {\n\t\t\t\thasMatch = true\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif !hasMatch {\n\t\t\tfalsePositives++\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tfalsePositiveRate := float64(falsePositives) / float64(len(errors))\n\n\treturn AccuracyReport{\n\t\tMedianError:       medianError,\n\t\tMeanError:         meanError,\n\t\tMaxError:          maxError,\n\t\tP95Error:          p95Error,\n\t\tDetectionRate:     detectionRate,\n\t\tFalsePositiveRate: falsePositiveRate,\n\t\tRecallAt1m:        recall1m,\n\t\tRecallAt2m:        recall2m,\n\t\tSampleCount:       len(errors),\n\t}\n}\n\n// Generate generates recommendations based on space, nodes, GDOP, and coverage.\nfunc (re *RecommendationEngine) Generate(space *Space, nodes *NodeSet, gdopMap []float64, coverageScore float64) []Recommendation {\n\trecs := make([]Recommendation, 0)\n\n\t// Check coverage score\n\tif coverageScore < 50 {\n\t\trecs = append(recs, Recommendation{\n\t\t\tPriority: \"high\",\n\t\t\tMessage:  fmt.Sprintf(\"Coverage is below 50%% (%.0f%%). Consider adding more nodes.\", coverageScore),\n\t\t\tImpact:   0.3,\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\t// Check node count\n\tnodeCount := nodes.Count()\n\tif nodeCount < 4 {\n\t\trecs = append(recs, Recommendation{\n\t\t\tPriority: \"medium\",\n\t\t\tMessage:  fmt.Sprintf(\"Only %d nodes. For best accuracy, use at least 4 nodes.\", nodeCount),\n\t\t\tImpact:   0.2,\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\t// Check height diversity\n\thasLow, hasHigh := false, false\n\tfor _, node := range nodes.All() {\n\t\tif node.Position.Z < 1.0 {\n\t\t\thasLow = true\n\t\t}\n\t\tif node.Position.Z > 2.0 {\n\t\t\thasHigh = true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif !hasLow || !hasHigh {\n\t\trecs = append(recs, Recommendation{\n\t\t\tPriority: \"medium\",\n\t\t\tMessage:  \"For better Z-axis accuracy, place nodes at mixed heights (some low, some high).\",\n\t\t\tImpact:   0.15,\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\t// Find worst coverage areas\n\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n\tif len(gdopMap) > 0 {\n\t\t// Find cells with worst GDOP (highest values, excluding infinity)\n\t\tmaxGDOP := 0.0\n\t\tworstIdx := -1\n\n\t\tfor i, gdop := range gdopMap {\n\t\t\tif !math.IsInf(gdop, 0) && gdop > maxGDOP {\n\t\t\t\tmaxGDOP = gdop\n\t\t\t\tworstIdx = i\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif maxGDOP > 8.0 && worstIdx >= 0 {\n\t\t\t// Compute position from index\n\t\t\twidthCells := int(math.Ceil((maxX - minX) / 0.2))\n\t\t\tdepthCells := int(math.Ceil((maxY - minY) / 0.2))\n\n\t\t\t_ = worstIdx / (widthCells * depthCells) // z-layer index, not used in 2D recommendation\n\t\t\tremainder := worstIdx % (widthCells * depthCells)\n\t\t\tx := remainder / depthCells\n\t\t\ty := remainder % depthCells\n\n\t\t\tposX := minX + float64(x)*0.2 + 0.1\n\t\t\tposY := minY + float64(y)*0.2 + 0.1\n\n\t\t\trecs = append(recs, Recommendation{\n\t\t\t\tPriority: \"high\",\n\t\t\t\tMessage:  fmt.Sprintf(\"Poor coverage detected near (%.1f, %.1f). Consider adding a node nearby.\", posX, posY),\n\t\t\t\tImpact:   0.25,\n\t\t\t\tPosition: &Point{X: posX, Y: posY, Z: 2.0},\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Check for collinear nodes\n\tif nodeCount >= 3 {\n\t\tangles := make([]float64, 0, nodeCount)\n\t\tfor _, node := range nodes.All() {\n\t\t\t// Compute angle from center\n\t\t\tcenterX := (minX + maxX) / 2\n\t\t\tcenterY := (minY + maxY) / 2\n\t\t\tangle := math.Atan2(node.Position.Y-centerY, node.Position.X-centerX)\n\t\t\tangles = append(angles, angle)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Check if all angles are similar (collinear)\n\t\tangleSpread := 0.0\n\t\tfor i := 1; i < len(angles); i++ {\n\t\t\tdiff := math.Abs(angles[i] - angles[0])\n\t\t\tfor diff > math.Pi {\n\t\t\t\tdiff -= 2 * math.Pi\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tfor diff < -math.Pi {\n\t\t\t\tdiff += 2 * math.Pi\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tangleSpread += diff\n\t\t}\n\t\tangleSpread /= float64(len(angles) - 1)\n\n\t\tif angleSpread < 0.3 { // Less than ~17 degrees spread\n\t\t\trecs = append(recs, Recommendation{\n\t\t\t\tPriority: \"medium\",\n\t\t\t\tMessage:  \"Nodes appear to be nearly collinear. Spread them out for better coverage.\",\n\t\t\t\tImpact:   0.2,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Estimate improvement with additional nodes\n\tif nodeCount >= 2 && nodeCount < 8 {\n\t\t// Estimate improvement from adding one node\n\t\testimatedImprovement := 0.1 * float64(8-nodeCount) / 6.0\n\t\trecs = append(recs, Recommendation{\n\t\t\tPriority: \"low\",\n\t\t\tMessage:  fmt.Sprintf(\"Adding a node could improve accuracy by ~%.0f%%.\", estimatedImprovement*100),\n\t\t\tImpact:   estimatedImprovement,\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\t// If no issues found\n\tif len(recs) == 0 {\n\t\trecs = append(recs, Recommendation{\n\t\t\tPriority: \"low\",\n\t\t\tMessage:  \"Coverage looks good! No specific recommendations.\",\n\t\t\tImpact:   0,\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\treturn recs\n}\n\n// ShoppingList contains hardware recommendations.\ntype ShoppingList struct {\n\tMinimumNodes      int       `json:\"minimum_nodes\"`\n\tRecommendedNodes  int       `json:\"recommended_nodes\"`\n\tExpectedAccuracy   float64   `json:\"expected_accuracy_m\"`\n\tCoveragePercent   float64   `json:\"coverage_percent\"`\n\tHardwareList      []string  `json:\"hardware_list\"`\n\tAmazonSearchURL   string    `json:\"amazon_search_url\"`\n\tOptimalPositions  []Point   `json:\"optimal_positions,omitempty\"`\n\tCoverageGaps     []Point   `json:\"coverage_gaps,omitempty\"`      // Positions with poor coverage\n\tRecommendedAdditions []NodeAddition `json:\"recommended_additions,omitempty\"` // Specific nodes to add\n\tEstimatedCost     float64   `json:\"estimated_cost_usd,omitempty\"` // Estimated hardware cost in USD\n\tSpaceDimensions   SpaceDimensions `json:\"space_dimensions\"` // Space dimensions for reference\n}\n\n// SpaceDimensions describes the space dimensions\ntype SpaceDimensions struct {\n\tWidth  float64 `json:\"width_m\"`\n\tDepth  float64 `json:\"depth_m\"`\n\tHeight float64 `json:\"height_m\"`\n\tArea   float64 `json:\"area_m2\"`\n\tVolume float64 `json:\"volume_m3\"`\n}\n\n// NodeAddition represents a specific node to add with position and role\ntype NodeAddition struct {\n\tID          string  `json:\"id\"`\n\tName        string  `json:\"name\"`\n\tPosition    Point   `json:\"position\"`\n\tRole        string  `json:\"role\"`\n\tHeight      string  `json:\"height_description\"` // e.g., \"ceiling\", \"wall\", \"desk\"\n\tImprovement float64 `json:\"estimated_improvement\"` // 0-1, estimated coverage improvement\n}\n\n// GenerateShoppingListFromResults creates a shopping list from simulation results.\nfunc GenerateShoppingListFromResults(space *Space, nodes *NodeSet, coverageScore float64, accuracy AccuracyReport) ShoppingList {\n\tnodeCount := nodes.Count()\n\n\t// Space dimensions\n\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, maxZ := space.Bounds()\n\twidth := maxX - minX\n\tdepth := maxY - minY\n\theight := maxZ - minY\n\tarea := width * depth\n\tvolume := width * depth * height\n\n\t// Minimum nodes based on space dimensions\n\tminNodes := int(math.Ceil(area / 30.0)) // ~30 m² per node for fair coverage\n\n\t// Recommended nodes based on desired accuracy\n\trecNodes := minNodes\n\tif accuracy.MedianError > 1.0 && minNodes < 6 {\n\t\trecNodes = minNodes + 1\n\t}\n\tif accuracy.MedianError > 0.8 && minNodes < 8 {\n\t\trecNodes = minNodes + 2\n\t}\n\n\t// Expected accuracy\n\texpectedAccuracy := accuracy.MedianError\n\tif math.IsInf(expectedAccuracy, 0) {\n\t\t// Estimate from node count\n\t\tif nodeCount >= 6 {\n\t\t\texpectedAccuracy = 0.5\n\t\t} else if nodeCount >= 4 {\n\t\t\texpectedAccuracy = 1.0\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\texpectedAccuracy = 1.5\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Generate optimal positions (corner + mixed heights)\n\toptimalPositions := generateOptimalPositions(space, recNodes)\n\n\t// Find coverage gaps using GDOP analysis\n\tcoverageGaps := findCoverageGaps(space, nodes)\n\n\t// Generate recommended additions\n\trecommendedAdditions := generateNodeAdditions(space, nodes, coverageGaps)\n\n\t// Hardware list with quantities\n\thardware := make([]string, 0)\n\thardware = append(hardware, fmt.Sprintf(\"%d × ESP32-S3 Development Board (with PSRAM 8MB)\", recNodes))\n\thardware = append(hardware, fmt.Sprintf(\"%d × USB-C Power Supply (5V 2A)\", recNodes))\n\thardware = append(hardware, fmt.Sprintf(\"%d × USB-C Cable (1-2m)\", recNodes))\n\thardware = append(hardware, fmt.Sprintf(\"%d × Adhesive Cable Clips (for mounting)\", recNodes*4))\n\thardware = append(hardware, fmt.Sprintf(\"%d × 3D Printed Case (optional)\", recNodes))\n\n\t// Estimated cost (as of 2025)\n\testimatedCost := float64(recNodes)*15.0 + // ESP32-S3 dev board\n\t\tfloat64(recNodes)*8.0 +              // Power supply\n\t\tfloat64(recNodes)*3.0 +              // USB cable\n\t\tfloat64(recNodes)*2.0               // Cable clips\n\n\t// Amazon search URL (non-affiliate)\n\tsearchURL := fmt.Sprintf(\"https://www.amazon.com/s?k=esp32-s3+devkit+usb-c+psram\")\n\n\treturn ShoppingList{\n\t\tMinimumNodes:       minNodes,\n\t\tRecommendedNodes:   recNodes,\n\t\tExpectedAccuracy:   expectedAccuracy,\n\t\tCoveragePercent:    coverageScore,\n\t\tHardwareList:       hardware,\n\t\tAmazonSearchURL:    searchURL,\n\t\tOptimalPositions:   optimalPositions,\n\t\tCoverageGaps:       coverageGaps,\n\t\tRecommendedAdditions: recommendedAdditions,\n\t\tEstimatedCost:      estimatedCost,\n\t\tSpaceDimensions: SpaceDimensions{\n\t\t\tWidth:  width,\n\t\t\tDepth:  depth,\n\t\t\tHeight: height,\n\t\t\tArea:   area,\n\t\t\tVolume: volume,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\n// generateOptimalPositions generates optimal node positions for a given count\nfunc generateOptimalPositions(space *Space, count int) []Point {\n\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n\tpositions := make([]Point, 0, count)\n\n\t// Strategy: place nodes at corners and mid-points, with mixed heights\n\tcorners := []Point{\n\t\t{X: minX + 0.5, Y: minY + 0.5, Z: 2.2},  // Low corner, high\n\t\t{X: maxX - 0.5, Y: minY + 0.5, Z: 2.2},  // Low corner, high\n\t\t{X: minX + 0.5, Y: maxY - 0.5, Z: 2.2},  // Low corner, high\n\t\t{X: maxX - 0.5, Y: maxY - 0.5, Z: 2.2},  // Low corner, high\n\t\t{X: (minX + maxX) / 2, Y: minY + 0.5, Z: 2.5}, // Mid wall, high\n\t\t{X: (minX + maxX) / 2, Y: maxY - 0.5, Z: 2.5}, // Mid wall, high\n\t\t{X: minX + 0.5, Y: (minY + maxY) / 2, Z: 0.3},  // Mid wall, low\n\t\t{X: maxX - 0.5, Y: (minY + maxY) / 2, Z: 0.3},  // Mid wall, low\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n\t\tif i < len(corners) {\n\t\t\tpositions = append(positions, corners[i])\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// Add random position for extra nodes\n\t\t\tpositions = append(positions, Point{\n\t\t\t\tX: minX + mrand.Float64()*(maxX-minX),\n\t\t\t\tY: minY + mrand.Float64()*(maxY-minY),\n\t\t\t\tZ: 0.3 + mrand.Float64()*2.0, // Mixed height\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn positions\n}\n\n// findCoverageGaps finds positions with poor GDOP (coverage gaps)\nfunc findCoverageGaps(space *Space, nodes *NodeSet) []Point {\n\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n\tlinks := GenerateAllLinks(nodes)\n\n\tif len(links) < 2 {\n\t\t// No links means no coverage - return center of space as gap\n\t\treturn []Point{{X: (minX + maxX) / 2, Y: (minY + maxY) / 2, Z: 1.0}}\n\t}\n\n\tgdopComp := NewGDOPComputer(links, GridConfig{\n\t\tMinX:     minX,\n\t\tMinY:     minY,\n\t\tWidth:    maxX - minX,\n\t\tDepth:    maxY - minY,\n\t\tCellSize: 0.2,\n\t})\n\n\tresults := gdopComp.ComputeAll()\n\tgaps := make([]Point, 0)\n\n\t// Find cells with poor or no coverage\n\tfor _, row := range results {\n\t\tfor _, cell := range row {\n\t\t\tif cell.Quality == \"poor\" || cell.Quality == \"none\" {\n\t\t\t\tgaps = append(gaps, Point{X: cell.X, Y: cell.Y, Z: cell.Z})\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Limit to top 10 worst coverage gaps\n\tif len(gaps) > 10 {\n\t\tgaps = gaps[:10]\n\t}\n\n\treturn gaps\n}\n\n// generateNodeAdditions creates specific node addition recommendations\nfunc generateNodeAdditions(space *Space, nodes *NodeSet, gaps []Point) []NodeAddition {\n\tadditions := make([]NodeAddition, 0)\n\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n\n\t// If we have coverage gaps, suggest adding nodes there\n\tfor i, gap := range gaps {\n\t\tif i >= 3 {\n\t\t\tbreak // Limit to 3 gap-based additions\n\t\t}\n\n\t\theightDesc := \"ceiling\"\n\t\tif gap.Z < 1.0 {\n\t\t\theightDesc = \"wall mount\"\n\t\t} else if gap.Z > 2.0 {\n\t\t\theightDesc = \"ceiling\"\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\theightDesc = \"high wall\"\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tadditions = append(additions, NodeAddition{\n\t\t\tID:          fmt.Sprintf(\"node-gap-%d\", i+1),\n\t\t\tName:        fmt.Sprintf(\"Gap Coverage Node %d\", i+1),\n\t\t\tPosition:    gap,\n\t\t\tRole:        \"tx_rx\",\n\t\t\tHeight:      heightDesc,\n\t\t\tImprovement: 0.2 + float64(3-i)*0.05, // Later gaps have lower priority\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\t// Suggest corner nodes if we have few nodes\n\tif nodes.Count() < 4 {\n\t\tcorners := CornerPositions(space)\n\t\tfor i := nodes.Count(); i < 4 && i < len(corners); i++ {\n\t\t\theightDesc := \"ceiling\"\n\t\t\tif corners[i].Z < 1.0 {\n\t\t\t\theightDesc = \"low\"\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tadditions = append(additions, NodeAddition{\n\t\t\t\tID:          fmt.Sprintf(\"node-corner-%d\", i+1),\n\t\t\t\tName:        fmt.Sprintf(\"Corner Node %d\", i+1),\n\t\t\t\tPosition:    corners[i],\n\t\t\t\tRole:        \"tx_rx\",\n\t\t\t\tHeight:      heightDesc,\n\t\t\t\tImprovement: 0.15,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If no specific additions, suggest a center node\n\tif len(additions) == 0 {\n\t\tadditions = append(additions, NodeAddition{\n\t\t\tID:          \"node-center-1\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"Center Node\",\n\t\t\tPosition:    Point{X: (minX + maxX) / 2, Y: (minY + maxY) / 2, Z: 2.0},\n\t\t\tRole:        \"tx_rx\",\n\t\t\tHeight:      \"ceiling\",\n\t\t\tImprovement: 0.1,\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\treturn additions\n}\n","numLines":553,"startLine":1,"totalLines":553}}}
