(\n4\t\t\"encoding/binary\"\n5\t\t\"math\"\n6\t\t\"math/rand\"\n7\t)\n8\t\n9\tconst (\n10\t\t// WiFi physical constants\n11\t\twavelength        = 0.123     // meters (2.4 GHz)\n12\t\thalfWavelength    = wavelength / 2.0\n13\t\tsubcarrierSpacing = 312.5e3 // Hz\n14\t\tc                 = 3e8     // speed of light m/s\n15\t\n16\t\t// CSI frame constants — must match ingestion/frame.go format\n17\t\tnSub = 64 // number of subcarriers for HT20\n18\t\n19\t\t// Path loss model constants (log-distance model)\n20\t\t// PL(d) = PL_0 + 10*n*log10(d/d_0)\n21\t\tpl0    = 40.0 // dBm reference power at d0\n22\t\td0     = 1.0   // meters reference distance\n23\t\tn      = 2.0   // path loss exponent (free space)\n24\t\n25\t\t// Reflection coefficient (power, dimensionless)\n26\t\treflectionCoeff = 0.3\n27\t)\n28\t\n29\t// generateCSIFrame generates a synthetic CSI binary frame.\n30\t// The frame format matches the ingestion layer (ingestion/frame.go):\n31\t//\n32\t//\tHeader (24 bytes fixed):\n33\t//\t  [0:6]   node_mac     — TX node MAC address\n34\t//\t  [6:12]  peer_mac     — RX node MAC address\n35\t//\t  [12:20] timestamp_us — uint64 LE, microseconds since node boot\n36\t//\t  [20]    rssi         — int8, dBm\n37\t//\t  [21]    noise_floor  — int8, dBm\n38\t//\t  [22]    channel      — uint8, WiFi channel\n39\t//\t  [23]    n_sub        — uint8, subcarrier count\n40\t//\tPayload (n_sub × 2 bytes):\n41\t//\t  Per subcarrier: int8 I, int8 Q\n42\tfunc generateCSIFrame(tx, rx *VirtualNode, walkers []*Walker, walls []Wall, frameNum int, rng *rand.Rand) []byte {\n43\t\t// Calculate combined CSI from all walkers\n44\t\tamplitude, phaseBase := computeCSIForWalkers(tx, rx, walkers, walls)\n45\t\n46\t\t// Compute RSSI from amplitude\n47\t\trssi := amplitudeToRSSI(amplitude)\n48\t\n49\t\t// Create frame buffer (headerSize=24 defined in main.go)\n50\t\tframe := make([]byte, headerSize+nSub*2)\n51\t\n52\t\t// Write header (matches ingestion/frame.go ParseFrame layout)\n53\t\tcopy(frame[0:6], tx.MAC[:])   // node_mac\n54\t\tcopy(frame[6:12], rx.MAC[:])  // peer_mac\n55\t\tbinary.LittleEndian.PutUint64(frame[12:20], uint64(frameNum*50000)) // timestamp_us\n56\t\tframe[20] = byte(rssi)        // rssi\n57\t\tvar noiseFloor int8 = -95\n58\t\tframe[21] = byte(noiseFloor) // noise_floor: -95 dBm\n59\t\tframe[22] = byte(*flagChannel) // channel (from --channel flag)\n60\t\tframe[23] = nSub              // n_sub\n61\t\n62\t\t// Generate I/Q pairs for each subcarrier\n63\t\tfor k := 0; k < nSub; k++ {\n64\t\t\t// Phase for this subcarrier\n65\t\t\tphase := phaseBase + float64(k)*0.1\n66\t\n67\t\t\t// Add temporal variation\n68\t\t\tphase += 0.1 * math.Sin(2*math.Pi*float64(frameNum)/100.0)\n69\t\n70\t\t\t// Normalize phase to [-π, π]\n71\t\t\tfor phase > math.Pi {\n72\t\t\t\tphase -= 2 * math.Pi\n73\t\t\t}\n74\t\t\tfor phase < -math.Pi {\n75\t\t\t\tphase += 2 * math.Pi\n76\t\t\t}\n77\t\n78\t\t\t// Add frequency-selective fading\n79\t\t\tfreqFading := 0.8 + 0.4*math.Sin(2*math.Pi*float64(k)/16.0)\n80\t\t\tsubAmplitude := amplitude * freqFading\n81\t\n82\t\t\t// Generate I/Q with noise\n83\t\t\ti, q := generateIQPair(subAmplitude, phase, rng)\n84\t\n85\t\t\t// Write to payload (interleaved I,Q)\n86\t\t\toffset := headerSize + k*2\n87\t\t\tframe[offset] = byte(i)\n88\t\t\tframe[offset+1] = byte(q)\n89\t\t}\n90\t\n91\t\treturn frame\n92\t}\n93\t\n94\t// computeCSIForWalkers computes the combined CSI amplitude and phase from all walkers\n95\t// using a two-ray propagation model (direct path + first-order reflection).\n96\tfunc computeCSIForWalkers(tx, rx *VirtualNode, walkers []*Walker, walls []Wall) (float64, float64) {\n97\t\tif len(walkers) == 0 {\n98\t\t\t// No walkers, return baseline noise\n99\t\t\treturn 0.001, 0.0\n100\t\t}\n101\t\n102\t\tvar totalAmplitude float64\n103\t\tvar totalPhase float64\n104\t\tvar weight float64\n105\t\n106\t\tfor _, walker := range walkers {\n107\t\t\t// Direct path contribution\n108\t\t\tdirectAmp, directPhase := computeDirectPath(tx.Position, rx.Position, walker.Position, walls)\n109\t\n110\t\t\t// First-order reflection contribution (strongest reflected ray)\n111\t\t\treflAmp, reflPhase := computeFirstOrderReflection(tx.Position, rx.Position, walker.Position, walls)\n112\t\n113\t\t\t// Combine direct and reflected paths (coherent sum for two-ray model)\n114\t\t\t// The reflected ray interferes with the direct ray, creating constructive/destructive interference\n115\t\t\tcombinedAmp := directAmp + reflAmp*math.Cos(directPhase-reflPhase)\n116\t\t\tcombinedPhase := math.Atan2(\n117\t\t\t\tdirectAmp*math.Sin(directPhase)+reflAmp*math.Sin(reflPhase),\n118\t\t\t\tdirectAmp*math.Cos(directPhase)+reflAmp*math.Cos(reflPhase),\n119\t\t\t)\n120\t\n121\t\t\t// Scale to reasonable values\n122\t\t\tcombinedAmp *= 1000.0\n123\t\n124\t\t\t// Accumulate\n125\t\t\ttotalAmplitude += combinedAmp\n126\t\t\ttotalPhase += combinedPhase\n127\t\t\tweight += 1.0\n128\t\t}\n129\t\n130\t\t// Normalize phase\n131\t\tif weight > 0 {\n132\t\t\ttotalPhase /= weight\n133\t\t}\n134\t\n135\t\treturn totalAmplitude, totalPhase\n136\t}\n137\t\n138\t// computeDirectPath computes the CSI contribution from the direct path\n139\t// through the walker to the receiver, using the log-distance path loss model.\n140\tfunc computeDirectPath(tx, rx, walker Point, walls []Wall) (float64, float64) {\n141\t\t// Distance from TX to walker\n142\t\td1 := distance(tx, walker)\n143\t\t// Distance from walker to RX\n144\t\td2 := distance(walker, rx)\n145\t\t// Total path length\n146\t\tdTotal := d1 + d2\n147\t\n148\t\t// Direct TX-RX distance (for Fresnel zone calculation)\n149\t\tdDirect := distance(tx, rx)\n150\t\n151\t\t// Path length excess for Fresnel zone calculation\n152\t\texcess := dTotal - dDirect\n153\t\tif excess < 0 {\n154\t\t\texcess = 0\n155\t\t}\n156\t\n157\t\t// Fresnel zone number\n158\t\tzoneNumber := int(math.Ceil(excess / halfWavelength))\n159\t\tif zoneNumber < 1 {\n160\t\t\tzoneNumber = 1\n161\t\t}\n162\t\n163\t\t// Zone decay (inverse square)\n164\t\tdecay := 1.0 / math.Pow(float64(zoneNumber), 2.0)\n165\t\n166\t\t// Log-distance path loss model: PL(d) = PL_0 + 10*n*log10(d/d_0)\n167\t\tvar pathLossDB float64\n168\t\tif dTotal >= d0 {\n169\t\t\tpathLossDB = pl0 + 10.0*n*math.Log10(dTotal/d0)\n170\t\t} else {\n171\t\t\t// For distances < d0, use free space approximation\n172\t\t\tpathLossDB = pl0\n173\t\t}\n174\t\n175\t\t// Wall attenuation on the direct path\n176\t\twallLoss := computeWallLoss(tx, walker, walls)\n177\t\twallLoss += computeWallLoss(walker, rx, walls)\n178\t\n179\t\t// Total loss in dB\n180\t\ttotalLossDB := pathLossDB + wallLoss\n181\t\n182\t\t// Convert to linear amplitude\n183\t\tamplitude := math.Pow(10.0, -totalLossDB/20.0)\n184\t\n185\t\t// Apply Fresnel zone decay\n186\t\tamplitude *= decay\n187\t\n188\t\t// Phase at this position (based on total path length)\n189\t\tphase := 2 * math.Pi * dTotal / wavelength\n190\t\n191\t\treturn amplitude, phase\n192\t}\n193\t\n194\t// computeFirstOrderReflection computes the CSI contribution from the strongest\n195\t// first-order reflection off a wall segment. Uses image method to find reflection point.\n196\tfunc computeFirstOrderReflection(tx, rx, walker Point, walls []Wall) (float64, float64) {\n197\t\tvar bestReflAmp float64\n198\t\tvar bestReflPhase float64\n199\t\tvar foundReflection bool\n200\t\n201\t\tfor _, wall := range walls {\n202\t\t\t// Compute reflection point using image method\n203\t\t\treflPoint, ok := findReflectionPoint(tx, rx, wall)\n204\t\t\tif !ok {\n205\t\t\t\tcontinue\n206\t\t\t}\n207\t\n208\t\t\t// Reflected path: TX -> reflection point -> RX\n209\t\t\tdTxRefl := distance(tx, reflPoint)\n210\t\t\tdReflRx := distance(reflPoint, rx)\n211\t\t\tdReflTotal := dTxRefl + dReflRx\n212\t\n213\t\t\t// Direct path length (for comparison)\n214\t\t\tdDirect := distance(tx, rx)\n215\t\n216\t\t\t// Log-distance path loss for reflected path\n217\t\t\tvar pathLossDB float64\n218\t\t\tif dReflTotal >= d0 {\n219\t\t\t\tpathLossDB = pl0 + 10.0*n*math.Log10(dReflTotal/d0)\n220\t\t\t} else {\n221\t\t\t\tpathLossDB = pl0\n222\t\t\t}\n223\t\n224\t\t\t// Wall attenuation (transmission loss through wall if any)\n225\t\t\t// Plus reflection loss (weakest material first = lowest attenuation)\n226\t\t\twallLoss := wall.Attenuation\n227\t\n228\t\t\t// Total loss in dB\n229\t\t\ttotalLossDB := pathLossDB + wallLoss\n230\t\n231\t\t\t// Convert to linear amplitude\n232\t\t\tamplitude := math.Pow(10.0, -totalLossDB/20.0)\n233\t\n234\t\t\t// Apply reflection coefficient (power coefficient)\n235\t\t\tamplitude *= math.Sqrt(reflectionCoeff)\n236\t\n237\t\t\t// Normalize by direct path loss (so reflected ray is relative to direct)\n238\t\t\tdirectPathLoss := pl0 + 10.0*n*math.Log10(dDirect/d0)\n239\t\t\tamplitude *= math.Pow(10.0, (directPathLoss-pathLossDB)/20.0)\n240\t\n241\t\t\t// Phase based on reflected path length\n242\t\t\tphase := 2 * math.Pi * dReflTotal / wavelength\n243\t\n244\t\t\t// Keep the strongest reflection (lowest attenuation)\n245\t\t\tif !foundReflection || amplitude > bestReflAmp {\n246\t\t\t\tbestReflAmp = amplitude\n247\t\t\t\tbestReflPhase = phase\n248\t\t\t\tfoundReflection = true\n249\t\t\t}\n250\t\t}\n251\t\n252\t\tif !foundReflection {\n253\t\t\treturn 0, 0\n254\t\t}\n255\t\n256\t\treturn bestReflAmp, bestReflPhase\n257\t}\n258\t\n259\t// findReflectionPoint finds the specular reflection point on a wall segment\n260\t// for a ray from TX to RX using the image method.\n261\t// Returns the reflection point and true if a valid reflection exists, false otherwise.\n262\tfunc findReflectionPoint(tx, rx Point, wall Wall) (Point, bool) {\n263\t\t// For a vertical wall segment (in 2D floor plane), the reflection point\n264\t\t// is found by reflecting the TX across the wall line and finding the\n265\t\t// intersection with the wall segment.\n266\t\n267\t\t// Wall line equation: ax + by + c = 0\n268\t\t// For vertical wall from (x1, y1) to (x2, y2):\n269\t\t// If x1 == x2 (vertical wall), reflection is straightforward\n270\t\tif math.Abs(wall.X1-wall.X2) < 1e-6 {\n271\t\t\t// Vertical wall at x = wall.X1\n272\t\t\t// Reflect TX across the wall\n273\t\t\treflTxX := 2*wall.X1 - tx.X\n274\t\t\treflTxY := tx.Y\n275\t\n276\t\t\t// Find intersection of line from reflTx to RX with the wall\n277\t\t\t// Parametric line: reflTx + t*(rx - reflTx)\n278\t\t\tdx := rx.X - reflTxX\n279\t\t\tdy := rx.Y - reflTxY\n280\t\n281\t\t\tif math.Abs(dx) < 1e-6 {\n282\t\t\t\t// Line is vertical, no intersection with vertical wall (or parallel)\n283\t\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n284\t\t\t}\n285\t\n286\t\t\tt := (wall.X1 - reflTxX) / dx\n287\t\n288\t\t\t// Compute intersection point\n289\t\t\tintersectY := reflTxY + t*dy\n290\t\n291\t\t\t// Check if intersection is within wall segment bounds\n292\t\t\tminY := math.Min(wall.Y1, wall.Y2)\n293\t\t\tmaxY := math.Max(wall.Y1, wall.Y2)\n294\t\n295\t\t\tif intersectY < minY || intersectY > maxY {\n296\t\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n297\t\t\t}\n298\t\n299\t\t\t// Z coordinate is average of TX and RX Z (reflection in vertical plane)\n300\t\t\tintersectZ := (tx.Z + rx.Z) / 2.0\n301\t\n302\t\t\treturn Point{X: wall.X1, Y: intersectY, Z: intersectZ}, true\n303\t\t}\n304\t\n305\t\t// For horizontal wall segment (y1 == y2)\n306\t\tif math.Abs(wall.Y1-wall.Y2) < 1e-6 {\n307\t\t\t// Horizontal wall at y = wall.Y1\n308\t\t\t// Reflect TX across the wall\n309\t\t\treflTxX := tx.X\n310\t\t\treflTxY := 2*wall.Y1 - tx.Y\n311\t\n312\t\t\t// Find intersection of line from reflTx to RX with the wall\n313\t\t\tdx := rx.X - reflTxX\n314\t\t\tdy := rx.Y - reflTxY\n315\t\n316\t\t\tif math.Abs(dy) < 1e-6 {\n317\t\t\t\t// Line is horizontal, no intersection\n318\t\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n319\t\t\t}\n320\t\n321\t\t\tt := (wall.Y1 - reflTxY) / dy\n322\t\n323\t\t\t// Compute intersection point\n324\t\t\tintersectX := reflTxX + t*dx\n325\t\n326\t\t\t// Check if intersection is within wall segment bounds\n327\t\t\tminX := math.Min(wall.X1, wall.X2)\n328\t\t\tmaxX := math.Max(wall.X1, wall.X2)\n329\t\n330\t\t\tif intersectX < minX || intersectX > maxX {\n331\t\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n332\t\t\t}\n333\t\n334\t\t\t// Z coordinate is average of TX and RX Z\n335\t\t\tintersectZ := (tx.Z + rx.Z) / 2.0\n336\t\n337\t\t\treturn Point{X: intersectX, Y: wall.Y1, Z: intersectZ}, true\n338\t\t}\n339\t\n340\t\t// General case: angled wall segment\n341\t\t// Compute line intersection\n342\t\t// Wall line: (x1, y1) to (x2, y2)\n343\t\t// Ray from reflected TX to RX\n344\t\n345\t\t// Reflect TX across the wall line\n346\t\treflTx := reflectPointAcrossLine(tx, Point{X: wall.X1, Y: wall.Y1, Z: 0}, Point{X: wall.X2, Y: wall.Y2, Z: 0})\n347\t\n348\t\t// Find intersection of line from reflTx to RX with the wall line\n349\t\tintersect, ok := lineIntersection(\n350\t\t\treflTx, rx,\n351\t\t\tPoint{X: wall.X1, Y: wall.Y1, Z: 0}, Point{X: wall.X2, Y: wall.Y2, Z: 0},\n352\t\t)\n353\t\tif !ok {\n354\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n355\t\t}\n356\t\n357\t\t// Check if intersection is within wall segment bounds\n358\t\tminX := math.Min(wall.X1, wall.X2)\n359\t\tmaxX := math.Max(wall.X1, wall.X2)\n360\t\tminY := math.Min(wall.Y1, wall.Y2)\n361\t\tmaxY := math.Max(wall.Y1, wall.Y2)\n362\t\n363\t\tif intersect.X < minX || intersect.X > maxX || intersect.Y < minY || intersect.Y > maxY {\n364\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n365\t\t}\n366\t\n367\t\t// Z coordinate is average of TX and RX Z\n368\t\tintersect.Z = (tx.Z + rx.Z) / 2.0\n369\t\n370\t\treturn intersect, true\n371\t}\n372\t\n373\t// reflectPointAcrossLine reflects a point across a line defined by two points.\n374\t// Uses the formula for reflection of a point across a line in 2D.\n375\tfunc reflectPointAcrossLine(p, lineStart, lineEnd Point) Point {\n376\t\t// Line direction vector\n377\t\tlx := lineEnd.X - lineStart.X\n378\t\tly := lineEnd.Y - lineStart.Y\n379\t\n380\t\t// Vector from line start to point\n381\t\tpx := p.X - lineStart.X\n382\t\tpy := p.Y - lineStart.Y\n383\t\n384\t\t// Project p onto the line (dot product)\n385\t\tdot := px*lx + py*ly\n386\t\tlenSq := lx*lx + ly*ly\n387\t\n388\t\tif lenSq < 1e-10 {\n389\t\t\t// Line segment is too short\n390\t\t\treturn p\n391\t\t}\n392\t\n393\t\t// Projection parameter\n394\t\tt := dot / lenSq\n395\t\n396\t\t// Closest point on line\n397\t\tclosestX := lineStart.X + t*lx\n398\t\tclosestY := lineStart.Y + t*ly\n399\t\n400\t\t// Reflected point: p' = closest + (closest - p) = 2*closest - p\n401\t\treturn Point{\n402\t\t\tX: 2*closestX - p.X,\n403\t\t\tY: 2*closestY - p.Y,\n404\t\t\tZ: p.Z,\n405\t\t}\n406\t}\n407\t\n408\t// lineIntersection finds the intersection point of two line segments in 2D.\n409\t// Returns the intersection point and true if the lines intersect, false otherwise.\n410\tfunc lineIntersection(p1, p2, p3, p4 Point) (Point, bool) {\n411\t\t// Line 1: p1 to p2\n412\t\t// Line 2: p3 to p4\n413\t\n414\t\tx1, y1 := p1.X, p1.Y\n415\t\tx2, y2 := p2.X, p2.Y\n416\t\tx3, y3 := p3.X, p3.Y\n417\t\tx4, y4 := p4.X, p4.Y\n418\t\n419\t\t// Compute denominator\n420\t\tdenom := (x1-x2)*(y3-y4) - (y1-y2)*(x3-x4)\n421\t\tif math.Abs(denom) < 1e-10 {\n422\t\t\t// Lines are parallel\n423\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n424\t\t}\n425\t\n426\t\t// Compute intersection point using parametric form\n427\t\tt := ((x1-x3)*(y3-y4) - (y1-y3)*(x3-x4)) / denom\n428\t\tu := -((x1-x2)*(y1-y3) - (y1-y2)*(x1-x3)) / denom\n429\t\n430\t\t// Check if intersection is within both line segments\n431\t\tif t < 0 || t > 1 || u < 0 || u > 1 {\n432\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n433\t\t}\n434\t\n435\t\t// Compute intersection point\n436\t\tintersectX := x1 + t*(x2-x1)\n437\t\tintersectY := y1 + t*(y2-y1)\n438\t\n439\t\treturn Point{X: intersectX, Y: intersectY}, true\n440\t}\n441\t\n442\t// distance computes Euclidean distance between two points\n443\tfunc distance(a, b Point) float64 {\n444\t\tdx := a.X - b.X\n445\t\tdy := a.Y - b.Y\n446\t\tdz := a.Z - b.Z\n447\t\treturn math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n448\t}\n449\t\n450\t// computeWallLoss computes wall attenuation for a path through all walls.\n451\t// For each wall the path intersects, add the wall's attenuation value.\n452\tfunc computeWallLoss(from, to Point, walls []Wall) float64 {\n453\t\ttotalLoss := 0.0\n454\t\n455\t\tfor _, wall := range walls {\n456\t\t\tif pathIntersectsWall(from.X, from.Y, to.X, to.Y, wall.X1, wall.Y1, wall.X2, wall.Y2) {\n457\t\t\t\ttotalLoss += wall.Attenuation\n458\t\t\t}\n459\t\t}\n460\t\n461\t\treturn totalLoss\n462\t}\n463\t\n464\t// pathIntersectsWall checks if a path intersects a wall segment (2D)\n465\tfunc pathIntersectsWall(x1, y1, x2, y2, wx1, wy1, wx2, wy2 float64) bool {\n466\t\t// Compute orientations\n467\t\tccw := func(ax, ay, bx, by, cx, cy float64) float64 {\n468\t\t\treturn (bx-ax)*(cy-ay) - (by-ay)*(cx-ax)\n469\t\t}\n470\t\n471\t\to1 := ccw(x1, y1, x2, y2, wx1, wy1)\n472\t\to2 := ccw(x1, y1, x2, y2, wx2, wy2)\n473\t\to3 := ccw(wx1, wy1, wx2, wy2, x1, y1)\n474\t\to4 := ccw(wx1, wy1, wx2, wy2, x2, y2)\n475\t\n476\t\t// Check for intersection\n477\t\treturn o1*o2 < 0 && o3*o4 < 0\n478\t}\n479\t\n480\t// amplitudeToRSSI converts amplitude to RSSI in dBm\n481\tfunc amplitudeToRSSI(amplitude float64) int8 {\n482\t\t// Convert amplitude to dBm (reference: amplitude 1.0 = -30 dBm)\n483\t\tamplitudeDBm := -30.0 + 20.0*math.Log10(amplitude)\n484\t\n485\t\t// Clamp to realistic range\n486\t\tif amplitudeDBm < -90 {\n487\t\t\tamplitudeDBm = -90\n488\t\t}\n489\t\tif amplitudeDBm > -30 {\n490\t\t\tamplitudeDBm = -30\n491\t\t}\n492\t\n493\t\treturn int8(amplitudeDBm)\n494\t}\n495\t\n496\t// generateIQPair generates a synthetic I/Q pair with Gaussian noise\n497\tfunc generateIQPair(amplitude, phase float64, rng *rand.Rand) (int8, int8) {\n498\t\t// Box-Muller transform for Gaussian noise\n499\t\tu1 := rng.Float64()\n500\t\tu2 := rng.Float64()\n501\t\tz0 := math.Sqrt(-2.0*math.Log(u1)) * math.Cos(2.0*math.Pi*u2)\n502\t\tz1 := math.Sqrt(-2.0*math.Log(u1)) * math.Sin(2.0*math.Pi*u2)\n503\t\n504\t\tnoiseI := z0 * *flagNoiseSigma\n505\t\tnoiseQ := z1 * *flagNoiseSigma\n506\t\n507\t\t// Convert to I/Q\n508\t\ti := amplitude*math.Cos(phase) + noiseI\n509\t\tq := amplitude*math.Sin(phase) + noiseQ\n510\t\n511\t\t// Scale to int8 range\n512\t\tscale := 127.0 / 10.0 // Scale factor\n513\t\ti *= scale\n514\t\tq *= scale\n515\t\n516\t\t// Clamp to int8 range [-127, 127]\n517\t\tif i > 127 {\n518\t\t\ti = 127\n519\t\t}\n520\t\tif i < -127 {\n521\t\t\ti = -127\n522\t\t}\n523\t\tif q > 127 {\n524\t\t\tq = 127\n525\t\t}\n526\t\tif q < -127 {\n527\t\t\tq = -127\n528\t\t}\n529\t\n530\t\treturn int8(i), int8(q)\n531\t}\n532\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"eecb8034-1f22-4ebd-a931-2e1a46645cf1","uuid":"e05b5d65-f7d8-434e-beff-fc51e4288db4","timestamp":"2026-05-06T03:00:19.946Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/spaxel/mothership/cmd/sim/generator.go","content":"package main\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/binary\"\n\t\"math\"\n\t\"math/rand\"\n)\n\nconst (\n\t// WiFi physical constants\n\twavelength        = 0.123     // meters (2.4 GHz)\n\thalfWavelength    = wavelength / 2.0\n\tsubcarrierSpacing = 312.5e3 // Hz\n\tc                 = 3e8     // speed of light m/s\n\n\t// CSI frame constants — must match ingestion/frame.go format\n\tnSub = 64 // number of subcarriers for HT20\n\n\t// Path loss model constants (log-distance model)\n\t// PL(d) = PL_0 + 10*n*log10(d/d_0)\n\tpl0    = 40.0 // dBm reference power at d0\n\td0     = 1.0   // meters reference distance\n\tn      = 2.0   // path loss exponent (free space)\n\n\t// Reflection coefficient (power, dimensionless)\n\treflectionCoeff = 0.3\n)\n\n// generateCSIFrame generates a synthetic CSI binary frame.\n// The frame format matches the ingestion layer (ingestion/frame.go):\n//\n//\tHeader (24 bytes fixed):\n//\t  [0:6]   node_mac     — TX node MAC address\n//\t  [6:12]  peer_mac     — RX node MAC address\n//\t  [12:20] timestamp_us — uint64 LE, microseconds since node boot\n//\t  [20]    rssi         — int8, dBm\n//\t  [21]    noise_floor  — int8, dBm\n//\t  [22]    channel      — uint8, WiFi channel\n//\t  [23]    n_sub        — uint8, subcarrier count\n//\tPayload (n_sub × 2 bytes):\n//\t  Per subcarrier: int8 I, int8 Q\nfunc generateCSIFrame(tx, rx *VirtualNode, walkers []*Walker, walls []Wall, frameNum int, rng *rand.Rand) []byte {\n\t// Calculate combined CSI from all walkers\n\tamplitude, phaseBase := computeCSIForWalkers(tx, rx, walkers, walls)\n\n\t// Compute RSSI from amplitude\n\trssi := amplitudeToRSSI(amplitude)\n\n\t// Create frame buffer (headerSize=24 defined in main.go)\n\tframe := make([]byte, headerSize+nSub*2)\n\n\t// Write header (matches ingestion/frame.go ParseFrame layout)\n\tcopy(frame[0:6], tx.MAC[:])   // node_mac\n\tcopy(frame[6:12], rx.MAC[:])  // peer_mac\n\tbinary.LittleEndian.PutUint64(frame[12:20], uint64(frameNum*50000)) // timestamp_us\n\tframe[20] = byte(rssi)        // rssi\n\tvar noiseFloor int8 = -95\n\tframe[21] = byte(noiseFloor) // noise_floor: -95 dBm\n\tframe[22] = byte(*flagChannel) // channel (from --channel flag)\n\tframe[23] = nSub              // n_sub\n\n\t// Generate I/Q pairs for each subcarrier\n\tfor k := 0; k < nSub; k++ {\n\t\t// Phase for this subcarrier\n\t\tphase := phaseBase + float64(k)*0.1\n\n\t\t// Add temporal variation\n\t\tphase += 0.1 * math.Sin(2*math.Pi*float64(frameNum)/100.0)\n\n\t\t// Normalize phase to [-π, π]\n\t\tfor phase > math.Pi {\n\t\t\tphase -= 2 * math.Pi\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor phase < -math.Pi {\n\t\t\tphase += 2 * math.Pi\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Add frequency-selective fading\n\t\tfreqFading := 0.8 + 0.4*math.Sin(2*math.Pi*float64(k)/16.0)\n\t\tsubAmplitude := amplitude * freqFading\n\n\t\t// Generate I/Q with noise\n\t\ti, q := generateIQPair(subAmplitude, phase, rng)\n\n\t\t// Write to payload (interleaved I,Q)\n\t\toffset := headerSize + k*2\n\t\tframe[offset] = byte(i)\n\t\tframe[offset+1] = byte(q)\n\t}\n\n\treturn frame\n}\n\n// computeCSIForWalkers computes the combined CSI amplitude and phase from all walkers\n// using a two-ray propagation model (direct path + first-order reflection).\nfunc computeCSIForWalkers(tx, rx *VirtualNode, walkers []*Walker, walls []Wall) (float64, float64) {\n\tif len(walkers) == 0 {\n\t\t// No walkers, return baseline noise\n\t\treturn 0.001, 0.0\n\t}\n\n\tvar totalAmplitude float64\n\tvar totalPhase float64\n\tvar weight float64\n\n\tfor _, walker := range walkers {\n\t\t// Direct path contribution\n\t\tdirectAmp, directPhase := computeDirectPath(tx.Position, rx.Position, walker.Position, walls)\n\n\t\t// First-order reflection contribution (strongest reflected ray)\n\t\treflAmp, reflPhase := computeFirstOrderReflection(tx.Position, rx.Position, walker.Position, walls)\n\n\t\t// Combine direct and reflected paths (coherent sum for two-ray model)\n\t\t// The reflected ray interferes with the direct ray, creating constructive/destructive interference\n\t\tcombinedAmp := directAmp + reflAmp*math.Cos(directPhase-reflPhase)\n\t\tcombinedPhase := math.Atan2(\n\t\t\tdirectAmp*math.Sin(directPhase)+reflAmp*math.Sin(reflPhase),\n\t\t\tdirectAmp*math.Cos(directPhase)+reflAmp*math.Cos(reflPhase),\n\t\t)\n\n\t\t// Scale to reasonable values\n\t\tcombinedAmp *= 1000.0\n\n\t\t// Accumulate\n\t\ttotalAmplitude += combinedAmp\n\t\ttotalPhase += combinedPhase\n\t\tweight += 1.0\n\t}\n\n\t// Normalize phase\n\tif weight > 0 {\n\t\ttotalPhase /= weight\n\t}\n\n\treturn totalAmplitude, totalPhase\n}\n\n// computeDirectPath computes the CSI contribution from the direct path\n// through the walker to the receiver, using the log-distance path loss model.\nfunc computeDirectPath(tx, rx, walker Point, walls []Wall) (float64, float64) {\n\t// Distance from TX to walker\n\td1 := distance(tx, walker)\n\t// Distance from walker to RX\n\td2 := distance(walker, rx)\n\t// Total path length\n\tdTotal := d1 + d2\n\n\t// Direct TX-RX distance (for Fresnel zone calculation)\n\tdDirect := distance(tx, rx)\n\n\t// Path length excess for Fresnel zone calculation\n\texcess := dTotal - dDirect\n\tif excess < 0 {\n\t\texcess = 0\n\t}\n\n\t// Fresnel zone number\n\tzoneNumber := int(math.Ceil(excess / halfWavelength))\n\tif zoneNumber < 1 {\n\t\tzoneNumber = 1\n\t}\n\n\t// Zone decay (inverse square)\n\tdecay := 1.0 / math.Pow(float64(zoneNumber), 2.0)\n\n\t// Log-distance path loss model: PL(d) = PL_0 + 10*n*log10(d/d_0)\n\tvar pathLossDB float64\n\tif dTotal >= d0 {\n\t\tpathLossDB = pl0 + 10.0*n*math.Log10(dTotal/d0)\n\t} else {\n\t\t// For distances < d0, use free space approximation\n\t\tpathLossDB = pl0\n\t}\n\n\t// Wall attenuation on the direct path\n\twallLoss := computeWallLoss(tx, walker, walls)\n\twallLoss += computeWallLoss(walker, rx, walls)\n\n\t// Total loss in dB\n\ttotalLossDB := pathLossDB + wallLoss\n\n\t// Convert to linear amplitude\n\tamplitude := math.Pow(10.0, -totalLossDB/20.0)\n\n\t// Apply Fresnel zone decay\n\tamplitude *= decay\n\n\t// Phase at this position (based on total path length)\n\tphase := 2 * math.Pi * dTotal / wavelength\n\n\treturn amplitude, phase\n}\n\n// computeFirstOrderReflection computes the CSI contribution from the strongest\n// first-order reflection off a wall segment. Uses image method to find reflection point.\nfunc computeFirstOrderReflection(tx, rx, walker Point, walls []Wall) (float64, float64) {\n\tvar bestReflAmp float64\n\tvar bestReflPhase float64\n\tvar foundReflection bool\n\n\tfor _, wall := range walls {\n\t\t// Compute reflection point using image method\n\t\treflPoint, ok := findReflectionPoint(tx, rx, wall)\n\t\tif !ok {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Reflected path: TX -> reflection point -> RX\n\t\tdTxRefl := distance(tx, reflPoint)\n\t\tdReflRx := distance(reflPoint, rx)\n\t\tdReflTotal := dTxRefl + dReflRx\n\n\t\t// Direct path length (for comparison)\n\t\tdDirect := distance(tx, rx)\n\n\t\t// Log-distance path loss for reflected path\n\t\tvar pathLossDB float64\n\t\tif dReflTotal >= d0 {\n\t\t\tpathLossDB = pl0 + 10.0*n*math.Log10(dReflTotal/d0)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tpathLossDB = pl0\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Wall attenuation (transmission loss through wall if any)\n\t\t// Plus reflection loss (weakest material first = lowest attenuation)\n\t\twallLoss := wall.Attenuation\n\n\t\t// Total loss in dB\n\t\ttotalLossDB := pathLossDB + wallLoss\n\n\t\t// Convert to linear amplitude\n\t\tamplitude := math.Pow(10.0, -totalLossDB/20.0)\n\n\t\t// Apply reflection coefficient (power coefficient)\n\t\tamplitude *= math.Sqrt(reflectionCoeff)\n\n\t\t// Normalize by direct path loss (so reflected ray is relative to direct)\n\t\tdirectPathLoss := pl0 + 10.0*n*math.Log10(dDirect/d0)\n\t\tamplitude *= math.Pow(10.0, (directPathLoss-pathLossDB)/20.0)\n\n\t\t// Phase based on reflected path length\n\t\tphase := 2 * math.Pi * dReflTotal / wavelength\n\n\t\t// Keep the strongest reflection (lowest attenuation)\n\t\tif !foundReflection || amplitude > bestReflAmp {\n\t\t\tbestReflAmp = amplitude\n\t\t\tbestReflPhase = phase\n\t\t\tfoundReflection = true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif !foundReflection {\n\t\treturn 0, 0\n\t}\n\n\treturn bestReflAmp, bestReflPhase\n}\n\n// findReflectionPoint finds the specular reflection point on a wall segment\n// for a ray from TX to RX using the image method.\n// Returns the reflection point and true if a valid reflection exists, false otherwise.\nfunc findReflectionPoint(tx, rx Point, wall Wall) (Point, bool) {\n\t// For a vertical wall segment (in 2D floor plane), the reflection point\n\t// is found by reflecting the TX across the wall line and finding the\n\t// intersection with the wall segment.\n\n\t// Wall line equation: ax + by + c = 0\n\t// For vertical wall from (x1, y1) to (x2, y2):\n\t// If x1 == x2 (vertical wall), reflection is straightforward\n\tif math.Abs(wall.X1-wall.X2) < 1e-6 {\n\t\t// Vertical wall at x = wall.X1\n\t\t// Reflect TX across the wall\n\t\treflTxX := 2*wall.X1 - tx.X\n\t\treflTxY := tx.Y\n\n\t\t// Find intersection of line from reflTx to RX with the wall\n\t\t// Parametric line: reflTx + t*(rx - reflTx)\n\t\tdx := rx.X - reflTxX\n\t\tdy := rx.Y - reflTxY\n\n\t\tif math.Abs(dx) < 1e-6 {\n\t\t\t// Line is vertical, no intersection with vertical wall (or parallel)\n\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tt := (wall.X1 - reflTxX) / dx\n\n\t\t// Compute intersection point\n\t\tintersectY := reflTxY + t*dy\n\n\t\t// Check if intersection is within wall segment bounds\n\t\tminY := math.Min(wall.Y1, wall.Y2)\n\t\tmaxY := math.Max(wall.Y1, wall.Y2)\n\n\t\tif intersectY < minY || intersectY > maxY {\n\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Z coordinate is average of TX and RX Z (reflection in vertical plane)\n\t\tintersectZ := (tx.Z + rx.Z) / 2.0\n\n\t\treturn Point{X: wall.X1, Y: intersectY, Z: intersectZ}, true\n\t}\n\n\t// For horizontal wall segment (y1 == y2)\n\tif math.Abs(wall.Y1-wall.Y2) < 1e-6 {\n\t\t// Horizontal wall at y = wall.Y1\n\t\t// Reflect TX across the wall\n\t\treflTxX := tx.X\n\t\treflTxY := 2*wall.Y1 - tx.Y\n\n\t\t// Find intersection of line from reflTx to RX with the wall\n\t\tdx := rx.X - reflTxX\n\t\tdy := rx.Y - reflTxY\n\n\t\tif math.Abs(dy) < 1e-6 {\n\t\t\t// Line is horizontal, no intersection\n\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tt := (wall.Y1 - reflTxY) / dy\n\n\t\t// Compute intersection point\n\t\tintersectX := reflTxX + t*dx\n\n\t\t// Check if intersection is within wall segment bounds\n\t\tminX := math.Min(wall.X1, wall.X2)\n\t\tmaxX := math.Max(wall.X1, wall.X2)\n\n\t\tif intersectX < minX || intersectX > maxX {\n\t\t\treturn Point{}, false\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Z coordinate is average of TX and RX Z\n\t\tintersectZ := (tx.Z + rx.Z) / 2.0\n\n\t\treturn Point{X: intersectX, Y: wall.Y1, Z: intersectZ}, true\n\t}\n\n\t// General case: angled wall segment\n\t// Compute line intersection\n\t// Wall line: (x1, y1) to (x2, y2)\n\t// Ray from reflected TX to RX\n\n\t// Reflect TX across the wall line\n\treflTx := reflectPointAcrossLine(tx, Point{X: wall.X1, Y: wall.Y1, Z: 0}, Point{X: wall.X2, Y: wall.Y2, Z: 0})\n\n\t// Find intersection of line from reflTx to RX with the wall line\n\tintersect, ok := lineIntersection(\n\t\treflTx, rx,\n\t\tPoint{X: wall.X1, Y: wall.Y1, Z: 0}, Point{X: wall.X2, Y: wall.Y2, Z: 0},\n\t)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn Point{}, false\n\t}\n\n\t// Check if intersection is within wall segment bounds\n\tminX := math.Min(wall.X1, wall.X2)\n\tmaxX := math.Max(wall.X1, wall.X2)\n\tminY := math.Min(wall.Y1, wall.Y2)\n\tmaxY := math.Max(wall.Y1, wall.Y2)\n\n\tif intersect.X < minX || intersect.X > maxX || intersect.Y < minY || intersect.Y > maxY {\n\t\treturn Point{}, false\n\t}\n\n\t// Z coordinate is average of TX and RX Z\n\tintersect.Z = (tx.Z + rx.Z) / 2.0\n\n\treturn intersect, true\n}\n\n// reflectPointAcrossLine reflects a point across a line defined by two points.\n// Uses the formula for reflection of a point across a line in 2D.\nfunc reflectPointAcrossLine(p, lineStart, lineEnd Point) Point {\n\t// Line direction vector\n\tlx := lineEnd.X - lineStart.X\n\tly := lineEnd.Y - lineStart.Y\n\n\t// Vector from line start to point\n\tpx := p.X - lineStart.X\n\tpy := p.Y - lineStart.Y\n\n\t// Project p onto the line (dot product)\n\tdot := px*lx + py*ly\n\tlenSq := lx*lx + ly*ly\n\n\tif lenSq < 1e-10 {\n\t\t// Line segment is too short\n\t\treturn p\n\t}\n\n\t// Projection parameter\n\tt := dot / lenSq\n\n\t// Closest point on line\n\tclosestX := lineStart.X + t*lx\n\tclosestY := lineStart.Y + t*ly\n\n\t// Reflected point: p' = closest + (closest - p) = 2*closest - p\n\treturn Point{\n\t\tX: 2*closestX - p.X,\n\t\tY: 2*closestY - p.Y,\n\t\tZ: p.Z,\n\t}\n}\n\n// lineIntersection finds the intersection point of two line segments in 2D.\n// Returns the intersection point and true if the lines intersect, false otherwise.\nfunc lineIntersection(p1, p2, p3, p4 Point) (Point, bool) {\n\t// Line 1: p1 to p2\n\t// Line 2: p3 to p4\n\n\tx1, y1 := p1.X, p1.Y\n\tx2, y2 := p2.X, p2.Y\n\tx3, y3 := p3.X, p3.Y\n\tx4, y4 := p4.X, p4.Y\n\n\t// Compute denominator\n\tdenom := (x1-x2)*(y3-y4) - (y1-y2)*(x3-x4)\n\tif math.Abs(denom) < 1e-10 {\n\t\t// Lines are parallel\n\t\treturn Point{}, false\n\t}\n\n\t// Compute intersection point using parametric form\n\tt := ((x1-x3)*(y3-y4) - (y1-y3)*(x3-x4)) / denom\n\tu := -((x1-x2)*(y1-y3) - (y1-y2)*(x1-x3)) / denom\n\n\t// Check if intersection is within both line segments\n\tif t < 0 || t > 1 || u < 0 || u > 1 {\n\t\treturn Point{}, false\n\t}\n\n\t// Compute intersection point\n\tintersectX := x1 + t*(x2-x1)\n\tintersectY := y1 + t*(y2-y1)\n\n\treturn Point{X: intersectX, Y: intersectY}, true\n}\n\n// distance computes Euclidean distance between two points\nfunc distance(a, b Point) float64 {\n\tdx := a.X - b.X\n\tdy := a.Y - b.Y\n\tdz := a.Z - b.Z\n\treturn math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n}\n\n// computeWallLoss computes wall attenuation for a path through all walls.\n// For each wall the path intersects, add the wall's attenuation value.\nfunc computeWallLoss(from, to Point, walls []Wall) float64 {\n\ttotalLoss := 0.0\n\n\tfor _, wall := range walls {\n\t\tif pathIntersectsWall(from.X, from.Y, to.X, to.Y, wall.X1, wall.Y1, wall.X2, wall.Y2) {\n\t\t\ttotalLoss += wall.Attenuation\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn totalLoss\n}\n\n// pathIntersectsWall checks if a path intersects a wall segment (2D)\nfunc pathIntersectsWall(x1, y1, x2, y2, wx1, wy1, wx2, wy2 float64) bool {\n\t// Compute orientations\n\tccw := func(ax, ay, bx, by, cx, cy float64) float64 {\n\t\treturn (bx-ax)*(cy-ay) - (by-ay)*(cx-ax)\n\t}\n\n\to1 := ccw(x1, y1, x2, y2, wx1, wy1)\n\to2 := ccw(x1, y1, x2, y2, wx2, wy2)\n\to3 := ccw(wx1, wy1, wx2, wy2, x1, y1)\n\to4 := ccw(wx1, wy1, wx2, wy2, x2, y2)\n\n\t// Check for intersection\n\treturn o1*o2 < 0 && o3*o4 < 0\n}\n\n// amplitudeToRSSI converts amplitude to RSSI in dBm\nfunc amplitudeToRSSI(amplitude float64) int8 {\n\t// Convert amplitude to dBm (reference: amplitude 1.0 = -30 dBm)\n\tamplitudeDBm := -30.0 + 20.0*math.Log10(amplitude)\n\n\t// Clamp to realistic range\n\tif amplitudeDBm < -90 {\n\t\tamplitudeDBm = -90\n\t}\n\tif amplitudeDBm > -30 {\n\t\tamplitudeDBm = -30\n\t}\n\n\treturn int8(amplitudeDBm)\n}\n\n// generateIQPair generates a synthetic I/Q pair with Gaussian noise\nfunc generateIQPair(amplitude, phase float64, rng *rand.Rand) (int8, int8) {\n\t// Box-Muller transform for Gaussian noise\n\tu1 := rng.Float64()\n\tu2 := rng.Float64()\n\tz0 := math.Sqrt(-2.0*math.Log(u1)) * math.Cos(2.0*math.Pi*u2)\n\tz1 := math.Sqrt(-2.0*math.Log(u1)) * math.Sin(2.0*math.Pi*u2)\n\n\tnoiseI := z0 * *flagNoiseSigma\n\tnoiseQ := z1 * *flagNoiseSigma\n\n\t// Convert to I/Q\n\ti := amplitude*math.Cos(phase) + noiseI\n\tq := amplitude*math.Sin(phase) + noiseQ\n\n\t// Scale to int8 range\n\tscale := 127.0 / 10.0 // Scale factor\n\ti *= scale\n\tq *= scale\n\n\t// Clamp to int8 range [-127, 127]\n\tif i > 127 {\n\t\ti = 127\n\t}\n\tif i < -127 {\n\t\ti = -127\n\t}\n\tif q > 127 {\n\t\tq = 127\n\t}\n\tif q < -127 {\n\t\tq = -127\n\t}\n\n\treturn int8(i), int8(q)\n}\n","numLines":532,"startLine":1,"totalLines":532}}}

-1\n91\t\t\t}\n92\t\n93\t\t\t// Random velocity perturbation\n94\t\t\tperturbation := 0.1\n95\t\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.X += (rng.Float64() - 0.5) * perturbation\n96\t\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.Y += Rapid Z descent with high downward velocity\n110\t\t\telapsed := time.Since(s.FallStartTime).Seconds()\n111\t\t\tprogress := elapsed / params.DescentDuration.Seconds()\n112\t\n113\t\t\tif progress >= 1.0 {\n114\t\t\t\t// Fall complete\n115\t\t\t\ts.State = \"on_floor\"\n116\t\t\t\ts.Walker.Position.Z = params.EndZ\n117\t\t\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.X = 0\n118\t\t\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.Y = s.PreFallPosition.Z - params.EndZ\n124\t\t\t\ts.Walker.Position.Z = s.PreFallPosition.Z - zDrop*progress\n125\t\n126\t\t\t\t// Downward velocity exceeds threshold\n127\t\t\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.Z = -math.Abs(params.MinVelocity) - 0.5 // Add margin\n128\t\n129\t\t\t\t// Slight forward motion during fall\n130\t\t\t\ts.Walker.Position.X += s.PreFallVelocity.X * dt * 0.5\n131\t\t\t\ts.Walker.Position.Y += s.PreFallVelocity.Y * dt * 0.5\n132\t\t\t}\n133\t\n134\t\tcase \"on_floor\":\n135\t\t\t// Stay still on floor - no motion\n136\t\t\ts.Walker.Position.Z = params.EndZ\n137\t\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.X = 0\n138\t\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.Y = 0\n139\t\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.Z = 0\n140\t\n141\t\tcase \"recovering\":\n142\t\t\t// Quick recovery (for false positive test)\n143\t\t\ts.Walker.Position.Z += 0.5 * dt // Stand up quickly\n144\t\t\tif s.Walker.Position.Z >= s.Walker.Height {\n145\t\t\t\ts.Walker.Position.Z = s.Walker.Height\n146\t\t\t\ts.State = \"walking\"\n147\t\t\t}\n148\t\t}\n149\t}\n150\t\n151\t// StartFall triggers the fall sequence\n152\tfunc (s *FallScenarioState) StartFall(params FallScenarioParams) {\n153\t\ts.PreFallPosition = chunk)\n210\t\t\ttime.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)\n211\t\n212\t\t\ts.DownloadedBytes = (i + 1) * chunkSize\n213\t\t\tif s.DownloadedBytes > params.FirmwareSize {\n214\t\t\t\ts.DownloadedBytes = boot failure\n}\n\n// FallScenarioState tracks fall scenario state for a walker\ntype FallScenarioState struct {\n\tWalker          *Walker\n\tState           string // \"walking\", \"falling\", *FallScenarioState) UpdateForFallScenario(dt float64, params FallScenarioParams, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand) {\n\tswitch s.State {\n\tcase \"walking\":\n\t\t// Normal walking behavior\n\t\ts.Walker.Position.X += s.Walker.Velocity.X * dt\n\t\ts.Walker.Position.Y += s.Walker.Velocity.Y * dt\n\n\t\t// Bounce off walls\n\t\tmargin := 0.2\n\t\tif s.Walker.Position.X < margin {\n\t\t\ts.Walker.Position.X = margin\n\t\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.X *= -1\n\t\t}\n\t\tif s.Walker.Position.X > space.Width-margin {\n\t\t\ts.Walker.Position.X = space.Width - margin\n\t\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.X *= -1\n\t\t}\n\t\tif s.Walker.Position.Y < margin {\n\t\t\ts.Walker.Position.Y = margin\n\t\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.Y *= -1\n\t\t}\n\t\tif s.Walker.Position.Y > space.Depth-margin {\n\t\t\ts.Walker.Position.Y = space.Depth - margin\n\t\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.Y *= -1\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Random velocity perturbation\n\t\tperturbation := 0.1\n\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.X += (rng.Float64() - 0.5) * perturbation\n\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.Y += (rng.Float64() - 0.5) * perturbation\n\n\t\t// Clamp velocity\n\t\tspeed := s.Walker.Speed * (0.5 + rng.Float64()*0.5)\n\t\tcurrentSpeed := math.Sqrt(s.Walker.Velocity.X*s.Walker.Velocity.X + s.Walker.Velocity.Y*s.Walker.Velocity.Y)\n\t\tif currentSpeed > 0 {\n\t\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.X = (s.Walker.Velocity.X / currentSpeed) * speed\n\t\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.Y = (s.Walker.Velocity.Y / currentSpeed) * speed\n\t\t}\n\n\t\ts.Walker.Position.Z = s.Walker.Height\n\n\tcase \"falling\":\n\t\t// Rapid Z descent with high downward velocity\n\t\telapsed := time.Since(s.FallStartTime).Seconds()\n\t\tprogress := elapsed / params.DescentDuration.Seconds()\n\n\t\tif progress >= 1.0 {\n\t\t\t// Fall complete\n\t\t\ts.State = \"on_floor\"\n\t\t\ts.Walker.Position.Z = params.EndZ\n\t\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.X = 0\n\t\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.Y = 0\n\t\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.Z = 0\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Fall complete - Z now at %.2f m\", s.Walker.Position.Z)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// Animate fall\n\t\t\tzDrop := s.PreFallPosition.Z - params.EndZ\n\t\t\ts.Walker.Position.Z = s.PreFallPosition.Z - zDrop*progress\n\n\t\t\t// Downward velocity exceeds threshold\n\t\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.Z = -math.Abs(params.MinVelocity) - 0.5 // Add margin\n\n\t\t\t// Slight forward motion during fall\n\t\t\ts.Walker.Position.X += s.PreFallVelocity.X * dt * 0.5\n\t\t\ts.Walker.Position.Y += s.PreFallVelocity.Y * dt * 0.5\n\t\t}\n\n\tcase \"on_floor\":\n\t\t// Stay still on floor - no motion\n\t\ts.Walker.Position.Z = params.EndZ\n\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.X = 0\n\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.Y = 0\n\t\ts.Walker.Velocity.Z = 0\n\n\tcase \"recovering\":\n\t\t// Quick recovery (for false positive test)\n\t\ts.Walker.Position.Z += 0.5 * dt // Stand up quickly\n\t\tif s.Walker.Position.Z >= s.Walker.Height {\n\t\t\ts.Walker.Position.Z = s.Walker.Height\n\t\t\ts.State = \"walking\"\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// StartFall triggers the fall sequence\nfunc (s *FallScenarioState) StartFall(params FallScenarioParams) {\n\ts.PreFallPosition = s.Walker.Position\n\ts.PreFallVelocity = s.Walker.Velocity\n\ts.FallStartTime = time.Now()\n\ts.State = \"falling\"\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Triggering fall from Z=%.2f m with velocity %.2f m/s\",\n\t\ts.Walker.Position.Z, params.MinVelocity)\n}\n\n// OTAScenarioState tracks OTA scenario state for a node\ntype OTAScenarioState struct {\n\tNode             *VirtualNode\n\tState            string // \"idle\", \"downloading\", \"installing\", \"rebooting\", \"updated\", \"rollback\"\n\tCurrentVersion   string\n\tDownloadedBytes  int64\n\tDownloadStart    time.Time\n\tRebootStart      time.Time\n\tFailureStart     time.Time\n\tAllNodes         []*VirtualNode\n}\n\n// SendOTAStatus sends OTA status message to mothership\nfunc (s *OTAScenarioState) SendOTAStatus(ctx context.Context) time.Now().UnixMilli(),\n\t\t\"state\":            s.State,\n\t\t\"current_version\":  s.CurrentVersion,\n\t\t\"downloaded_bytes\": s.DownloadedBytes,\n\t}\n\n\tmsgBytes, err := SimulateOTADownload simulates the firmware download process\nfunc (s *OTAScenarioState) SimulateOTADownload(ctx context.Context, params OTAScenarioParams, progress chan<- float64) error {\n\ts.State = \"downloading\"\n\ts.DownloadStart = time.Now()\n\n\tchunkSize := int64(4096) // 4KB chunks\n\ttotalChunks := (params.FirmwareSize + chunkSize - 1) / chunkSize\n\n\tfor i := int64(0); i < totalChunks; time.Millisecond)\n\n\t\ts.DownloadedBytes = (i + 1) * chunkSize\n\t\tif s.DownloadedBytes > params.FirmwareSize {\n\t\t\ts.DownloadedBytes = params.FirmwareSize\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tpct := float64(s.DownloadedBytes) / float64(params.FirmwareSize)\n\t\tif progress != nil {\n\t\t\tselect {\n\t\t\tcase progress <- pct:\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Send status every 25%\n\t\tif i%(totalChunks/4) == 0 || i == totalChunks-1 {\n\t\t\tif err := s.SendOTAStatus(ctx); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d OTA download: %.1f%% (%d/%d bytes)\",\n\t\t\t\ts.Node.ID, pct*100, s.DownloadedBytes, params.FirmwareSize)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\ts.State = \"installing\"\n\tif err := s.SendOTAStatus(ctx); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// SimulateOTAInstall simulates firmware installation\nfunc (s *OTAScenarioState) SimulateOTAInstall(ctx context.Context, params OTAScenarioParams) error {\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d installing firmware %s...\", s.Node.ID, params.NewVersion)\n\n\t// Simulate installation time (2 seconds)\n\ttime.Sleep(2 * time.Second)\n\n\ts.CurrentVersion = \"concrete\"\n\tMaterialGlass    WallMaterial = \"glass\"\n\tMaterialMetal    WallMaterial = \"metal\"\n)\n\n// Wall represents a wall segment with material properties\ntype Wall struct {\n\tX1, Y1, X2, Y2 float64\n\tMaterial        WallMaterial\n\tAttenuation     float64 // dB loss\n}\n\n// Stats tracks simulation statistics\ntype Stats struct {\n\tFramesSent     atomic.Int64\n\tFramesPerSec   float64\n\tStartTime      time.Time\n\tLastStatsTime  time.Time\n\tLastFramesSent int64\n}\n\nfunc main() {\n\tflag.Var(&wallFlag{}, \"wall\", \"Add a wall as x1,y1,x2,y2 (can be repeated)\")\n\tflag.Parse()\n\n\tlog.SetFlags(log.Ldate | log.Ltime | log.Lmicroseconds)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] CSI Simulator CLI starting\")\n\n\t// Parse space dimensions\n\tspace, err := parseSpace(*flagSpace)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Invalid space dimensions: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// Initialize random seed\n\tif *flagSeed == 0 {\n\t\t*flagSeed = time.Now().UnixNano()\n\t}\n\trng := rand.New(rand.NewSource(*flagSeed))\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Random seed: %d\", *flagSeed)\n\n\t// Validate channel\n\tif *flagChannel < 1 || *flagChannel > 14 {\n\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Invalid channel: %d (must be 1-14)\", *flagChannel)\n\t}\n\n\t// Create virtual nodes\n\tnodes := createVirtualNodes(*flagNodes, space, rng)\n\n\t// Create walkers (may be nil for node-to-node mode)\n\twalkers := createWalkers(*flagWalkers, space, rng)\n\n\t// For node-to-node mode, create walkers after nodes exist\n\tif WalkerType(*flagWalkerType) == WalkerTypeNodeToNode {\n\t\twalkers = createNodeToNodeWalkers(*flagWalkers, nodes)\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Configuration:\")\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Mothership: %s\", *flagMothership)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Scenario: %s\", *flagScenario)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Nodes: %d\", *flagNodes)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Walkers: %d\", *flagWalkers)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Rate: %d Hz\", *flagRate)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Duration: %d s\", *flagDuration)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Space: %.1fx%.1fx%.1f m\", space.Width, space.Depth, space.Height)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Walls: %d\", len(walls))\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   BLE: %v\", *flagBLE)\n\n\t// Output GDOP overlay if requested\n\tif *flagGDOPOverlay {\n\t\tif err := outputGDOPOverlay(space, nodes, *flagCellSize); err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Failed to output GDOP overlay: %v\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Output shopping list if requested\n\tif *flagShoppingList {\n\t\tif err := outputShoppingList(space, nodes); err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Failed to output shopping list: %v\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If only output was requested, exit here\n\tif *flagGDOPOverlay || *flagShoppingList {\n\t\tif !*flagVerify && *flagDuration == 0 {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Output complete (no simulation requested)\")\n\t\t\tos.Exit(0)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Create scenario configuration\n\tscenarioConfig := &ScenarioConfig{\n\t\tType:      ScenarioType(*flagScenario),\n\t\tStartedAt: time.Now(),\n\t\tFallParams: FallScenarioParams{\n\t\t\tTriggerAfter:      *flagFallDelay,\n\t\t\tDescentDuration:   *flagFallDuration,\n\t\t\tStillnessDuration: *flagStillness,\n\t\t\tMinVelocity:       -1.5, // Below -1.5 m/s threshold\n\t\t\tMinZDrop:          0.8,  // At least 0.8m drop\n\t\t\tEndZ:              0.3,  // Floor level\n\t\t},\n\t\tOTAParams: OTAScenarioParams{\n\t\t\tUpdateAfter:      10 * time.Second,\n\t\t\tFirmwareSize:     *flagOTASize,\n\t\t\tNewVersion:       *flagOTAVersion,\n\t\t\tRebootDelay:      3 * time.Second,\n\t\t\tBootFailDuration: 30 * time.Second,\n\t\t\tSimulateFailure:  *flagOTAFailure,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\t// Create context for shutdown\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tdefer cancel()\n\n\t// Handle interrupt signal\n\tsigChan := make(chan os.Signal, 1)\n\tsignal.Notify(sigChan, os.Interrupt)\n\n\t// Open CSV writer if specified\n\tvar csvWriter *CSVWriter\n\tif *flagOutputCSV != \"\" {\n\t\tcsvWriter, err = NewCSVWriter(*flagOutputCSV)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Failed to open CSV file: %v\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tdefer func() { _ = csvWriter.Close() }() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Writing ground truth to %s\", *flagOutputCSV)\n\t}\n\n\t// Start statistics reporter\n\tstats := &Stats{StartTime: time.Now()}\n\tgo reportStats(ctx, stats)\n\n\t// Connect all nodes to mothership\n\tif err := connectNodes(ctx, nodes); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Failed to connect nodes: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\tdefer closeAllNodes(nodes)\n\n\t// Main simulation loop\n\tsimulationComplete := make(chan struct{})\n\tgo runSimulation(ctx, nodes, walkers, space, rng, csvWriter, stats, simulationComplete, scenarioConfig)\n\n\t// Wait for completion or interrupt\n\tvar durationTimer <-chan time.Time\n\tif *flagDuration > 0 {\n\t\tdurationTimer = time.After(time.Duration(*flagDuration) * time.Second)\n\t} else {\n\t\t// Never timeout if duration is 0\n\t\tdurationTimer = make(chan time.Time)\n\t}\n\n\tselect {\n\tcase <-simulationComplete:\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Simulation completed\")\n\tcase <-sigChan:\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Interrupted by user\")\n\t\tcancel()\n\tcase <-durationTimer:\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Duration elapsed\")\n\t\tcancel()\n\t}\n\n\t// Verify blob count if requested\n\tif *flagVerify {\n\t\tif err := verifyBlobs(*flagWalkers, walkers, space); err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Verification FAILED: %v\", err)\n\t\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t\t}\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Verification PASSED\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Print final statistics\n\tprintFinalStats(stats, len(walkers))\n}\n\n// parseSpace parses space dimensions from WxDxH format\nfunc parseSpace(s string) (*Space, error) {\n\tparts := strings.Split(s, \"x\")\n\tif len(parts) != 3 {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"expected WxDxH format, got: %s\", s)\n\t}\n\twidth, err := strconv.ParseFloat(parts[0], 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid width: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tdepth, err := strconv.ParseFloat(parts[1], 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid depth: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\theight, err := strconv.ParseFloat(parts[2], 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid height: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\treturn &Space{Width: width, Depth: depth, Height: height}, nil\n}\n\n// createVirtualNodes creates virtual nodes positioned in the space\nfunc createVirtualNodes(count int, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand) []*VirtualNode {\n\tnodes := make([]*VirtualNode, count)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n\t\tnode := &VirtualNode{\n\t\t\tID:   i,\n\t\t\tMAC:  generateMAC(i),\n\t\t\tRole: \"tx_rx\",\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Distribute nodes around perimeter\n\t\tperimeter := 2*(space.Width+space.Depth)\n\t\tpos := float64(i) / float64(count) * perimeter\n\n\t\tif pos < space.Width {\n\t\t\t// Bottom edge\n\t\t\tnode.Position = Point{X: pos, Y: 0, Z: 2.0}\n\t\t} else if pos < space.Width+space.Depth {\n\t\t\t// Right edge\n\t\t\tnode.Position = Point{X: space.Width, Y: pos - space.Width, Z: 2.0}\n\t\t} else if pos < 2*space.Width+space.Depth {\n\t\t\t// Top edge\n\t\t\tnode.Position = Point{X: space.Width - (pos - space.Width - space.Depth), Y: space.Depth, Z: 2.0}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// Left edge\n\t\t\tnode.Position = Point{X: 0, Y: space.Depth - (pos - 2*space.Width - space.Depth), Z: 2.0}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tnodes[i] = node\n\t}\n\n\treturn nodes\n}\n\n// generateMAC generates a synthetic MAC address for a virtual node\nfunc generateMAC(id int) [6]byte {\n\tvar mac [6]byte\n\tmac[0] = 0xAA\n\tmac[1] = 0xBB\n\tmac[2] = 0xCC\n\tmac[3] = byte((id >> 16) & 0xFF)\n\tmac[4] = byte((id >> 8) & 0xFF)\n\tmac[5] = byte(id & 0xFF)\n\treturn mac\n}\n\n// createWalkers creates synthetic walkers\nfunc createWalkers(count int, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand) []*Walker {\n\twalkerType := WalkerType(*flagWalkerType)\n\n\tif walkerType == WalkerTypePathFollow {\n\t\treturn createPathWalkers(count, space)\n\t}\n\n\tif walkerType == WalkerTypeNodeToNode {\n\t\t// Will be created after nodes are initialized\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Default: random walk\n\twalkers := make([]*Walker, count)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n\t\twalkers[i] = &Walker{\n\t\t\tID:   i,\n\t\t\tType: WalkerTypeRandomWalk,\n\t\t\tPosition: Point{\n\t\t\t\tX: rng.Float64() * space.Width,\n\t\t\t\tY: rng.Float64() * space.Depth,\n\t\t\t\tZ: 1.7,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tVelocity: Point{\n\t\t\t\tX: (rng.Float64() - 0.5) * 0.5,\n\t\t\t\tY: (rng.Float64() - 0.5) * 0.5,\n\t\t\t\tZ: 0,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tSpeed:  0.8 + rng.Float64()*0.4,\n\t\t\tHeight: 1.7,\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn walkers\n}\n\n// createPathWalkers creates walkers that follow predefined paths\nfunc createPathWalkers(count int, space *Space) []*Walker {\n\tif *flagPathFile == \"\" {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Path-following mode requires --path-file, using default rectangular path\")\n\t\treturn createDefaultPathWalkers(count, space)\n\t}\n\n\t// Load paths from JSON file\n\tpaths, err := loadPathsFromFile(*flagPathFile)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Failed to load paths from %s: %v\", *flagPathFile, err)\n\t}\n\n\twalkers := make([]*Walker, count)\n\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n\t\t// Use path modulo count to allow fewer paths than walkers\n\t\tpathIdx := i % len(paths)\n\t\twalkers[i] = &Walker{\n\t\t\tID:      i,\n\t\t\tType:    WalkerTypePathFollow,\n\t\t\tPath:    paths[pathIdx],\n\t\t\tPathIdx: 0,\n\t\t\tSpeed:   1.0,\n\t\t\tHeight:  1.7,\n\t\t}\n\t\tif len(paths[pathIdx]) > 0 {\n\t\t\twalkers[i].Position = paths[pathIdx][0]\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn walkers\n}\n\n// createDefaultPathWalkers creates walkers following a default rectangular perimeter path\nfunc createDefaultPathWalkers(count int, space *Space) []*Walker {\n\tmargin := 0.5\n\tpath := []Point{\n\t\t{X: margin, Y: margin, Z: 1.7},\n\t\t{X: space.Width - margin, Y: margin, Z: 1.7},\n\t\t{X: space.Width - margin, Y: space.Depth - margin, Z: 1.7},\n\t\t{X: margin, Y: space.Depth - margin, Z: 1.7},\n\t}\n\n\twalkers := make([]*Walker, count)\n\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n\t\tstartIdx := (i * len(path) / count) % len(path)\n\t\twalkers[i] = &Walker{\n\t\t\tID:      i,\n\t\t\tType:    WalkerTypePathFollow,\n\t\t\tPath:    path,\n\t\t\tPathIdx: startIdx,\n\t\t\tSpeed:   0.8 + 0.4*float64(i)/float64(count),\n\t\t\tHeight:  1.7,\n\t\t}\n\t\tif len(path) > 0 {\n\t\t\twalkers[i].Position = path[startIdx]\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn walkers\n}\n\n// createNodeToNodeWalkers creates walkers that traverse between virtual nodes\nfunc createNodeToNodeWalkers(count int, nodes []*VirtualNode) []*Walker {\n\tif len(nodes) < 2 {\n\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[SIM] Node-to-node mode requires at least 2 nodes\")\n\t}\n\n\twalkers := make([]*Walker, count)\n\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n\t\twalkers[i] = &Walker{\n\t\t\tID:      i,\n\t\t\tType:    WalkerTypeNodeToNode,\n\t\t\tNodes:   nodes,\n\t\t\tNodeIdx: 1, // Target is second node\n\t\t\tSpeed:   1.0,\n\t\t\tHeight:  1.7,\n\t\t}\n\t\t// Start at first node\n\t\tif len(nodes) > 0 {\n\t\t\twalkers[i].Position = nodes[0].Position\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn walkers\n}\n\n// PathDefinition defines a walker path in JSON format\ntype PathDefinition struct {\n\tWaypoints []Point `json:\"waypoints\"` // Ordered list of points to visit\n}\n\n// loadPathsFromFile loads walker paths from a JSON file\nfunc loadPathsFromFile(filename string) ([][]Point, error) {\n\tdata, err := os.ReadFile(filename)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar paths []PathDefinition\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal(data, &paths); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tif len(paths) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"no paths defined in file\")\n\t}\n\n\tresult := make([][]Point, len(paths))\n\tfor i, pathDef := range paths {\n\t\tif len(pathDef.Waypoints) == 0 {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"path %d has no waypoints\", i)\n\t\t}\n\t\tresult[i] = pathDef.Waypoints\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Loaded %d paths from %s\", len(result), filename)\n\treturn result, nil\n}\n\n// connectNodes connects all virtual nodes to the mothership.\n// Each node gets its own persistent connection with background goroutines\n// for ping, health, and message reading.\nfunc connectNodes(ctx context.Context, nodes []*VirtualNode) error {\n\t// Get or generate token\n\ttoken := *flagToken\n\tif token == \"\" {\n\t\tvar err error\n\t\ttoken, err = provisionToken()\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to provision token: %w\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Auto-provisioned token: %s...\", token[:min(16, len(token))])\n\t}\n\n\t// Parse mothership URL\n\twsURL, err := url.Parse(*flagMothership)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid mothership URL: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// Convert http(s) to ws(s)\n\tif wsURL.Scheme == \"http\" {\n\t\twsURL.Scheme = \"ws\"\n\t} else if wsURL.Scheme == \"https\" {\n\t\twsURL.Scheme = \"wss\"\n\t}\n\n\terrChan := make(chan error, len(nodes))\n\n\tfor _, node := range nodes {\n\t\t// Add node WS path if needed\n\t\tnodeURL := wsURL.String()\n\t\tif !strings.Contains(nodeURL, \"/ws/\") && !strings.HasSuffix(nodeURL, \"/ws\") {\n\t\t\tif strings.HasSuffix(nodeURL, \"/\") {\n\t\t\t\tnodeURL = nodeURL + \"ws\"\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tnodeURL = nodeURL + \"/ws\"\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\theaders := http.Header{}\n\t\theaders.Set(\"X-Spaxel-Token\", token)\n\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d connecting to %s\", node.ID, nodeURL)\n\n\t\tconn, resp, err := websocket.DefaultDialer.DialContext(ctx, nodeURL, headers)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tif resp != nil {\n\t\t\t\tbody, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)\n\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d dial failed: %w (status %d: %s)\", node.ID, err, resp.StatusCode, string(body))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d dial failed: %w\", node.ID, err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tnode.Conn = conn\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d connected\", node.ID)\n\n\t\t// Send hello message\n\t\thello := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\"type\":             \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\"mac\":              macToString(node.MAC),\n\t\t\t\"firmware_version\": \"sim-1.0.0\",\n\t\t\t\"capabilities\":     []string{\"csi\", \"tx\", \"rx\"},\n\t\t\t\"chip\":             \"ESP32-S3\",\n\t\t\t\"flash_mb\":         16,\n\t\t\t\"uptime_ms\":        1000,\n\t\t\t\"wifi_rssi\":        -45,\n\t\t\t\"ip\":               fmt.Sprintf(\"127.0.0.%d\", node.ID+2),\n\t\t}\n\n\t\thelloBytes, err := json.Marshal(hello)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d marshal hello: %w\", node.ID, err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tnode.mu.Lock()\n\t\terr = conn.WriteMessage(websocket.TextMessage, helloBytes)\n\t\tnode.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d send hello: %w\", node.ID, err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Wait for role assignment\n\t\tconn.SetReadDeadline(time.Now().Add(10 * time.Second)) //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t_, message, err := conn.ReadMessage()\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d read role: %w\", node.ID, err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar roleMsg map[string]interface{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal(message, &roleMsg); err != nil {\n\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d parse role: %w\", node.ID, err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif roleMsg[\"type\"] == \"reject\" {\n\t\t\tconn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"node %d rejected: %v\", node.ID, roleMsg[\"reason\"])\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d received role: %v\", node.ID, roleMsg[\"role\"])\n\n\t\t// Start background goroutines for this connection\n\t\tstartTime := time.Now()\n\t\tgo node.pingLoop(ctx)\n\t\tgo node.healthLoop(ctx, startTime)\n\t\tgo node.readLoop(ctx, errChan)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// provisionToken provisions a token. Tries the mothership API first,\n// falls back to a synthetic HMAC token.\nfunc provisionToken() (string, error) {\n\t// Parse mothership URL to get HTTP endpoint\n\twsURL, err := url.Parse(*flagMothership)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", fmt.Errorf(\"invalid mothership URL: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\thttpURL := *wsURL\n\tif httpURL.Scheme == \"ws\" {\n\t\thttpURL.Scheme = \"http\"\n\t} else if httpURL.Scheme == \"wss\" {\n\t\thttpURL.Scheme = \"https\"\n\t}\n\n\t// Trim /ws suffix to get base URL\n\tbaseURL := strings.TrimSuffix(httpURL.String(), \"/ws\")\n\tbaseURL = strings.TrimSuffix(baseURL, \"/\")\n\tprovisionURL := baseURL + \"/api/provision\"\n\n\t// Try POST /api/provision with synthetic credentials\n\tbody := strings.NewReader(`{\"mac\":\"AA:BB:CC:00:00:00\"}`)\n\tresp, err := http.Post(provisionURL, \"application/json\", body)\n\tif err == nil && resp.StatusCode == http.StatusOK {\n\t\tvar result map[string]interface{}\n\t\tif json.NewDecoder(resp.Body).Decode(&result) == nil {\n\t\t\t_ = resp.Body.Close()\n\t\t\tif token, ok := result[\"node_token\"].(string); ok && token != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\treturn token, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif resp != nil {\n\t\t_ = resp.Body.Close()\n\t}\n\n\t// Fallback: generate synthetic token\n\th := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(\"sim-install-secret\"))\n\th.Write([]byte(\"sim-node\"))\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%064x\", h.Sum(nil)), nil\n}\n\n// closeAllNodes closes all node WebSocket connections\nfunc closeAllNodes(nodes []*VirtualNode) {\n\tfor _, node := range nodes {\n\t\tif node.Conn != nil {\n\t\t\tnode.mu.Lock()\n\t\t\tnode.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.CloseMessage, //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t\t\twebsocket.FormatCloseMessage(websocket.CloseNormalClosure, \"sim shutdown\"))\n\t\t\tnode.Conn.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t\tnode.mu.Unlock()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// macToString converts a 6-byte MAC to colon-separated hex\nfunc macToString(mac [6]byte) string {\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%02X:%02X:%02X:%02X:%02X:%02X\",\n\t\tmac[0], mac[1], mac[2], mac[3], mac[4], mac[5])\n}\n\n// pingLoop sends WebSocket pings\nfunc (n *VirtualNode) pingLoop(ctx context.Context) {\n\tticker := time.NewTicker(30 * time.Second)\n\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n\n\tfor {\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n\t\t\tn.mu.Lock()\n\t\t\terr := n.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.PingMessage, nil)\n\t\t\tn.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d ping failed: %v\", n.ID, err)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// healthLoop sends periodic health messages\nfunc (n *VirtualNode) healthLoop(ctx context.Context, startTime time.Time) {\n\tticker := time.NewTicker(10 * time.Second)\n\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n\n\tfor {\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n\t\t\thealth := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\"type\":            \"health\",\n\t\t\t\t\"mac\":             macToString(n.MAC),\n\t\t\t\t\"timestamp_ms\":    time.Now().UnixMilli(),\n\t\t\t\t\"free_heap_bytes\": 200000,\n\t\t\t\t\"wifi_rssi_dbm\":   -45,\n\t\t\t\t\"uptime_ms\":       time.Since(startTime).Milliseconds(),\n\t\t\t\t\"csi_rate_hz\":     *flagRate,\n\t\t\t\t\"wifi_channel\":    *flagChannel,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\thealthBytes, err := json.Marshal(health)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d marshal health: %v\", n.ID, err)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tn.mu.Lock()\n\t\t\terr = n.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.TextMessage, healthBytes)\n\t\t\tn.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d send health failed: %v\", n.ID, err)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// readLoop reads downstream messages from the WebSocket\nfunc (n *VirtualNode) readLoop(ctx context.Context, errChan chan<- error) {\n\tfor {\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tn.mu.Lock()\n\t\tconn := n.Conn\n\t\tn.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t\tif conn == nil {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tconn.SetReadDeadline(time.Now().Add(60 * time.Second)) //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t_, message, err := conn.ReadMessage()\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tselect {\n\t\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif websocket.IsCloseError(err) {\n\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d connection closed\", n.ID)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d read error: %v\", n.ID, err)\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar msg map[string]interface{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal(message, &msg); err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmsgType, ok := msg[\"type\"].(string)\n\t\tif !ok {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch msgType {\n\t\tcase \"role\":\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d role update: %v\", n.ID, msg[\"role\"])\n\t\tcase \"config\":\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d config update: %v\", n.ID, msg)\n\t\tcase \"reject\":\n\t\t\terrChan <- fmt.Errorf(\"node %d rejected: %v\", n.ID, msg[\"reason\"])\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\tcase \"shutdown\":\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d received shutdown\", n.ID)\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// runSimulation runs the main CSI generation loop\nfunc runSimulation(ctx context.Context, nodes []*VirtualNode, walkers []*Walker, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand, csvWriter *CSVWriter, stats *Stats, done chan<- struct{}, scenario *ScenarioConfig) {\n\tdefer close(done)\n\n\tticker := time.NewTicker(time.Duration(1000/(*flagRate)) * time.Millisecond)\n\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n\n\tframeNum := 0\n\tlastBLETime := time.Now()\n\n\t// Initialize fall scenario state\n\tvar fallState *FallScenarioState\n\tif scenario.Type == ScenarioFall || scenario.Type == ScenarioBagOnCouch {\n\t\tif len(walkers) > 0 {\n\t\t\tfallState = &FallScenarioState{\n\t\t\t\tWalker: walkers[0],\n\t\t\t\tState:  \"walking\",\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif scenario.Type == ScenarioBagOnCouch {\n\t\t\t\t// For bag-on-couch, start with a lower position\n\t\t\t\twalkers[0].Position.Z = 1.0\n\t\t\t\twalkers[0].Velocity.Z = -0.2 // Slow descent\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Track scenario timing\n\tscenarioStarted := false\n\n\tfor {\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n\t\t\t// Handle fall scenario timing\n\t\t\tif fallState != nil && !scenarioStarted && time.Since(scenario.StartedAt) >= scenario.FallParams.TriggerAfter {\n\t\t\t\tif scenario.Type == ScenarioFall {\n\t\t\t\t\tfallState.StartFall(scenario.FallParams)\n\t\t\t\t\tscenarioStarted = true\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Update walker positions\n\t\t\tif fallState != nil {\n\t\t\t\tdt := 1.0 / float64(*flagRate)\n\t\t\t\tfallState.UpdateForFallScenario(dt, scenario.FallParams, space, rng)\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tupdateWalkers(walkers, space, rng)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Write to CSV\n\t\t\tif csvWriter != nil {\n\t\t\t\tcsvWriter.WriteRow(walkers, nodes, walls)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Send CSI frames for each node pair\n\t\t\tfor _, txNode := range nodes {\n\t\t\t\tfor _, rxNode := range nodes {\n\t\t\t\t\tif txNode.ID == rxNode.ID {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tframe := generateCSIFrame(txNode, rxNode, walkers, walls, frameNum, rng)\n\n\t\t\t\t\ttxNode.mu.Lock()\n\t\t\t\t\terr := txNode.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.BinaryMessage, frame)\n\t\t\t\t\ttxNode.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d send CSI failed: %v\", txNode.ID, err)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tstats.FramesSent.Add(1)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Send BLE messages if enabled\n\t\t\tif *flagBLE && time.Since(lastBLETime) > 5*time.Second {\n\t\t\t\tsendBLEMessages(nodes, walkers)\n\t\t\t\tlastBLETime = time.Now()\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tframeNum++\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// updateWalkers updates walker positions based on their movement type\nfunc updateWalkers(walkers []*Walker, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand) {\n\tdt := 1.0 / float64(*flagRate)\n\n\tfor _, walker := range walkers {\n\t\tswitch walker.Type {\n\t\tcase WalkerTypePathFollow:\n\t\t\tupdatePathWalker(walker, dt)\n\t\tcase WalkerTypeNodeToNode:\n\t\t\tupdateNodeToNodeWalker(walker, dt, space)\n\t\tcase WalkerTypeRandomWalk:\n\t\t\tupdateRandomWalker(walker, dt, space, rng)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// updateRandomWalker implements random walk motion\nfunc updateRandomWalker(walker *Walker, dt float64, space *Space, rng *rand.Rand) {\n\twalker.Position.X += walker.Velocity.X * dt\n\twalker.Position.Y += walker.Velocity.Y * dt\n\n\t// Bounce off walls\n\tmargin := 0.2\n\tif walker.Position.X < margin {\n\t\twalker.Position.X = margin\n\t\twalker.Velocity.X *= -1\n\t}\n\tif walker.Position.X > space.Width-margin {\n\t\twalker.Position.X = space.Width - margin\n\t\twalker.Velocity.X *= -1\n\t}\n\tif walker.Position.Y < margin {\n\t\twalker.Position.Y = margin\n\t\twalker.Velocity.Y *= -1\n\t}\n\tif walker.Position.Y > space.Depth-margin {\n\t\twalker.Position.Y = space.Depth - margin\n\t\twalker.Velocity.Y *= -1\n\t}\n\n\t// Random velocity perturbation\n\tperturbation := 0.1\n\twalker.Velocity.X += (rng.Float64() - 0.5) * perturbation\n\twalker.Velocity.Y += (rng.Float64() - 0.5) * perturbation\n\n\t// Clamp velocity\n\tspeed := walker.Speed * (0.5 + rng.Float64()*0.5)\n\tcurrentSpeed := math.Sqrt(walker.Velocity.X*walker.Velocity.X + walker.Velocity.Y*walker.Velocity.Y)\n\tif currentSpeed > 0 {\n\t\twalker.Velocity.X = (walker.Velocity.X / currentSpeed) * speed\n\t\twalker.Velocity.Y = (walker.Velocity.Y / currentSpeed) * speed\n\t}\n\n\twalker.Position.Z = walker.Height\n}\n\n// updatePathWalker implements path-following motion\nfunc updatePathWalker(walker *Walker, dt float64) {\n\tif len(walker.Path) == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\ttarget := walker.Path[walker.PathIdx]\n\tdx := target.X - walker.Position.X\n\tdy := target.Y - walker.Position.Y\n\tdz := target.Z - walker.Position.Z\n\tdist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n\n\t// If very close to target, move to next waypoint\n\tif dist < 0.1 {\n\t\twalker.PathIdx = (walker.PathIdx + 1) % len(walker.Path)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Move towards target at constant speed\n\tmoveDist := walker.Speed * dt\n\tif moveDist > dist {\n\t\tmoveDist = dist\n\t}\n\n\tt := moveDist / dist\n\twalker.Position.X += dx * t\n\twalker.Position.Y += dy * t\n\n\t// Update velocity vector for consistency\n\tif dist > 0 {\n\t\twalker.Velocity.X = (dx / dist) * walker.Speed\n\t\twalker.Velocity.Y = (dy / dist) * walker.Speed\n\t\twalker.Velocity.Z = (dz / dist) * walker.Speed\n\t}\n}\n\n// updateNodeToNodeWalker implements traversal between virtual nodes\nfunc updateNodeToNodeWalker(walker *Walker, dt float64, space *Space) {\n\tif len(walker.Nodes) < 2 {\n\t\tupdateRandomWalker(walker, dt, space, rand.New(rand.NewSource(time.Now().UnixNano())))\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\ttargetNode := walker.Nodes[walker.NodeIdx]\n\ttargetPos := targetNode.Position\n\n\tdx := targetPos.X - walker.Position.X\n\tdy := targetPos.Y - walker.Position.Y\n\tdz := targetPos.Z - walker.Position.Z\n\tdist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n\n\t// Check if we've arrived at the target node (horizontal distance)\n\thorizontalDist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy)\n\tif horizontalDist < 0.3 {\n\t\t// Move to next node\n\t\twalker.NodeIdx = (walker.NodeIdx + 1) % len(walker.Nodes)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Move towards target node\n\tmoveDist := walker.Speed * dt\n\tif moveDist > horizontalDist {\n\t\tmoveDist = horizontalDist\n\t}\n\n\tt := moveDist / horizontalDist\n\twalker.Position.X += dx * t\n\twalker.Position.Y += dy * t\n\n\t// Update velocity vector\n\tif horizontalDist > 0 {\n\t\twalker.Velocity.X = (dx / horizontalDist) * walker.Speed\n\t\twalker.Velocity.Y = (dy / horizontalDist) * walker.Speed\n\t\twalker.Velocity.Z = (dz / dist) * walker.Speed\n\t}\n\n\twalker.Position.Z = walker.Height\n}\n\n// sendBLEMessages sends synthetic BLE scan results\nfunc sendBLEMessages(nodes []*VirtualNode, walkers []*Walker) {\n\tfor _, node := range nodes {\n\t\tdevices := make([]map[string]interface{}, 0)\n\n\t\tfor _, walker := range walkers {\n\t\t\tdx := walker.Position.X - node.Position.X\n\t\t\tdy := walker.Position.Y - node.Position.Y\n\t\t\tdz := walker.Position.Z - node.Position.Z\n\t\t\tdist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n\n\t\t\trssi := -50.0 - 20.0*math.Log10(dist/1.0)\n\t\t\tif rssi < -90 {\n\t\t\t\trssi = -90\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tdevices = append(devices, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\"addr\": fmt.Sprintf(\"AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:%02X\", walker.ID),\n\t\t\t\t\"rssi\": int(rssi),\n\t\t\t\t\"name\": fmt.Sprintf(\"sim-person-%d\", walker.ID),\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif len(devices) == 0 {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tbleMsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\"type\":         \"ble\",\n\t\t\t\"mac\":          macToString(node.MAC),\n\t\t\t\"timestamp_ms\": time.Now().UnixMilli(),\n\t\t\t\"devices\":      devices,\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tbleBytes, err := json.Marshal(bleMsg)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d marshal BLE: %v\", node.ID, err)\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tnode.mu.Lock()\n\t\terr = node.Conn.WriteMessage(websocket.TextMessage, bleBytes)\n\t\tnode.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Node %d send BLE failed: %v\", node.ID, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// reportStats periodically prints statistics\nfunc reportStats(ctx context.Context, stats *Stats) {\n\tticker := time.NewTicker(10 * time.Second)\n\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n\n\tfor {\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n\t\t\tnow := time.Now()\n\t\t\telapsed := now.Sub(stats.StartTime).Seconds()\n\t\t\tframesSent := stats.FramesSent.Load()\n\n\t\t\tif elapsed > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tfps := float64(framesSent) / elapsed\n\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Stats: frames=%d fps=%.1f elapsed=%.1fs\", framesSent, fps, elapsed)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// printFinalStats prints final simulation statistics\nfunc printFinalStats(stats *Stats, walkerCount int) {\n\telapsed := time.Since(stats.StartTime).Seconds()\n\tframesSent := stats.FramesSent.Load()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM] Final Statistics:\")\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Frames sent: %d\", framesSent)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Duration: %.1f seconds\", elapsed)\n\tif elapsed > 0 {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Average FPS: %.1f\", float64(framesSent)/elapsed)\n\t}\n\tlog.Printf(\"[SIM]   Walkers: %d\", walkerCount)\n}\n\nfunc min(a, b int) int {\n\tif a < b {\n\t\treturn a\n\t}\n\treturn b\n}\n\n// outputGDOPOverlay computes and outputs GDOP overlay data as JSON\nfunc outputGDOPOverlay(space *Space, nodes []*VirtualNode, cellSize float64) error {\n\t// Convert virtual nodes to simulator nodes\n\tnodeSet := simulator.NewNodeSet()\n\tfor _, vn := range nodes {\n\t\tnodeSet.AddVirtualNode(vn.ID, fmt.Sprintf(\"Node %d\", vn.ID), vn.Position)\n\t}\n\n\t// Generate links\n\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodeSet)\n\n\tif len(links) < 2 {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"need at least 2 nodes for GDOP computation\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Get space bounds\n\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n\n\t// Create GDOP computer\n\tconfig := simulator.GridConfig{\n\t\tMinX:     minX,\n\t\tMinY:     minY,\n\t\tWidth:    maxX - minX,\n\t\tDepth:    maxY - minY,\n\t\tCellSize: cellSize,\n\t}\n\tgdopComp := simulator.NewGDOPComputer(links, config)\n\n\t// Compute GDOP for all cells\n\tresults := gdopComp.ComputeAll()\n\n\t// Convert to heatmap data\n\theatmapData := gdopComp.ToHeatmapData(results)\n\n\t// Output JSON\n\toutput := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":            \"gdop_overlay\",\n\t\t\"space_dimensions\": map[string]float64{\n\t\t\t\"width_m\":  space.Width,\n\t\t\t\"depth_m\":  space.Depth,\n\t\t\t\"height_m\": space.Height,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"grid_dimensions\": []int{heatmapData.Width, heatmapData.Depth, 1},\n\t\t\"cell_size_m\":    cellSize,\n\t\t\"origin\":         map[string]float64{\"x\": heatmapData.OriginX, \"y\": heatmapData.OriginY},\n\t\t\"gdop_values\":    heatmapData.GDOPValues,\n\t\t\"qualities\":      heatmapData.Qualities,\n\t\t\"colors\":         heatmapData.Colors,\n\t\t\"accuracy_map\":   heatmapData.AccuracyMap,\n\t\t\"coverage_score\": gdopComp.CoverageScore(results),\n\t\t\"average_gdop\":   gdopComp.AverageGDOP(results),\n\t\t\"quality_counts\": gdopComp.QualityCounts(results),\n\t\t\"dead_zones\":     gdopComp.FindDeadZones(results),\n\t\t\"links\":          links,\n\t\t\"timestamp\":      time.Now().Format(time.RFC3339),\n\t}\n\n\tenc := json.NewEncoder(os.Stdout)\n\tenc.SetIndent(\"\", \"  \")\n\treturn enc.Encode(output)\n}\n\n// outputShoppingList generates and outputs the shopping list as JSON\nfunc outputShoppingList(space *Space, nodes []*VirtualNode) error {\n\t// Convert virtual nodes to simulator nodes\n\tnodeSet := simulator.NewNodeSet()\n\tfor _, vn := range nodes {\n\t\tnodeSet.AddVirtualNode(vn.ID, fmt.Sprintf(\"Node %d\", vn.ID), vn.Position)\n\t}\n\n\t// Generate basic coverage info (no walkers for static shopping list)\n\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodeSet)\n\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n\n\tgdopComp := simulator.NewGDOPComputer(links, simulator.GridConfig{\n\t\tMinX:     minX,\n\t\tMinY:     minY,\n\t\tWidth:    maxX - minX,\n\t\tDepth:    maxY - minY,\n\t\tCellSize: 0.2,\n\t})\n\tresults := gdopComp.ComputeAll()\n\tcoverageScore := gdopComp.CoverageScore(results)\n\n\t// Create accuracy report (default values since no simulation run)\n\taccuracy := simulator.AccuracyReport{\n\t\tMedianError: 1.0,\n\t\tMeanError:   1.2,\n\t\tMaxError:    2.5,\n\t\tP95Error:    2.0,\n\t}\n\n\t//
